chapters.text: David chapa Solomon chu ama le ama akisemin long louvin aleng chang tai, chule Pakai a-Pathenin jong ama apanpin loupi tah-in achoi sangin ahi.

Solomon chun Israel pumpi jah le sepai asang sang lamkaiho jah, aja ja lamkaiho jah, thutan vaihomte jah chule Israel pumpi lah a milen milalte jah, ainsung jouseuva phung upa chengse jah din thu asetai.

Chuin Solomon le Houbung pumpi chu abonchauvin akilhon’uvin Gibeon khoa muntheng lama achetauve; ijeh-inem itileh hiche khoa hi masanga Pakai lhacha pang Mose’n gamthip laiya anasemdoh Pathen henga kikhopna ponbuh chu kisong jing ahinalaiye.
Ahivangin David chun Pathen thingkong chu Kir’iath-je’arim khoa kona anapoh doh a, Jerusalem khopia hiche thingkong tunna dinga David’in ponbuh asona, mun agonpehna laiya chu anakoisa ahitai.
Chujongleh Gibeon khoa hi Hur tupa, Uri chapa Bez’alel semdohsa sum-eng maicham chu Pakai houbuh maiya kitung jing nalai ahi. Hikoma hi Solomon le Houbung pumpi Pakaiya tao dia cheji ahiuve.
Hikom kikhopna ponbuh sum-eng maicham phung Pakai angsunga chun Solomon jong akaltouvin, maicham chunga hin pumgo thilto sang khat jen agatoh doh-in ahi.
Hiche jan hin Solomon henga Pathen ahung kilah-in ajah a thu aseipeh tai, “Thumin ipipen kapeh ding nahim?” ati.
Chuphat’in Solomon chun Pathen henga aseiyin, “Nangman kapa David chu loupi tah le long louhel’in nalungset’in, chutengle kei jeng jong hi ama khel din lengin neisemtai.
Tuhin vo Pakai Pathen, kapa David henga nathutep chu guilhunsah tan; ijeh-inem itileh nangin keima hi mihem jat tamtah leiset leivuite jat chunga lenga neipansah ahitai.
Mipi hijatpi maiya hi vaikonje le vailhunje kahet themna dingin tun chihna le hetna neipen; achutilouva ahileh namite hijatpi hi kon achunguva vai ahomjou ding ham?” atin athumtai.

Hichun Pathenin Solomon ahindonbut paiyin, “Nangman hiche hi nalungthima navop’a, nei ding le gou ding, haona, jabolna thumjo louva, nangma hotbol mite thina ding jong thum louva, nangma hinkho sotna ding jeng cha jong thum louva, natahsa dinga chihna le hetna joh nathuma, keiman achunguva lenga kapansah kamite chunga vaihom themna ding nagela,

hitobanga nagel jeh hin chihna le hetna hi nangma nakipeah ahitai. Keiman haona jouse le nei le gou jong kapeh a, chule jabolna jong kapeh ding nahin, hitobang thil hi nangma masanga lengten jong anei khah loulai ahin, nangma nunga hung leng chang ding lengte jong hitobang thil neiya khat jeng cha jong hung um louhel ding ahi,” ati.
Hichun Gibeon khoa kikhopna ponbuh mai, muntheng phunga konin Solomon chu ahung potdoh-in Jerusalem langa ahung tai. Hiti hin Israelte chunga lengvai ana poi.

Solomon in kangtalaijouse leh sakol touthem miho abonchan akhomsoh keiyin ahileh, abonchan kangtalai sang khat le ja li aneiyin, sakol touthem mi sepai sang som le sang ni aneiye; sepai hijat hi Solomon chun Jerusalem khopia jong lengpa koma apansah a, chule kangtalai kikoina khopi dang danga jong apansah atousah soh kei ahi.

Lengpan Jerusalem khopi sunga chun dangka le sana jeng jong man baitah-in abol’in, song lah abahsah jenge; chule cedar thing jong chu thalhing set’in akoiyin, phai dunga theipi thing lah abahsah jengin ahi.
Solomonin sakolte chu Egypt gam le Ku’e gama agatoldoh ahin, lengpa’n thil choa apansah mihon aboncha chu Ku’e gama aman agapeh uva agakaiyu ahi.

Egypt gama konin kangtalai khat chu aman dangka shekel jagup apen agatol’uvin; chule sakol khat chu dangka ja khat le som nga apeuvin agatol’uve; hitobangma hin thil choa le ajoh a pang hoa kon hin thil ho chu Hit mite leng ho leh Syria lengle henga atol lut’ uvin agajoh jiuve.
Solomon chun Pakai min a houin khat sah dingle ama ding mong monga leng inpi khat sahdoh ding ageltai.
Hijeh chun thilpo din mihem sang som sagi apansah-in, thinglhang gamsunga song kaldoh din mihem sang som get apansah-in, chule amaho chengse vetup dingin mihem sang thum le jagup apansah-e.

Chujouvin Solomon hin Tyre lengpa Huram henga thu athot’in hitin aseiye, “Nangin kapa David chenna dinga in khat akisahna dinga cedar thing natolpeh ji bang bangin keima jong neihin tolpeh-in lang, ama nabolna bangin kei jong neibol’in.

Vetan, keiman Pakai ka-Pathen min a houin khat sahdoh a, hiche hi ama dinga thenso ding, Pathen angsunga gimnamtui le amuinam tuitah tah gimnamtui halnamna ding, changlhah agol gol’a kigola beitih neilouva kitohdoh thiltona man a chule jingkah nilhah a pumgo thiltona man ding, cholngah nikho jousea jong, lhathah niseh jong leh man ding, Israelte dinga kigonpeh banga Pakai ka-Pathenu dinga aphat kiteppeh kut ho bolna man ding, aitih geiya man ding kati ahi.
Keiman sah dinga kagot hiche houin hi in lentah hiding ahi, ajeh chu keiho Pathen hi pathen dangjouse sanga lenjo mong mong ahiye.

Amavang van le vanchung nungpenin jong hiche Pathen hi adol lou ding ahin, mihem koiham ama dinga in khat sah peh jou ding chu? Kei them them hin ama dinga chu in kasah peh jou lou ding ahin, ama angsunga gimnamtui halnamna ding mai maibou hilou ding ham?

Hijeh chun tun jong sana, dangka, sum-eng chule thih kheng them tah mi neihin solpeh-in, ponsandup le asan-ao, pondum khong them mi hinsol’in, song jepdan kihil themsa mi jong hinsol’in, kapa David’in anakoisa Judah gam le Jerusalem khopia natong thilbol them ho hitoh kiloiyu hen.

Cedar thing le chah thing, chule algum thing inthil dingin Lebanon gama konin neihin tolpeh- in, ajeh chu Lebanon gama inthil jondol thing holje hi nasohten aheuve, ti keiman kahetsa ahi; keima soh ten jong nangma sohte chu panhu nauvinte;
hitobanga hi amahon kei ding inthil ajon’uva, thalhingset’a akhol diu ahi, ajeh chu keiman sah dinga kagot houin hi in len tah le kidang tah khat ahi.

Vetan, keiman nasohte thing suithem, thing tan a pang ho chu suhlou chang goibongsa ate-na dim sang som ni le sakol chang ate-na sang som ni ma toh peng ting, lengpitwi jong ate-na sang som ni dim le thaotwi jong ate-na sang som ni dim ma kapeh ding ahinai,” ati.

Tyre lengpa Huram hin adonbutna chu lekha thot khat’a ajih soh keiyin hichu Solomon henga athot’in hitin aseitai, “Amite alungset jeh a Pakaiyin nang hi lengpa natun ahitan amaho chunga vaihoma napansah ahi,” tin asune.

Huram chun hi tin jong aseiye, “Pakai Israel Pathen chu nun nom hen, aman van le leiset asemin, David lengpa jong chapa chingtah khat ahinsah-e; achapa hi thil geltohna le hetkhenna apen, hijeh chun aman jong Pakai din houin khat sah din agon, ama dingin jong leng inpi khat sah doh din agoi.
Tun keiman mi khut themtah, thil hekhen them Huramabi kitipa hi kasolpeh-in,

ama hi Dan phunga peng chanute chate lah a numei khat chapa ahin, apa chu Tyre gama mi khat anahi. Hichepa Huramabi kitipa hi sana khenje, dangka khenje, sum-eng khenje leh thih khenje, song khenje kihil them a, thing thembolje jong them, chule ponsandup le ponsan-ao, pondum le tupatpon khonje jong thema, itobang thil kijem lim hijongleh them soh keiya ahin, akinganse pou pou boldoh jenga, hijeh chun napa David kapupa sohte toh pangkhoma natong themtah mi ahi.
Chuti ahijeh-in tun kapun naseisa suhlou chang le sakol chang hihen lang thaotwi le lengpitwi hijongleh nasohte ding hin hin thot jengin;

keihon Lebanon gama itobang thing hijongle nangma inthil dinga nadei chan chu hinsui uving ting, Joppa geiyin twikhanglen chunga pum chunga hintol jeng uvinge, chutileh nangman Jerusalem geiya nakilhoh tou thei ding ahitai,” ati.

Chutah chun Solomon in jong masanga apa David’in mijat kisimna anabol bang bangin Israel gamsunga cheng kholgam miho chu abonchauvin amijat asimsoh keiyin ahi: hichea hin mihem sang ja khat le sang som nga le sang thum toh, jagup jen akisimdoh-in ahi.

Mi hijat lah a hin mihem sang som sagi chu thilpoa pang din angansen, mihem sang som get chu thinglhang gama song kaldoh din akoiyin, mihem sang thum le jagup chu mipi natoh vetup’a aching diuvin akoitai.
Solomon chun Jerusalem khopia Moriah mol’a Pakai dingin houin asapantai; hiche Moriah mol chunga hi David deilhen mun Jebus mipa Oman changphol’a Pakai chu apa David henga anakilahsa ahiye.
Alengvaipoh joukal kum li lhin kum, lha ni lhin nan Solomon in houin asapanin ahi.
Solomon houin sah chu alet aneo hiti hi ahin, Pathen houin dia asah ahi : adung lam chu thilte-na aluiya akite leh tong som gup alhingin, avai lam tong som ni alhinge.
Houin kimlai tah amai hongcha jong chu tong som ni ahin, ain letdol chutoh akibangin ahi; asandol chu tong ja khat le som ni alhingin ahi. Insung lamse se chu sana thengsel’in aloijol sel’in ahiye.
Inkim laitah chu agol gol’in chah thing jeng apansah-in, abonchan sana thengsel’in atomsoh keiyin, achunga chun tumthing lim le khao kipheh lim asemin ahi.
Solomon in houin chu song mantam agol gol’in agolsoh keiyin ajempah-e; amanchah ji sana jong chu Parva’im gama hung kon sana jeng ahi.
Hiti hin houin chu ainkam jouse leh ahongcha dung jouse jong abang dung ahin, chule akotpi jouse gei geiyin sana jengin ajempah soh keiye; bang dunga chun Cherub te lim ajih pol soh keiyin ahi.

Solomon in houin sunga muntheng chungnung pen ding mun khat jong asemin, adung lam chu a-invai te bep ahin, tong som ni alhingin, avai lam jong tong som ni ma alhinge; abonchan sana talent jagup jenin aloijol’in atom lhah deh jenge, sana jong sana thengsel ahi;
thingkil’a kisem sana jeng jeng jong shekel khat’a pat shekel som nga geiyin agih cheh-in ahi. Chutengle indan chungnung jong chu sana ma man aloijol soh keiyin ahi.
Muntheng chungnung pen kiti laiya jong chun Solomon in thinga kisem Cherub ni lim akoiyin, anigel chun sanan atomjol soh keiye.

Cherub teni lhaving chu agomin tong som ni alhinge; cherub khat seh lhaving khat seh jong chu tong nga alhingin, alhaving lang khat chun bang aphan, chule alang khat lhaving jong tong nga ma ahin, cherub khatjopa lhaving lang khat aphai;
hiche cherub khatjoh lhaving lang khat jong chu tong nga ma ahin, inbang agaphan, alhaving lang jong tong nga ma alhingin, cherub masajo lhaving lang khat chutoh akimat lhonin ahi.
Hiche cherub teni lhavingse se chu agom gomin tong som ni lhingset’in agol’uvin ahi. Chule Cherub teni chu akengphang cheh-in ading lho-nin, inkimlai lam chu angat lhone.
Chutengle Solomon chun akhuna ding pon-sandup le pondum jong, asan-ao jong chule tupat ponnem jong akhonsah-in, hiche pon chunga chun cherub lim jeng asemsah-e.
Solomon in houin maiya chun khompi ni aphusah-in, khompi khat chu asan lam tong som thum le tong nga ngan alujum akihoipeh cheh-e.

Chuin Solomon in khivui tobangin sumkol asem-sah-in hiche ho chu khompi teni leh-vuma’ akhaisah-e; chujongle kolbuthei lim ja khat jen asemsah kit’in, hiche ho hi sumkol ho chunga chun akhaiyin abat’e.

Chule khompi teni chu houin maiya aphutdoh-in, khompi khat chu lhanglam a aphut’in, khatjoh jong chu sahlama aphutdoh-in ahi; lhanglama a-phudoh khompi joh chu amin Jachin asah-in chule sahlama aphudoh joh chu amin Bo’az asah-e.
Solomon in sum-eng maicham khat jong asemsah-in, adung tong som ni alhingin, avai tong som ni ma alhinge; asan lam tong som alhingin ahi.

Chu-jouvin twikong khat alhajol’in, akong chu abemin, agei lang khat’a pat alang gei chan chu tong som alhinge; chujongle asandol chu tong nga ahin, chule amai kimvel lhung keiyin thilte-na patjang tong somthum lhingset khat hi akikai lhungsoh keiyin ahi.

Anoiya chun umgui lim akisemin, twikong kimvel lhung kei-yin tong som thum sunga chun bong tobang gancha lim jeng akisem lhung keiye; hiche gancha lim kisem ho chu ni nin akigol’uvin, twikong akilhahjol pet’a kilhah tha ahitai.

Twikong chu bongchal som le ni chunga akiluiyin, bongchal thumin sahlam angan, bongchal thumin nilhum lang angan, bongchal thumin lhanglam angan chutengleh bongchal thum man niso lang angai; twikong chu hicheng bongchal lim kisem som le ni chunga hi kiluiyah ahin, abongchal ho chu atolam’uvin asung lam angat soh keiya ato le ato kipechet ahiuve.
Twi-kong asadan chu khutpeh te-jen alhingin, ageigol jongchu khon geigol kisem bangin akisemin, pahcha pah tobang ahi; atwi-kong hin twi te-na bath sang thum val adol’e

Solomon in mai-phetna kisilna dingin twi luina ding jong som khat jen asemsah-in, kot-lhang lama nga alui-in, sahlama jong nga ma aluiyin ahi. Hiche hoa hi pumgo thilto ding jouse kisop jia, chule twikong chu thempuhon kisilna aman jiu ahiye.
Chutengleh Solomon in akiseipeh bangin sana thaomei khom som khat asemin, abonchan houin sunga atungin, thaomei khom nga chu lhang lama atung-in, khom nga ma chu sah lama atunge.

Chujongle Solomon in dokhang som khat jong asemin, abonchan houin sunga ado-soh keiyin, dokhang nga lhanglama adon, dokhang nga ma chu sah lama adon ahi. Kisilna ding jong sana kong ja khat hel asemdoh-in ahi.

Thempuho din jong thutanna ding indan hongcha ahoipeh-in, indan len hongcha jong ahoipeh soh kei-yin, chule indan a din jong kotpi achang kham ahoipeh-e; chujouvin hiche kotpi chengse chu sum-eng jengin atomjol’in ahi.
Twikong chu houin lhanglam aningkoi laiya atungin ahiye.

Huram jong chun bel hole vutlo na khe ho toh, chule kisilna bel ho jong asemin ahi. Hiti hin Huram in Pathen houin sahna chung changa Solomon lengpa akithopina ding atoh ding dol jouse abonchan ajousoh tai.

Khompi teni jong asem jouvin, khon ho jong asem jouvin, khompi teni luvuma alujum teni jong ajoutan, chujongle khompi teni luvuma kitotson alujum lai teni chunga khon kisem teni khuna ding lencha pheh banga kipheh jeng jong chu ani nin asemdoh tan ahi;

hichea lencha pheh banga kipheh khompi teni lujum laiya kitotson khon teni khuna dinga kisem teni, akipheh khat cheh a pang ding, kolbuthei lim golni jen a kigol, lencha pheh a kipheh teni ding kolbuthei lim jali jenjong chu asem joutai.
Chuin akhomko hojong asemin, khomho chung-a chun kisilna kong som aluiyin,
chutengleh twikong asemin, twikong chu bongchal som le ni apohsah-in ahi.
Bel ho ahin, vutlo na khe hojong ahin, sum-khe kika ho jong ahin, hiti hin Solomon lengpa’n Pakai houin asahna dinga hin Huram’abi kitipa chun manchah ding ijakai asemsoh keitan ahi.
Thil kisem ho hi Jordan vadung phaiya Succoth le Zer’edah kikah a tolkeo lah a chu lengpan alhahjol thosoh hel ahi.
Athil-keo ho Solomon in thalhing tah a asem-soh kei ahin, hijeh chun sum-eng kimang mong mong jong agihdol tejou jai ahi-tapoi.
Pathen houin a manchah dinga kisem thil jouse chu Solomon in jong abonchan akoilut soh keiyin: sana maicham ahin, changlhah agol gola koina ding dokhang ho ahin,
akisem ding dol kiseipeh bang banga indan sung nung maiya kitunga mei detna ding sana thengsel’a kisem cheh thaomei khom chengse leh athaomei ho ahin,
pahcha ho ahin, thaomei ho ahin, sana thenga kisem cheiche ho jong ahin,

thaomei don chetanna bahche ahin, kisilna kong ho ahin, gimnamtui halnamna ding lheng ho ahin, chule khangbel ho jong ahin, hiche jong hi sana thenga kisem ahi; houin khomtodal tampi, muntheng chung nung pen kotpi phung dunga man ding le houin kimlai dung kotpi dunga man-chah ding jong chu sana theng jenga kisem ahisoh keiyin ahi.

Hiti hin Pakai houin sahna chung changa Solomon in atoh ding dol jouse chu abonchan atongsoh heltan ahi. Chuin Solomon chun apa David’in Pathena atodohsa thilkeo jouse chu ahinpo lut paiyin Pathen houin thil kholna dunga chun dangka jong sana jong chule man-chah umle bel abonchan akoisoh tai.

Solomon in Israel upate le phung upa chengse jong, Israel chate Iah a apu a au insung lhah cheh a lamkai jouse jong Jerusalem khopia akhomsoh keiyin, Zion kiti David khopia kona Pakai kitepna thingkong putdoh dingin angai-toi.
Hijeh chun Israel mite jong abon-chauvin lha sagi lhin nan lengpa angsunga golvah bol din ahung kikhom kimsoh keitauve.
Israel upate abonchauvin ahungun, chule Levi miten thingkong chu apu’uvin akipat tauve.
Chuin mihon thingkong le kikhopna ponbuh toh, chule ponbuh sunga manchah umle bel atheng jouse chu ahinpo touvun, hitobang hin thempuho leh Levi mihon abonchan apotou tauve.

Hichun Solomon lengpa leh amasanga hung kikhom Israel khoppi pumpi chu thingkong maiya chun akitit’uvin kilhaina dingin kelngoi tamtah le bongchal tampi athat’uvin, aganthau a tam behseh jeh-in ajat jong melchih jou jai leh simjou hoi ahipoi.
Hichun thempuhon Pakai kitepna thingkong chu akitunna ding mun, houin sunga indan sung nung, muntheng lai, muntheng chungnung pen kiti lai, cherub teni lhaving lim noiya chun ahinpu lut’uvin ahi.
Ijeh-inem itileh Cherub teni hin thingkong chunga hi alhaving teni ajah lhona ahileh thingkong dinga chu abuh lima pang lhona, akiputna moljol teni geiya jong alim noi lhona um-ah ahitai.

Moljol teni chu asao behseh jengin, among lam chu indan sung nung muntheng sunga konin jong akimupha peh nalaiye; ahinla polama konin vang akimudoh sam hih nai; tuni geiyin hiche moljol teni chu hikoma chun aumden jing nalai lhone.

Hiche thingkong sunga hin imacha dang aumpoi, Horeb molsanga Mose’n anakoi lut song pheng teni chubou um ahi: hiche laiya hi Pakaiyin Israel chate Egypt gamsunga kona ahung potdoh laiyuva kitepna anasempi ahi.
Koi koi loi hijeng jongu leh thempu hiche nikhoa hung lha tapou chu acham cham’uva kisutheng cheh ahiuvin, amaho hi munthenga kohin ahung potdoh tauve;

chule Levite lah a lathem jouse jong, Asaph, Heman, chule Jedu’thun le achapateu jong, ainkote jouseu jong abonchan tupat ponnem jengin akivon’uvin, khutbeh akichoi cheh-un, selangdah achoiyun, semjang jong akidop’uvin maicham niso lama anadingun, chutengle thempu ja khat le som ni jen jong sumkon mut’in anapangun ahi.

Hichea Pakai thangvahna le vahchoi chung changa hi mipi kitoh tah a apan tengleh sumkon mut’a pang hole lasa a pang ho hin aoginu mi ajah sah tei tei diu adol ahi. La ging tah a ahung kisah a, sumkon thongje jua akimut’a, khutbeh akibeh gingje jua, chule tumging thei manchah adang dang akisuh ging soh phat’in Pakai vahchoina din min, “Ajeh chu Pakai anun nemin, Alungset long louvin tonsot geiyin athoh-e,” tin aseiyuve. Chutah chun houin, Pakai houin chu meilhang ahung dimset tai;
hijeh chun meilhang ahung dim jeng phat’in thempuho jong houin kinbol din a pang ngam tapouve; ijeh-inem itileh Pakai loupina chu Pathen houin sung hung dimset-ah ahitai.
@@Solomon in thu aseitai, “Muthim lhangkhal kiheh laiya kachen ding ahi, Tin Pakaiyin anaseitai.
Atonsot geiya nangma chenna ding, Nang din keiman in loupi tah kasah peh tai,” ati.
Hichun Israel khoppi mipi abonchan ading toh chet’uvin, lengpa ahung kiheiyin mipi chu abonchauvin Israel khoppi pumpi chu phatthei aboh tai.
Hichea hin Solomon lengpa’n aseitai, “Pakai Israel Pathen chu nun nom hen, aman akamsung tah a kapa David jah a anaseisa chu akhut tah-in aguilhunsah tai; hichea hin aman anaseiyin hi tin ati,

‘Keiman kamite hi Egypt gama kona kahin puidoh nikhoa pat chun keima min kiphah jingna dingin Israel phung hijat lah a hin khopi dang khat’a khat jeng cha jong kalhen aumpon, chule kamite Israel chunga leng chang din jong mihem koima kalheng poi;
ahin keima min kiphah jingna din Jerusalem khopi bou kalhengin, chule kamite Israel chunga leng chang din David kalhenge,’ ati.
Hichea hin Pakai Israel Pathen min phah jingna dinga in khat sah doh ding hi kapa David lungthima ana cheng jingjeng e.
Ahinla Pakai chun kapa David jah a anaseiyin “Nalungthima hin keima min a houin khat sah din nagel jingjeng in, hiche nagel hi phavang apha lheh jeng nai;
ahivangin nangma tah hin hiche nagel houin hi nasah doh jou louhel ding ahin, nangman nahin ding nachapan keima min a hiche houin hi ahinsah doh ding ahibep nalaiye,’ ati.

Tuhin Pakaiyin athutepsa chu aguilhunsah tan ahi; ajeh chu keima kapa David khel’in kapang tan, Pakai thutep bang bangin Israel laltouna chunga katoutai; chujongle Pakai Israel Pathen minin keiman hiche houin chu kasadoh tan ahi.
Hiche houin sunga hin keiman Pathen thingkong chu katungdoh tai, athingkong sunga hi masang laiya Pakaiyin Israel chate toh kitepna anasemsa chu kikoiya ahiye,” ati.
Solomon chu Pakai maicham maiya Israel khoppi pumpi angsunga adingin akhut teni ajah doh jengin ahi.

Solomon in thuseimun khat jong hi sum-eng jengin asemdoh-in, tong nga asauvin, tong nga ma alenin ahi, hi chu asandol chu tong thum alhingin, hongcha indan sunga chun atungin ahiye; Solomon chu hiche chunga hi pansa a dingji ahi. Chujongle Israel khoppi pumpi angsunga akhup tenia pansa dilsua, akhut tenia van lam asana,

chutengle asei ahitai. “Vo Pakai Israel Pathen, nangma banga a-angsunga lhale jing alhachate dinga akitepna nit jing jenga, long louva lungset nei jing jeng thei hi van a hihen lang leiset’a hijongleh pathen dang aumpoi.
Nangin vang kapa David nalhachapa henga naphon dohsa chu nanit jing jenge; tah beh mongin nangman nakamsunga naseidohsa chu tulaiyin nakhut tah-in namolson ahi.

Hijeh chun tuhin vo Pakai Israel Pathen, nangman kapa David nalhachapa henga naseisa chu nit jingin; hichea chu hitia hi nasei ahi, ‘Keima angsunga Israel laltouna hung tou ding mihem hung lhasam louhel ding ahi, nangma chapaten lamjang ajot them’uva, keima danthu ajui themjinguva chule keima angsunga nangma umchan banga alhat le thei pouvu leh,’ nati ahi.
Hijeh chun tuhin vo Pakai Israel Pathen, nalhachapa David jah a naseisa chu abonchan sudet soh keiyin.

Ahivanginla leiset chunga Pathen chu mihem toh chengkhom mong ding hinam? Vetan, van le vanchung sangpen tah jong khun nangma nadol ponte; chuti ahileh keiman kasahdoh hiche houin hi iti neova neo ding hi tam!
Hijeng jong leh O Pakai ka-Pathen, nalhachapa keima taona le thumna hi neigel khoh peh tei teiyin, nalhachapa keima na angsunga kahung taona hi nei ngaipeh in;

chutileh asun ajana hiche houin hi namit tenia navet jing jenga, nangma min chensahna dinga nathutepna laiya chu namin nachensah jing thei ding ahin, chujongle nalhachapan hiche houin lam ngat’a taona ahin nei jong chu najah peh thei ding ahi.

Chule hiche mun lang ngat’a nalhachapa kei le namite Israel chate kahung tao tenguleh, nangman kathumu chu nei ngaipeh uvin, ahi nangman nachenna van a konin hin ngaiyin; chule najah tengleh ngaidam tan.
Mihem khattou achonset’a aheng akom douna thil abolset ham jeh a kihahsel sah dinga akikoi teng, ama chu hiche houin sunga maicham maiya hi kihahsel dinga ahung lut’a ahileh,

nangman van a konin hin ngaiyin lang thil hinbol jengin, nalhachate thu hintanpeh jengin, mithemmopa chu athepmona achunga chuhsah jengin mona pen lang vetsah-in, chule midihpa chu adihna dungjuiyin ama jong chu dihman pen lang vetsah tem in.
Namite Israelte hin nangma douna chonset abol’uva agalteu masanga gal alel tengleh ahung kihei kit’uva nangma min ahinpat jenguva hiche houin sunga hi taona le thumna aneiyuva ahileh,
nangman van a konin hin ngaiyin lang namite Israel chonsetna chu ngaidam jengin, chujongle nangin amaho leh apu apateu napehsa hiche gamsunga hin hinpui lut kit tan.

“Van kot akikha teng go ajuji tapoi, ijeh-inem itileh Israelte chu nangma douna chonseah ahitauve; hichea chu nangman nabol gim tengleh amahon achonset aphondoh uva naheng lama ahung kihei kit theiyuva namin pan a hikoma hi ahung tao tengu leh,

nangman van a konin hin ngaiyin namite, nalhachate Israel chonset hin ngaidamin, chule nangin amaho chu ache-na diu lampi pha nahil ding ahiuve; chujongle nangman hitia hi agoulo diuva namite napehsa gamsunga jong gotwi lhahsah dingin hin gon.

Israelte gamsunga hi kel ahung lhah a, gamna hise ham ahung lan a, thinglung ahung hat’a, thing jouse amota, khaokhote ham lungkangte ham ahung lan a ahijongleh; achennau khopi khatpen pen a hi amelmateuvin ahin umkhum jenguva, asunga chu gamna hise itobang ham ahung lan a, natna ito bang hijongleh ahung lan a ahileh;

taona itobang hihen lang itobang thumna hijongleh mihem khatseh taona hihen namite Israel mite apumpiuva ahung taovuva ahijongleh, mihem koi koi ahiya alungthim sunga agimna akihet’a hiche houin lam hi asana acholna dungjui cheh a ahung taova ahileh,

nangman nachenna van a konin hin ngaipeh-in lang, ngaidamin, ami tin ama ama lungput nahetpeh dungjui bang cheh chun thil hinbolpeh tei teiyin, alamlhah bang bangin bolpeh-in; ajeh chu mihem chate lungthim jouse hesoh nangma le le nahin, ahi;
chutileh Israel ten jong nangman apu apateu napehna hiche gamsunga achen laiseuva nangma nagin diu ahi.

“Hitobangma a chu namite Israel lah a mi hilou gamla tah a kona gamdang mi jong nangma min loupi ngaicha a nathahat lha-ngaiya, nahan thahat kitungdoh ngaicha a auma, hitobang mi chu ahunga hiche houin lam ngaa ahung taova ahijongleh,

nangman nachenna van a konin hin ngaiyin lang, hiche gamdang mipan nahenga adeiya athum chu athum bang bangin bolpeh tei teiyin; chutihen lang hileh leiset mitin vaipi hin nangma min hecheh intin, nangma nagin cheh diu, namite Israel ten abol bang banga abol diu ahi; chujongle keiman kasah doh hiche houin hi nangma mina kiminvo ahitai, ti jong ahetdoh thei diu ahi.

“Namite hi akidoupi agalteu toh kisat dinga hoikom lampi hijeng jongleh nangman nasolna lam lama acheuva, nangin nalhendohsa hiche khopi lam ngaa ahung taovuva, nangma min a kasahdohsa hiche houin lam hi ahin ngat’uva ahung taovu jongleh,
nangman van a konin ataonau le athil thumu ngaipeh tei teiyin lang, amaho dihna chu panpi tei teiyin.

“Mihem hi achonselou beihel ahijeh-in, ijemtia amaho jong nangma douna achonset’uva, hijeh a chu nang jong achunguva nalunghan a amelmateu khut’ a napeh doh a, hijeh a chu min gamla ham nailam ham khat’a gamchoma soh changa akaimang tengu jongleh,

min amaho soh changa akaimang nau gamsunga chu alungthim’uva kisihna aneiyuva alung akhel theiyuva, soh a hen mite gamsunga chu taona ahinneiyuva hitia hi asei theiyuva, ‘Keiho kachonseuvin adihlou lam le agilou lamin na katong tauve,’ tia aseiyuva,

asoh chan nau gamsunga chu alunggil pumpiu le alungthim jouseu akhel hel’uva, amaho gam lang ahinsan’uva ahung taovuva, apu apateu napehsa gam hi alha ngaiyuva, nalhentum khopi hi ahinsau’uva chule keiman namin a kasahdoh hiche houin hi angai chat’uva ahileh,
ataonau le athil thumu chu nangman nachenna van a konin hin ngaiyin lang, adihnau panpin, chule nangma douna chonse namite chu ngaidam jengin.
O ka-Pathen, tun hikom houin muna taona kiti pou pou hi namit tenin vejing jengin lang, na-nan ngai phan.

“Hijeh chun tun thouvin O PakaiPathen, Nacholdo mun kijot tan, Nangma nahin Natha hatna thingkong ahin, Vo Pakai Pathen, nangma dia thempua pang ho hin Huhhingna ponsil bangin kisil’uhen; Chutengle nangma phatna jal’in, Namithengte kipasah jing jengin.
Vo Pakai Pathen, Nathao nusa lengpa mai heimang hih-in; Nalhachapa David dinga Nalungset longlou chu geldoh jing jengin,” ati.
Solomon in ataona achaisoh phat’in van a konin meikong ahung leng lhan pumgo thilto le kilhaina gantha ho chu akavamsoh keiyin, chule Pakai loupina chu houin sung adimset jengin ahi.
Pakai loupina chu Pakai houin sung adimset jeng phat’in thempuho jeng jong jong Pakai houin sunga alut ngam tapouve.

@@Meikong ahung lenlhah a chule houin chunga Pakai loupina ahung ki-ngah jeng chu Israel chaten amudoh phat’uvin leitol songnal kiphacham chunga akun cheh uvin amai tola asulut cheh-un Pakai chu chibai aboh-uvin athangvah nan hitin aseiyuve, “Pakai chu anun neme; Ajeh chu alungset long louvin tonsot’in athoh-e,” atiuvin ahi.
Chutah chun lengpa le mipin abonchauvin Pakai angsunga kilhaina gantha thilto abol’uvin ahi.

Kilhaina gantha a pang din Solomon lengpa’n bongchal sang som ni le sang ni toh kelngoi sang ja khat le sang som nijen atoh doh jengin ahi. Hitobang hin lengpa le mipin abonchauvin Pathen houin chu athensotauve.

Thempuho jong apan mun cheh a adinguvin, Pakai thangvah tengleh mut ging, tumging dinga David lengpa semdoh Pakaiya lasah teng leh tumging thei manchah jouse jong chu Levi ten akichoisoh keiyuvin ahi. Ajeh chu Pakai lungset longlou hin itih chan geiya athoh jinga, ama kinbolna dinga David chun aitih chan a jong avahchoi jing jeng ahi; amaho maikoh don tah a chun thempuhon sumkon ahinmut ginguvin ahi, chutengleh Israel pumpi chu abonchan ading soh keiyuve.

Solomon in houin maiya leitol kimlai lung jong chu athensoi; ijeh-inem itileh Solomon in asemdoh sum-eng maicham chun pumgo thilto jouse leh lhosoh thilto toh chule sathao thilto chengse chu adollou phat’a hikom joh a hi aman pumgo thilto le chamna thilto sathao thilto chengse chu atodoh joh ahitai.

Hichepet hin Solomon in ni sagi sungin kut anabol’in, hichea hin Hamath kho lang chelutna pat Egypt a vadung geiyin mipi khoppi nasa tah ahung kikhomdoh uvin, chule Israel pumpin ama chu aop’uvin ahi.
Niget lhin nin mihon thengsel’in khoppilen abol’uvin ahi; ijehinem itileh amahon ni sagi sunga maicham thenso kut abol’uva, chule hiche ni sagi sungma maa chu kut jong anabol’u ahiye.

Lha sagi lhinna nikho som ni le nithum lhin nin Solomon in mipi chu Pakaiyin David le Solomon chule amite Israel chunga aphatna jouse ahetsah-in alungthimu kipah thanom seuvin ama ama inlam cheh a anungsol soh keiyin ahi.

Solomon chun hitobang hin Pakai houin le lengpa leng inpi chu asajou tai; Solomon in Pakai houin sunga tohdoh dinga agot jouse leh ama leng inpi dinga angaito jouse a bon chan bulhingset’in asan amolso soh keitai.

Chujouvin anivei lhin nan Solomon henga Pakai jan laiyin ahung kilah kit’in ajah a aseitai, “Keiman nataona kasang tai, chujongle hiche houin mun hi keima henga kilhaina gantha kibolna ding mong monga kalhendoh ahitai.
Keiman van kot kakha a gotwi ajuh lou teng ham, ahilouva ahijongle khaokhote kalha a gamsung bahgam dinga kasol teng ham, ahilou jongleh kamite lah a gamna hise kalhahsah phat leh,

keima min a kikousa kamite chu ahung kineosah theiyuva taona aneiyuva hitia hi keima angsung ahinhol theiyuva, athilse bolnauva kona akihei manguva ahileh, keiman jong van a kona kahin ngaiya achonset nau ka-ngaidam ding chule agamsungu kadamsah a kaphatsah ding ahi.
Tua hi hiche houin a taona hung kimang jouse chu keiman kavet jing jenga chule ka-ngaipeh jing jeng ding ahi.

Chule tua hi keima min hikoma akiminphah jing jeng theina dinga keiman hiche houin hi kalhendoh a kathenso ahitai, aitih chan a kamin cheng jing ding ahi; phatseh a kamit tenia kavet jing jenga kalungthima kagel jing jeng ding ahi.

Chule nangma thudola vang hin napa David umchan banga nang jong keima angsunga nalhatle jing jenga, keiman nangma kathupeh jouse dungjuiya nabol’a, keima chondan jouse leh kachonna dan jouse nanit jinga ahileh,

ken jong napa David toh kitepna kanei banga chu nangma laltouna kaphudet peh ding ahi, ama jah a chu hitia kaseisa ahi, ‘Nangma dinga Israelte vaipoh peh ding mihem hung bei louhel ding ahi,’ tia kasei ahiye.

“Amvang nang ho hi nakihei manguva keima chondan jouse leh kathupeh chengse, nangma masanga kakoipeh ho hi nasuhmil’uva, nache mang uva pathen lim kisemthuho pou nahou uva, hitobang thilpi chu chibai naboh uva ahileh,

keiman jong nang ho hi kapehsa gamsunga kona thingga kiloulha banga kalo-lhah uva, keima min dinga kathensosa hiche houin jong hi keima mitmu phah a kona kapaidoh ding, muphah louva kakoiya, thuchih khat a kasemdoh ding ahi,

chujongle tua loupi tah a kibol hiche houin jeng jong hi mihem ajotpa jousen adatmoa, hitia asei ding, ‘Ipi dinga Pakaiyin hiche gamsung le hiche houin hi hitobang lom loma abolset jeng hitam?’ tia asei diu ahi.

Chujongle mihon seiyuvin tin, ‘Israelten Egypt gamsunga kona apu apateu hinpuidoh apu apateu Pakai Pathen chu adalhah jenguva, pathen kisemthu adang dang joh akolchah uva, hiche ho chu chibai aboh uva chule ahoujeh uva, Pakaiyin jong hiche achonset jal’uva chu hitobang thilse hi achunguva alhut khum ahitai,’ tia asei diu ahi,” tin aseitai.
Solomon chun ainsah Pakai houin le ama leng inpi akisah joukal kum som ni nungin,
Huram in ama anapeh khopi lui chengse chu Solomon in abonchan asapha kit’in, hiche khopi chengsea chun Israel chate achensah-in ahi.
Solomon chu Zobah gama Hamath khopi sat din akonin ahileh akhopi chu ajouvin alatai.
Solomon in gamthip noiya Tadmor khopi jong asan, chule Hamath khopia chun khopi thil kholna ding jong tamtah asan ahi.
Beth-hor’on kho chungnungjo leh Beth-hor’on kho noi nungjo jong asadoh-in, akhopi teni chu kulpi akaikhumin, apal agenin, kelkot tampi ahoiyin, kelkotgol achang kham cheh asempeh-e;

chujongle Solomon hin Ba’alath khopi leh Solomon sepaite akoina khopi jouse jong asan, akangtalai jouse akoina ding khopi tamtah jong asan, chule asepaite sakol touthem ho chenna ding khopi tamtah jong asan, Solomon chun aleng gamsunga ipi tobang hijongleh asah nom chan Jerusalem khopi sung hihen lang Lebanon gamsung hijongleh akisahjengin ahi.
Israel mi hilou mihem jat dang ahingdoh amoh chengse chu Hit mite ahiuvin, Amor mite ahiuvin, Periz mite ahiuvin, Hivi mite ahiuvin chule Jebus mite ahiuvin,
ama ama chilhah a kona Israel ten suhmang louva ahoidoh uva, gamsunga umden amoh ho chu Solomon in engbolna kai akidon nan, tuni geiyin amaho chu acheng cheng nalaiyuve.

Israel chate vang chu Solomon in jong soh natoh atohsah khah poi; amaho chu sepaiyin apanguvin, avaibol din apanguvin, sepai kangtalai tol ho lamkaiyin apangun, chule asakol louthem ho lamkaiyin jong apanguvin ahi.
Solomon dinga vaibol pipua pang miho chu ja ni le som nga alhinguvin, mipi chunga amaho hin thanei tah-in vai ahom jiuve.

Pharaoh chanu dinga David khopi sunga leng inpi asahpehna laiya jong chu Solomon in Pharaoh chanu chu ahinpui lut jengin ahi, ajeh chu Solomon in hitin aseiye, “Israel lengpa David insunga chu kajinu cheng thei louhel ding ahi: ijeh-inem itileh Pakai thingkong kipoh lutna mun jouse chu muntheng jeng ahitai,” a tin ahi.
Solomon chun hongcha maiya Pakai dinga maicham asemdoh, hiche maicham chunga chun Pakai henga dingin pumgo thilto tampi atoh-in ahi,

hiti hin niseh a to ding lom kiseisa akindol’in abol jin, Mose thupeh dungjuiyin cholngah nikho dunga to ding lom atoh-in, lhathah nikho dunga tolom atoh jin, kumvan lhah a kibol jing kut thum ho jong chu akindola tolom atoh jin ahi, cholsolou changlhah ahin, hapta ta a kimang kut jong ahin, chule houbuh kut jong ahi.

Apa David chonna dan dunguiyin akina pang din Solomon in thempuho jong aloi loiyin ahom khenin, ani nia bol lou khoh dungjui yin akin toh bep bep’a din thempuho masanga thangvahna le natoh kinbolna pang dingin Leviho jong ahomkhen soh hel’e; chutengleh kelkot ngah ho jong chu kelkot chujatpi ngah dingin aloi loiyin ahomkhen in, hitobang hin abolsoh keiye; ijehinem itileh Pathen mipa David chun thu apehsa ahitai.
Chuteng jongleh miho chu ipi pi thudol hihen goule nei chinna thil kikholna thudol hijongleh, lengpa’n thempuho leh Levite athupeh bangin abol’uvin, don louvin akoiyun akiheimang deh pouve.
Hitobang hin Solomon natoh ainsah chu Pakai houin ain-mun akigondoh nikhoa pat akisah jou chan geiyin abonchan akijousoh hel tai. Hiti hin Pakai houin jong chu akisajouvin ahi.
Solomon chu Edom gamsunga Ezion-geber khopi le Eloth khopi geiyin achepeh jengin twikhanglen pang agaphai.

Hichun Huram in jong Solomon dingin ama kong innei ho phabep, ama sepaiten atolle thei chu atolsah-in asoltai, asepaite chu twikhanglen a leng ngaisa ahiuvin, Solomon sepaite chutoh akilhon’uvin Ophir geiyin akitol tauve; hikoma hin sana talent ja li le som nga agaholdoh uvin, chuin Solomon lengpa henga ahinpo lut tauve.

Sheba lengnun Solomon minthan kithang ajah doh phat’in thu hahsa sa doh a Solomon patep din Jerusalem a ahungin, gou tamtah ahinpon, gimnamtui tamtah le sana atama tam toh chule song mantam tampi sangongsao honte ahinpohsah-in ahi. Lengnu chu Solomon heng ahung lhun phat’in alungthim sunga agel jouse kiphalam louhel’in ngam tahin Solomon jah a aseidoh soh hel’e.
Ahinla Solomon in lengnu thudoh jouse chu abonchan adonbut soh keiyin ahi, amanu ahilchet theilou akiselguh a Solomon in adatmo thil imacha cha aumpoi.
Sheba lengnun Solomon chihna amudoh a, ainsah doh avet a,

a-ankong phunga anneh amua, avaibol athuseite chenna amudoh a, asohte kisah lel amua, asohte ponsil nih chen avet’a, alengpitwi donna khon dom a pang ho amudoh a, aponsil jouseu avet’a, Pakai houin a atodoh ji pumgo thilto jat amua ahileh Sheba lengnu chu sa-lhamin athapai ding ahitai.
Sheba lengnun Solomon lengpa jah a aseitai, “Thu kithang chu adih tai, nangma chihna le naum chan thudol hi keiman kagam sunga kaum laiya kajahsa ahi;

ahivangin hiche lai hin keiman katahsan joupon, kahunga kamit te mong monga kamuchet soh masangsen thu kithang chu kanatahsan poi; ahinla vetan, miho chun nangma chihna natsat dol hi akeh khat jeng cha jong einaseipeh lou laiyu ahibouve; keiman kajah thu kithang sangin jong nangma natahsa tah hin nagiljon nanasajoi.
Najite jong anun nom ahiuve! Nangma angsunga ding jingjenga aphatseh a nachihna thusei ngai jing nasohte jong anun nom ahiuve!

Pakai na-Pa then dinga leng changa hiche laltouna natousah nompa Pakai na-Pathen chu nun nom hen! Ipijeh-inem itileh naPathenin Israelte angailun, amaho hi atonsot geiya kiling kit lou dia aphudet ding, chutengleh amaho chunga nang hi leng nahisah a, hitobanga hi nangman thu adih lama natanpeh theiya adih nalensah ding adei ahi,” ati.

Chujouvin lengnun jong lengpa chu sana talent ja khat le som ni apen, gimnamtui atama tam jong apen, song man tam tamtah jong apei; hichea Sheba lengnun Solomon lengpa anapeh hitobang gimnamtui hi anaum lou ahi.
Hicheng kalval jong hin Huram lengpa sepaite leh Solomon lengpa sepaite Ophir gama sana hinpo ho chun algum thing le song mantam jong tampi ahinpo lut’uvin ahi.

Hiche algum thing ho hin lengpa’n jong Pakai houin le leng inpia ding kalbi asemin ahi, chujongle lathem miho manchah din semjang khum le selangdah khumin jong aseme; hitobang thilsem ho hi masanga chu Judah gamsunga kimudoh kha lou lai hel anahi.
Solomon lengpan Sheba lengnu chu adeichan apen, lengpa dinga ahinpoh peh tilou thil dang dang chu adeichan akithumin ahi. Chuin amanu jong akihei kit’in asohte akipuiyin agam langa achekit tai.
Kum khat sunga Solomon henga hunglut mong mong sana chu agih jat sana talent jagup le som gup le gup alhingin
hichea hi kiveiya akoi thiljoh le thilchoa pang ho hinpoh lut kisimtha loulai ahi; Arabia gam lengte jouse leh gamsunga gamvaipo jousen jong Solomon din sana le dangka ahinpo po jenguvin ahi.
Solomon lengpa’n sana kikheng lum lentah tah ja ni jen aseme: hiche lum khat semna ding hin sana shekel jagup gup alut’in ahi.
Chule lum mai mai ja thum jong sanan akhengin, lum khat chunga sana shekel ja thum cheh akheng jouve; lengpa’n lum hijat hi Lebanon gammang thinga kisadoh inpi sunga chun akhol’in ahi.
Lengpan laltouna lentah khat jong saihan asemin, hichu sana thengsel’in aloijol sel’e.

Hiche laltouna kalbi gup akidon, atoupha lai jong sana ahin, atouna le alaltouna chu kisolmat ahi; chule touna jet le veiya ban ngapna akibol cheh-in, hiche ban ngapna teni maiya chun sakei bahkai lim khat cheh akisemin ahi.

Laltouna chun abon bonin sakei bahkai som le ni lim akisemin ading soh keiyuve, kalbi gup chu among langtoa sakei bahkai khat cheh kidinsah ahiye. Koimacha lenggama hitobang laltouna hi akisem kha hih laiyin ahi.

Solomon lengpa twi donna khon jouse jong sana a kisem jeng ahin, chule Lebanon gammang thinga kisadoh inpi sunga kimang khon jouse jong aboncha sana theng tah cheh ahi; Solomon khang laiyin dangka chu imachan akigelpoi.

Ijeh-inem itileh Solomon lengpa kong innei ho jong chu Tarshish langa Huram lengpa sohte toh kitol thauva, kum thum alhin phat phat leh Tarshish kong inneiho chu hung jiuva sana le dangka, saiha le guldute toh chule vahongchal tampi pi ahinpoh lut jiu ahi.
Hitobang tah hin Solomon lengpa’n leiset lengte jouse abonchauvin haona le chih nan akho khel tai.
Leiset leng jousen jong Solomon um umna ahinhol hol jenguvin, Pathenin alunggila akhumpeh achihna thu ngai din ahol jiuve.

Ahung tapouvin thilpeh ding ahinchoiyun, thil chu dangka jong, sana jong, ponsil jeng jong ahin, galvon jong, gimnamtui jong, sakol jong, sakolpol jong ahin, akumseh leh thilpeh atama tam ahung kipoh lut peh jin ahi.

Solomon hin sakolte ding leh kangtalai ho din buh sang li jen aneiyin, sakol touthem mihem sang som le sang ni aneiye; amaho hi kangtalai kimanna khopi dunga atousahin, Jerusalem khopia lengpa koma jong atousah-e.
Chujongleh Solomon hin Euphrates luipi dunga pat Philistine gamsung gei, Egypt gamgi chan geiyin leng jouse chunga vai anahomin ahi.
Solomon lengpa’n Jerusalem khopi sunga dangka chu song kileh thang abahsah jengin, chule cedar thing jong phai dunga theipi thing thalhin bangin atha lhinsah jenge.
Chule mihon Solomon dingin Egypt gama kon leh gamdang danga konin sakolte agatol tol jenguvin ahi.

Solomon thilbol anatoh amoh chengse, apatna kipat achaina geiya Nathan themgaopa thusimbu leh Shilon mi Ahijah gao thuseina lekhabua, chule Nebat chapa Jerobo’am chung chang thua mitva neipa Iddo kitipa mu aneina thu kijihna chu kisun soh keijah hilou ham?
Solomon hin Jerusalem khopia kum som li sungin Israel pumpi chunga lengvai anapoi.
Chujouvin Solomon jong apu apate toh akijam khomin, apa David khopia avuitauve; chuphat’in achapa Rehobo’am chun ama khel’in lengvai apotai.
Rehobo’am leng chansah dinga Israel pumpi Shechem khoa ahung kikhop phat’uvin Rehobo’am jong Shechem khoa achetai.
Solomon lengpa ginna jamdoh a Egypt gama thampa Nebat chapa Jerobo’am chun hiche thu hi Egypt’a aumna ajadoh tan, hijeh chun Egypt gama konin Jerobo’am jong ahung kile kit tai.
Chuin mihon mi phabep asol’uvin Jerobo’am chu agakousah uvin, hijeh chun Jerobo’am leh Israel phung pumpi ahunguvin Rehobo’am henga ahung seitauve,

“Napan keiho poh hahsa tah einapoh sah-uvin ahi. Hijeh chun tun nangman napa semdoh keiho chunga um pohgih hahsa le toh hahsa hi jangkhai domin neisempeh tauvin, chutileh keihon nangma kin jeng kaboljom jing diu ahinai,” atiuve.
Rehobo’am in jong amaho jah a hin aseiyin, “Nithum sungin kahenga hung kit tauvin,” tin aseipeh-in; hijeh chun miho chu akijot mang tauvin ahi.

Rehobo’am hin upa chengse akihoupin ahi, hiche ho hi apa Solomon ahin laiya amasanga anading jing mi jeng ahiuve; amaho jah a hin, “Hiche miho hi iti kadonbut pen ding hitam neihil tem’uvin,” tin aseiye.

Upahon jong Rehobo’am jah a aseipeh uvin, “Nangman hiche mite henga hi khotona naneiya, nalung lhaisah a chule thupha pha na-seiya ajah uva nahoulim theiya ahileh, amaho hi aitih chan geiya jong nangma lhacha pang ding ahiuve,” atipeh tauvin ahi.
Ahinla Rehobo’am chun upahon ahilna angaipon, amagol akhang kibahpi, ama masanga ding ho chutoh akihouvin amaho seijoh alatai.
Hiche ho jah a hi hitia anasei ahi, “Hiche mite, ‘Napan kei ho chunga pohgih akoi hi jangkhai domin semin,’ tia hung seiho hi keiman iti kadonbut ding hitam, neihil tem’uvin?” ati ahi.

Hichun amatoh hung seilet tha khangdong ho chun ajah a aseiyuvin, “Nangman hiche mite, ‘Napan keiho pohgih tah einasempeh uvin ahi, nangin vang jangkhai domin semin: tia hung seiho jah a hi hitia naseipeh ding, aj’ah uva hitia hi nasei ding, ‘Keima khutjung kamecha hi kapa khelbuh teni sanga jong lenjo nalai ahi.

Hijeh chun tun kapan nangho chunga pohgih anakoina chunga hi keiman napohgih kabepeh diu ahi. Kapan nasuh khel nauva sakol jepna khaova najep jiu ahin, ken vang thih tenggol pahmuma kajep diu nahiuve,’ tin donbut tan,” atiuve.
Nithum lhin nin Jerobo’am leh mipi abonchauvin Rehobo’am henga ahung tauve; hichea hin lengpa’n aseipehin, “Nithum lhin ni leh kahenga hung kit tauvin,” anati.
Ahung phat’uvin lengpan ophoh bel bul’in anadonbut tan, upahon ahilna asuhmil del jengin,

amaho jah a chun Rehobo’am lengpan khangdong hon ahilna bang bangin aseiyin hitin ati. “Kapan napohgih-u chu gihsa tah a anasem ahin, hichea chu keiman kakoibe kit nah lai ding ahibouve; nakhel tenguleh kapan sakoljepna khaova najep jiu anahin, ken vang thih tenggol pahmuma kajep diu nahiuve,” atitai.

Hiti hin lengpan mipi thu angai tapoi; ijeh-inem itileh hiche thilsoh hi Pakaiyin masang laiya Ahijah kitipa Shilon mi khat amanchah a Nebat chapa Jerobo’am henga thu anaseisa chu amolso theina dinga Pathenin athil hi ahin sosah joh ahitai.

@@Israel phung miten abonchauva athuseiyu lengpa’n asanpeh dau chu amudoh phat’uvin, mipin abonchauvin lengpa chu adonbut’uvin hitin aseiyuve, “David koma keihon chan ipi kaneiyu vam? Jesse chapa koma keihon goulo ding kanei pouve, Vo Israel phung naponbuh cheh kijot tauvin! David nangin jong tun na-insung kivet tan,” atiuve. Hijeh chun Israel phung miten abonchan aponbuh lam cheh akijotsoh keiyuvin akitoldoh tauve.
Ahivangin Judah gamsung khopi dunga cheng den nalai Israel phung mite chunga chun Rehobo’am lengvaipon apang nalaiyin ahi.

Rehobo’am lengpan engbolna natoh vaipoa pang Hador’am kitipa chu asol’in ahileh, mipin amapa chu songin anasep lih tauve. Chuphat’in Rehobo’am lengpa jong chu Jerusalem langa jam din akangtalai chunga akaldoh loi jengin ahi.
Hijeh chun tuni geiyin Israel phung hin David insung dounan kiphinna gal abol jing jenguvin ahi.

Rehobo’am chu Jerusalem khopi ahung lhun phat’in Judah insung mite abonchan akhomin, chule Benjamin phunga mite jong akhop’a ahileh mihem Israelte toh kisat a Rehobo’am dinga lenggam nung semdoh kit thei, lhentum gal-hang cheh sang ja khat le sang som get alhinguve.
Ahin hichea hin Pakaiyin Pathen mipa Shemai’ah henga thu ahinseiyin hi tin ati,
“Nangmim Judah lengpa, Solomon chapa Rehobo’am leh Judah gamsunga leh Benjamin gamsunga Israel pumpi jah a seipeh temin lang hitin tin,

‘Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, Nangho nakon’uva nasopiteu douna gal nagabol thei louhel diu ahi. Mihem ama ama inlam cheh a kile kit jenguvin; ajeh chu hiche thilsoh hi keiya hung kondoh ahibouve,’ tin aseiye gatin,” ati. Hijeh chun mihon jong Pakai thusei angaiyuvin, akinung le kit’uvin Jerobo’am kisatpi dingin akon tapouve.
Rehobo’am chu Jerusalem khopia achengin, kihuhna dingin Judah gamsunga khopi tampi asadoh-in ahi.
Hichea Rehobo’am in khopi asahdoh ho chu: Bethlehem, Etam, Teko’a,
Bethzur, Soco, Adullam,
Gath, Mare’shah, Ziph,
Adora’im, Lachish, Aze’kah,
Zorah, Ai’jalon, chule Hebron ahiuvin, aboncha hi Judah gam le Benjamin gamsunga kulpi kikaikhum khopi jeng ahiuvin ahi.
Rehobo’am in kulpi galpal jong det tah tah-in asemin, akhosunga chun sepai lamkai ho atousah soh keiyin, anneh ding akholpeh-in, thaotwi jong lengpitwi jong akoipeh soh keiyin ahi.
Hiche khopi dung jousea hin lum le tengcha tampi pi akoiyin, akhopi jouse chu det tah tah-in asem e; hitobang hin Rehobo’am chun Judah gamsung le Benjamin gamsung anapon ahi.
Israel gamsunga cheng thempuho leh Levi mite jousen jong achenna gam adalhauvin Rehobo’am heng ajontauve.

Ijeh-inem itileh Levite jong chun neilhanga aneiyu agamu leh aneiyu athilkeo jouseu adalhah soh keiyuva Judah gam, Jerusalem khopia hung ahitauve. Ijeh inem itileh Jerobo’am leh achapaten amaho Pakai thempua apan nauva kona akaidoh gamsih seh-u ahitai.
Jerobo’am hin khomol dunga doiphung dunga pang ding leh mikel doi kisemthu houna dinga pang ding, chule bongnou lim doi asemthu houna pang din thempu acham chamin akilhen thun ahi.

Hijeh chun mihem alungthima Pakai Israel Pathen ngaicha a hol jouse, Israel phung tin a konin thempuho nunga ahung kitol’uvin, Jerusalem khopia Pakai apu apateu Pathen henga kilhaina gantha that din ahung tauve.

Amaho hin Judah gama kivaipohna lenggam atilkhou chom lheh jenguvin, kum thum sungin Solomon chapa Rehobo’am jengjong lung mongin achendet sah tauve; ajeh chu amaho hi kum thum sunga David le Solomon chon banga chonjom jing ahiuvin ahi.
Rehobo’am kitipa hin David chapa Jer’imoth kitipa chanu Ma’halath chu aji din akipuiye; amanu hi Jesse chapa Eli’ab kitipa chanu Ab’ihail kitinu chanu ahiye.
Hichenu hin Rehobo’am chu chapa thum Je’ush le Shemari’ah toh chule Zaham ahinpeh-in ahi.
Hichenu ban kit’a jong hin Ab’salom chanu Ma’acah kitinu jong akipuibe kit’in, aman jong Abi’jah le Attai toh, Ziza, chule Shelo’mith ahinpeh-e.

Rehobo’am chun ajite dang jouse sang leh athaikem ho jouse sangin jong Ab’salom chanu Ma’acah kitinu hi alungset penin ahi; ji mong mong som le get aneiyin, thaikem somgup aneiye; chutengle chapa som ni le get ahingin, chanu jong somgup ahinge.
Rehobo’am in Ma’acah chapa Abi’jah kitipa chu asopite pasal chengse lah a apipun apansah tai; ijeh-inem itileh ama hi leng chansah dinga agot masah ahitan ahi.

Chule Rehobo’am hin ching thei tah-in na atongin, achapate chengse chu Judah gam le Benjamin gamsunga gamkai jousea ahomthang soh hel’in, kulpi kikaikhum khopi jousea atousah soh keiye; chujongleh achapate chu neh le chah thalhingset’in akoipeh-in, aji diu jong apuipeh soh keiyin ahi.
Rehobo’am vaihomna akiphudet soh a chule atha ahatdoh phat’in Rehobo’am chun Pakai danthu asumiltan, chule Israel pumpin ama nung ajuitauve.
Rehobo’am leng chan kal kum nga lhin kumin amaho Pakaiya akitah loujeh uvin Egypt lengpa Shishak kitipa chu Jerusalem khopi dou din ahung kontouvin,

kangtalai sang khat le ja ni ahinpuiyin, sakol touthem cheh sepai sang somgup toh ahung kilhonin ahi. Chule Shishak toh kilhona Egypt gama kona hung kitol mipi chu ajat simjou louhel ahiuve, amaho chu Libya mite jong, Suk’ki-im mite jong chule Ethopia mite jong ahiuvin ahi.
Shishak hin Judah gamsunga kulpi kikaikhum khopi phabep jong ahinlan, Jerusalem khopi geiyin ahung kitoltou tai.

Hichun themgao Shemai’ah chu Shishak ginna Jerusalem khopia kikhom, Rehobo’am le Judah gamsunga milen milalte henga ahungin ajah uva ahung seitai, “Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, ‘Nang hon keima neidalhah jeh uva ken jong nang ho hi Shishak khut’a lut dia kadalhah nahitauve,’ tin aseiye,” ati.
Chutah chun Israelte milen milal jouse leh lengpa chu amaho le amaho akineosah jenguvin aseitauve, “Pakaiyin adih aseiye.” atiuvin ahi.

Amaho le amaho akineosah jengu chu Pakaiyin amudoh phat’in Shemai’ah henga Pakaiyin thu ahinseiyin hitin ati, ‘“Amaho le amaho akineosah jeng jeh-u hin keiman amaho hi sumang taponge, akihuhdohna diu them khat kapeh a, Jerusalem khopi chunga jong kalunghanna kisung lut louding, Shishak khut’a keima lunghanna kitongdoh lou ding ahitai.
Hijongleh Israelte hi Shishak soh a pang diu ahi, chutileh keima kinbol dol leh gamdang dang mite leng ho kinhol dol akibah louna ahetdoh thei dingu ahi,” ati.

Shishak, Egypt lengpa chu Jerusalem sat din ahung kontoutai; aman Pakai houin sunga thil kikhol chengse leh leng inpia kikhol thilkeo jouse abonchan akilah tai; hi tin aman thil ijakai abonchan akichomdoh soh hel’in ahi. Shishak hin Solomon semsa sana lum jouse jong akilah tan ahiye.
Hiche sana lum ho khel ding hin Rehobo’am lengpa’n sumeng lum akiseme; hiche ho hi leng inpi kotngah a pang, kotngah vaipoa pang sepai vaibolte khut’a apen angasah tai.

Lengpa chu Pakai houin sunga alut phat phat leh kotngah a pang sepaihon hiche lum ho hi akipoh jiuva hung ji ahiuve; chujou tengleh ahin nungpoh kit jiuva kotngah a pang ho indan sunga chu akoi jiu ahiye.
Rehobo’am chu ama le ama aki-ngaitom phat’in achunga konin Pakai lunghanna akitol mangin, asumang hel tapoi; ahivangin hicheng tilouvin jong Judah gamsunga mi umchan khan chah apha tapoi.

Rehobo’am lengpa vang chu ama cham chamin Jerusalem khopia chun akitungdet jengin, lengvai apo ponai. Lengvaipoa ahung pan hin Rehobo’am chu akum kum som li le khat alhing tai; chujouvin Pakaiyin Israel phung namkim lah a alhendoh a amin achensahna Jerusalem khopi sunga hin kum som le kum sagi sungin lengvai anapoi. Anu chu amin Na’amah akitin, Ammon mi numei ahi.
Rehobo’am hin alungthima Pakai aholloujeh-in thilse jeng jeng anabole.

Rehobo’am natoh athilbol, akipatna pat achaina gei hi adang dang aboncha Shemai’ah themgaopa thusimbu leh Iddo mitva neipa thusimbua kijih lutsoh keijah hilou ham? Rehobo’am le Jerobo’am kah a kitomona alengin gal akisat sat jengin ahi.
Chuin Rehobo’am jong apu apate toh akijam khomin, David khopia avuitauve; chujouvin achapa Abi’jah kitipan ama khel’in lengvai apotai.
Jerobo’am lengpa leng chan kal kum som le kum get lhin kumin Abi’jah chu Judah gama lengvaipon ahung pang pantai.
Abi’jah hi Jerusalem khopia kum thum sungin lengvaipon apange. Anu chu amin Micai’ah akitin Gib’e-ah khoa U’riel kitipa chanu ahi. Abi’jah le Jerobo’am kah ajong kitomo aumin gal akisat sat kit tai.

Abi’jah hin sepai gal-hang lhentum mihat cheh sang ja li akipuiyin galmuna gal sat din akontai; chule Jerobo’am jong chun Abi’jah dou dingin sepai lhentum mihat gal-hang cheh sang ja get analoiyin, galmuna anakigol tauve.
Hichun Abi’jah jong Ephraim gama Zemara’im molsanga adingin aseitai, “Vo Jerobo’am leh Israel pumpi kasei ngaiyuvin!
Pakaiyin leng hitheina hi David anapehsa ahitai, ti nang hon nahet louvu ham? Hiche athilpeh hi suhkeh thei louhel kitepna khat ahibouve.
Ahinla hichea hin Nebat chapa Jerobo’am kiti khat, David chapa Solomon lhachapa khat hi ahung kiphinin apupa dounan gal ahinboltai;

hichea hin pannabei le mi manmo cheh phabep jong ama henga akikhom’uvin apanpiuve; hichun amaho hin Solomon chapa Rehobo’am hi agol-lhan lai, ima bolje ahet masangin asu-noh phah-uvin, hijeh chun amaho chu anang jou tapoi.

“Chule tunjong David chapate khut’ a Pakai lenggam hi nang hon deh lhah din nagouvin, mihem natam man’uleh nang hon pathen houva nahou diuva Jerobo’am semdoh bongnou doi lim kisemthu ho nanei jeh-uvin nakisong uvin ahi.

Nang hon Pakai thempuho geiya nadel mang’uva, Aaron chapate leh Levite nadel manguva, gamdang dang mite chonna banga nacham cham’uva thempu nalhen thuu hilou ham? Koi koi hijongleh bongchal khat hinkaiya, kelngoichal sagi hinkaipa, ama le ama kisutheng dinga kigopa chu Pathen hilou doi kisemthuho thempua pang thei hilou ham?

Keiho din vang Pakai kitipa hi Pathen chu ahin, keihon ama chu kasumil pouve. Keihon thempu tampi kaneiyun, amaho hi Aaron cha le tute jeng, Levi mi jeng ahiuvin, atoh ding kindol’u abol’uvin Pakai jennan na atonguve.

Hiche thempuho hin jingkah seh le nilhah seh-in Pakai henga pumgo thilto atoh uvin, gimnamtui ahalnam’uvin, sana thengsel a kisem dokhang chunga chun todoh ding changlhah agol gol’in agol jiuvin ahi, chujongle sana thaomei khom ho leh athaomei chengse alimbol’uvin, nilhah seh leh avah jiuvin ahi; hitia hi keihon Pakai ka-Pathenu thupeh eilhah nau kanit jingu ahin, nang hon vang ama chu nasumil tauve.

Vetan, Pathen chu keihoto kapang khom’uvin alamkaiyin apange, chule Pathen thempuho jong nang ho douna galbolna ding gal-sumkon mutging din sumkon kichoiyin ading cheh uve. Vo Israel chate, Pakai napu napateu Pathen dounan gal bol hih hel’uvin; ajeh chu najo louhel diu ahibouve,” tin asamtai.

Jerobo’am chun anung lam’uva kona hin ledel a anokhum diuvin achanglhiding chang pang din mi asol tai; hiti hin asepaite chu Judah mite masanga apanguvin, chule Judah sepaite nung lama chun chang panga pang ho akisel’uvin ahi.
Hichun Judah akiheiya avet leh, vetan anung ama a gal apangto tai; hitah chun Judah mite jong Pakai henga ataovun thempuhon jong sumkon amut soh keitauve.
Hichun Judah miten osang tah-in gal asam tauve. Judah miten gal asap phat’uvin Pathenin Abi’jah le Judah mite angsung laitah a chun Jerobo’am le Israel mite abonchan ajopeh tai.
Hijeh chun Israel mite chu Judah mite masanga ajam’uvin, Pathenin Israelte chu Judahte khut’a apedoh tai.
Abi’jah le amiten Israelte chu mihem atama tam athat’uvin ahi; hikoma hin Israel mite lhen tum mihat cheh sang ja nga jen akijam chap jenguvin ahi.
Hitobang hin hichepet tah chun Israel mite akisunem jenguve; Judah mite vang chu achungnung jouvin ahi, ijeh-inem itileh amaho chu Pakai apu apateu Pathen chunga kisong ahiuve.
Abijah chun Jerobo’am adelpeh-in, khopi phabep alahpeh-in, Bethel le akhoneo dung jouse ahin, Jesha’nah le akhoneo dung jouse ahin, Ephron leh akhoneo dung jouse jong ahi.
Abi’jah hinlaisen Jerobo’am chun atha ajedoh jou kit tapoi, Pakaiyin Jerobo’am adengin, hijeh chun amajong athitan ahi.
Abi’jah vang chu athahat cheh cheh jengin ahi. Numei ji jong som le li akipuiyin, chapa som ni le ni ahingin, chanu som le gup ahinge.
Abi’jah natoh athilbol adang dang, alamlhah jouse leh athusei jouse aboncha Iddo themgaopa thusim lekhabua kijih lut soh kei ahi.
Abi’jah jong apu apate toh akijam khom in, David khopia avuitauve; chuin achapa Asa kitipan ama khel’in lengvai apotan ahi. Ama khang hin gamsung jong kum som bang gal kisat hepha louvin akicholdoi.
Asa hin Pakai a-Pathen mitmun thilpha le thildih jeng anabol’in ahiye.
Asa’n gamchom mite houdola maicham kisem jouse leh khomol dunga doiphunga kisem jouse asumang soh keiyin, doikhom jouse jong aphuh lhusoh hel’in, Ashe’rim molsong kiphut jong akai lhui;
chujongleh Judahte chu Pakai apu apateu Pathen hol’a ngailu din asol’in, danthu le thupeh nit dingin aseipeh tai.
Asa chun Judah gamsunga khopi jouse khomol dunga doiphung jouse leh gimnamtui kihalnamna maicham jouse jong asumang soh keiyin, ama vaipohna noiya hin lenggam chu lung mong le chamnan anaume.

Chuin Judah gamsunga kulpi kikaikhum khopi jouse asaphan ahi, ijeh-inem itileh gamsung chu kicholdoa gal hepha louva um-a ahitai. Pakaiyin chamna apeh jeh-in hiche lai kum hijat sung chun Asa’n gal kisat ahephapoi.

Hichun Asa’n Judahte jah a aseiyin, “Eihon hiche khopi gemsa ho hi sau hitin, pal’in umkimsoh keiyu hitin, kulpi insang jong sahden jengu hitin, kelkot jong bolpeh a akelkotgol jong sempeh cheh din gel temu hite, ajeh chu eiho Pakai i-Pathenu henga itao jeh-uvin agam hi tugeiyin eiho gam ahinalaiye; hitobanga ama henga itao jal’uva aman jong jet le veiya kona gal asuh thip’a chamna eipeh-u ahitai,” ati. Hijeh chun amahon jong khopi asauvin akhangtou lheh jenguve.

Asa hin Judah gamsunga sepai sang ja thum aneiyin, sepai ho chu akhut’uva thih bantom kiveiya tengcha kipat cheh ahiuvin, chujongle Benjamin phunga konin jong sang ja ni le sang somget aneiyin, amaho hi lum kipoh a thalpi kap them cheh ahiuvin ahi; abonchauva hi mihat gal-hang jeng ahiuve.
Ethopia mi Zerah kitipa chun sepai Nel khat le kangtalai jathum ahintol’in Judahte toh kisat din ahungin, Mare’shah kho geiyin ahung tai.
Hichun Asa jong Zerah chutoh kimuto din achetan ahi; chuphat’in Zeph’athah phaiya chun ‘Mare’shah khoa kisat to din agol gol’in akigol tauve.

Chutah chun Asa jong Pakai a-Pathen henga ataovin akap jah jengin, “Pakai, mihat le mi lhasam kithopi thei nang tilou koima dang aumpoi. O Pakai ka-Pathenu, nei kitho piuvin, ajeh chu keiho hi nanga kingai jing kahiuvin, chule nang min songa hiche mipi hijat galte hi dou dinga hung kon kahiuve. O Pakai, nangma chu keiho Pathen nahin, hijeh chun mihem kijosah hih hel’in,” ati.
Hijeh chun Pakaiyin jong Asa lengpa leh Judah mite angsunga Ethopia mite chu ajouvin, Ethopia mite jong ajam gamtauve.

Asa le apanpi mipi chun Ethopia mite chu Gerar chan geiyin agadelpeh uvin, Ethopia mite chu ahingdoh beihel’in akijam chap jeng jungin alhu lham jenguve. Ijeh inem itileh amaho chu Pakai le asepaite angsunga kisugoi soh-hel hiuvah ahitai. Judah miten thilkeo tamtah akichomdoh uvin ahiye.

Gerar phai kimvela cheng khopi jouse jong asumang uvin ahi, ajeh chu hiche khopi jouse jong hin Pakai aging lheh jeng tauve; hijeh chun Judah ten hiche khopi ho hi achom’uvin, thilkeo akilah tauve, ijeh-inem itileh hiche khopi ho hi haotah tah ahiuvin, chom thei jeng ahiuve.
Chutengleh Judahten gancha bong ima neiho jong chu aponbuh jouse asuhset peh-uvin, kelngoi tamtah le sangongsang tampi akikai manguve. Chujouvin Jerusalem khopia ahung kile kit tauve.
Oded chapa Azari’ah chunga Pathen lhagao ahung pansah.

hijeh chun Azari’ah jong Asa toh kimuton apotdoh-in chule ajah a aseitai, “Asa kathusei ngaitemin, chule Judah gam mite leh Benjamin phunga miten jong ngaiyun: Nang ho akoma naum laiseuvin Pakaiyin jong nang ho napanpi jing jenguve. Nang hon ama nahol’uva ahileh ama namudoh tei tei diu ahi, amavang ama chu nadalhah uva ahivangleh aman jong nang ho nadalhah diu ahiye.
Ijehinem itileh phat sot tahpi hi Israelte hi Pathen dih chutoh kivop louva anaum ahitauve mihil ding thempu beiya jong um’uva, danthu beiya um-ah ahitauve;
ahivangin agenthei ahesoh behseh tenguleh Pakai Israel Pathen henga ahung kiheiyuva, ama ahol’uva ahileh Pakai Pathen chu amudoh jiuve.
Masang laiyin vaikonpa ding hihen lang vailhungpa ding hijongleh chamna anaumpoi, ijehinem itileh gamsung jousea chengte chunga boina lentah le hesohna nasa tah analengin ahi.
Miho chu namtin vaipi jeng jong ahalsi sia kikhentel lenguva, nam le nam jong kidouva, khopi le khopi jong kidou jeng ahin, ajeh chu Pathenin amaho hi gentheina tin chenga anasuh genthei ahiuve.
Hijongleh nang ho vang hangtah-in panguvin! Nahan thau lhahsam sah hih hel’un, ajeh chu natoh cholnau tohman nakipe tei tei diu ahinai,” a tin ahi.

Thu kisei hijatpi, Oded chapa Azari’ah gao thusei chu Asa’n ajah doh phat’in hangtah-in apangin, thet umtah tah milim doi kisem jouse Judah gamsung le Benjamin gamsunga konin apaidoh tan, Ephraim thinglhang gamsunga khopi analah jousea konin jong apaidoh in, Pakai houin hongcha maiya kitung Pakai maicham jong chu asemphan ahi.

Chutengleh Judahte abonchauva ahin, Benjamin te ahiuvin akhomin; Ephraim gama jong amaho toh khopem khoma Manas’seh phung mite leh Simeon phung mite geiyin akhomin, hiti hin mipi tamtah-in ama heng ahinbel tauve, ajeh chu Pathenin ama apanpitai, ti amudoh phat’uva Israel gama kona ama henga mipi tamtah hung kitol lut ahitauvin ahi.
Mihem hijat hi Asa leng chan kal kum som le nga lhin kum, lha thum lhin nan Jerusalem khopia ahung kikhom’uvin ahi.
Hiche nikho hin amahon Pakaiya kilhaina gantha abol’uvin, galmuna ahin chomdoh sau thilkeo lah a bongchal ja sagi leh kelngoi sang sagi athat’uvin ahi.
Hichun amahon alungthim pumpiu leh ahinkho pumpiuva Pakai apu apateu Pathen aholna diuva kitepna khat asemdoh uvin ahi.
Koi koi hijeng jong leh Pakai Israel Pathen holloupa chu thadoh dingin aseiyui; khangdong hihen lang upa hileh, pasal hihen numei hijongleh tha tei tei din aseitauve.
Mipi chun Pakaiya kihahselna abol’uvin, ogin sang tah-in asam’uvin, sumkon tampi amut ginguvin, chule saki tamtah jong amut ginguvin ahi.

Hiche kihahsel abolna chunguva hin Judahte abonchan akipah soh keiyuvin ahi; ijeh-inem itileh amaho chu alungthim pumpia kihahsel’uva, alung tupnau apumpia Pakai hoi ding agot’u ahitan, hijeh a chu Pakai jong amahon amuu ahitai; hijeh chun Pakai yin jong amaho chu akimvel’uva mitea konin akicholdo sah-in gal asubeitai.

Asa lengpa hin anu Ma’acah kitinu geiyin jong lengnu ahina a konin akaidoh jengin ahi, ajeh chu amanun Ashe’rah doi lim thet umtah khat anakisem in ahi. Asa’n hiche milim chu asuhset peh jengin, avogoiyin, Kidron vadunga meiyin ahalvamtan ahi.
Ahinah vangin Israelte lah a konin khomola doiphung jouse akisumang deh poi. Hijongleh Asa chu ahinkho lhumkeiyin alungthim chu nolnabei ahiye.
Asa’n Pathen houin sunga chun masanga apa thenso thiltosa leh ama thenso thilto jong ahinpo lut jengin, dangka jong sana jong chule umle bel khon geiyin jong ahin polut tai.
Asa lengvaipoh kal kum som thum le kum nga geiyin jong gal kisat aumtapoi.

Asa leng chan kal kum som thum le kum gup lhin kumin Israel lengpa Ba’asha kitipa chu Judah gama gal bol din akontouvin, Ramah khopia galkul asemtai, hitia hi Judah lengpa Asa dinga vaikon leh vailhung beihela lha ding agot ahi.

Chuphat’in Asa lengpa’n jong Pakai houin sunga thil kikhol jouse leh lengpa inpia kikhol thilkeo lah a dangka le sana jouse alan, hicheng chu Syria lengpa Ben-ha’dad henga athot’in, Damascus khopia cheng Ben-ha’dad jah a chun hitin aseiye,

“Nang le kei kah a kihoutohna khat nei hitin, kapa le napa kah a kihousomna aneilhon bang chun bol hite; vetan, keiman nang dingin dangka le sana kahin thot’in ahi; chen lang Israel lengpa Ba’asha toh nakihoutohna chu gasukeh tan, chutileh aman keima eidalhah a kinungtol doh ding ahi,” agatisah-e.

Ben-ha’adad jong chun Asa lengpa thusei angaiyin, asepai lamkaite chengse chu Israel khopi dung delkhum din asol’in ahileh, sepai lamkaiho chun Ijon khopi le Dan, Abel-ma’im chule Naph’tali gama thil kholna khopi jouse jong agajou tauve.
Hiche thu hi Ba’ashan ajah doh phat’in Ramah khopia galkul akaiban chu atangin, anatoh angatai.

Chuphat’in Asa lengpan jong Judah mite abonchauvin apuiyin Ramah khopia song kikhol jouse leh a-inthil jouse abonchan alhoh manguvin, Ba’ashan khopi galkul sahna aneih’o chengse chu apomanguvin Asa’n hicheng inthil kipodoh chun Geba khopi le Mizpah khopi asah nan ahi.

Hichepet hin mitva neipa Hana’ni kitipa chu Judah lengpa Asa henga ahungin ahi, amahin Asa jah a aseiyin, “Nangma Pakai na-Pathen chunga kingai louhel’a Syria lengpa chunga nakingai jeh chun, Syria sepaite jong chu natuh khel’a kithol mang hel ding ahiuve.

Ethopia mite leh Libya mite jong chu sepai atama tam simsen lou, kangtalai tampi le sakol touthem sepai tamtah hiuva hilou ham? Ahivangin nangma Pakaiya naki-ngai jeh-in aman abonchauvin nangma khut’a anapedoh soh hel’in ahi.

Ijeh-inem itileh Pakaiyin leiset pumpi hi asuh vet atouvet a ama dinga alungthim nolnabei hel miho thalhenga athahat kilandohsah ding agot jing jeng ahi. Nangin hiche hi ngol hoi tah a nabol ahitai; ijeh-inem itileh tua pat’a nangin gal nadoupan ding ahitan ahi.” ati.

Chuphat’in Asa jong mitva neipa chunga alung hangin, songkul sunga akhumin bul atuh tai; ajeh chu hiche aseijeh a hi mitva neipa chunga lung hang behseh ahi. Chujongleh hiche lai hin Asa chun mipi phabep jong hesoh genthei tah-in anabol’e.
Asa natoh athilbol adang dang apatna pat achaina geiyin Judah le Israel lengte lekhabua akijih lut’in ahi.

Aleng chan kal kum som thum le kum ko lhin kumin Asa akeng phang teni ahung nan, hiche anatna hi akhoh lheh jeng tai; ahivangin hiche anatna konin jong Asa’n Pakai ahol deh tapon ahi; hisang chun lou le ai themho joh ahol le lei.
Chujouvin Asa jong apu apate toh akijam khomin, aleng chan kal kum som li le kum khat kumin athitai.

Chuin mihon ama chu David khopia ama le aman akikhensa song lhan sunga avuitauve. Mihon Asa long chu pahcha namtui hal them mihon gimnamtui jatchom chom ahal khom’uva asun khum sau talai chunga ajam’uvin, chule ama jabol nan meikong deuje jun atih konguvin ahi.
Asa khel’in achapa Jehosh’aphat chu lengvaipon apangin, Israelte dounan amale ama akitilkhou tai.

Jehosh’aphat hin Judah gamsunga kulpi kikaikhum khopi jousea sepai atousah-in, Judah gamsunga sepai aloi loiyin akoiye; chujongle apa Asa’n alahsa Ephraim mite khopi dunga jong hitima hin akoiyin ahi.
Pakaiyin Jehosh’aphat chu apanpin ahi, ijeh-inem itileh ama chu masang laiya apa hinkho abul lama achonna bang bangin ahung chonin ahi; Ba’al doi kisemthu ho jong hou din agopoi.
apa hou a-Pathen jeng bou ahol’in, hiche Pathen thupeh jenga achon jingin, Israelte chonna bangin achonpon ahi.
Hijeh chun Pakaiyin ama khut’a lenggam aphutdet e; chujongleh Judah ten abonchauvin Jehosh’aphat henga kai apesoh keiyuve, hijeh hin Jehosh’aphat jong ahao lheh jengin min ajabol lheh-e.
Pakai danthu jouse juina din alungthim ahat lheh jengin. chule Judah gamsunga konin khomol dunga doiphung jouse leh Ashe’rim doi song jouse jong aladoh soh hel’in ahi.
Jehosh’aphat hin alengvaipoh kal kum thum lhin kumin Judah gamsunga khopi jouse mihil dingin milen milal cheh Ben-hail le Obadi’ah toh, Zechari’ah le Nethan’el toh, chule Micai’ah chu-asol’e;

amaho hi Levi miho Shemai’ah, Nethani’ah, Zebadi’ah, As’ahel, Shemiramoth, Jehon’athan, Adoni’jah, Tobi’jah, chule Tobadoni’jah toh akilhon’uve; chutengleh hiche Levite hileh thempu Elish’ama le Jeho’ram akilhon’uvin ahi.
Mihem hijat hi Judah gamsunga acheuvin Pakai danthu lekhabu akichoiyun mi ahil le leuvin ahi. Hitobang hin amaho hi Judah gama khopi jousea ache leuvin mipi lah lah a mi ahil le leuve.
Hichun Judah gam kimvela cheng lenggam jouse∑chunga Pakai ginna ahung lhung soh keiyin, hijeh chun amahon Jehosh’aphat dounan gal abol tapouve.

Philistine mite phabep’in Jehosh’aphat din thilpeh phabep le kaiya peh din dangka ahinpoh peh uvin ahi; chutengleh Arab miten jong Jehosh’aphat din kelngoichal sang sagi le ja sagi ahinkaiyun, kelchal jeng jeng sang sagi le ja sagi ma ahinkaiyuve.
Jehosh’aphat chu ol ol’in ahung khangtouvin aminthang cheh chehtai; aman Judah gamsunga galkul tampi asai;
hijeh chun Judah gamsunga khopi jouseah thil tamtah tah akhol’in ahi; sepai jeng jong Jerusalem khopia tampi akoiyin amaho chu mihat gal-hang jeng ahiuve.
Apu apateu insung dol’a mijat akisimtoh nau chu hiti hi ahi; Judah phunga sepai asang sang lamkai ho chu, alamkaiya pang Adnah ahin, mihat gal-hang cheh sepai sang ja thum alhinguve;
Adnah ban a pang chu alamkaipa Jeho-ha’nan ahin, sepai sang ja ni leh sang som get aihinguvin ahi;
Jeho-ha’nan ban a pang kit chu Zichri chapa Amasi’ah ahin, ama hi Pakai kinbolna dinga achamtah a kipedoh jeng ahin, sepai mihat gal-hang cheh sang ja ni toh ahiuve.
Benjamin phunga chu mihat gal-hang tah Eli’ada lamkai ahin, sepai thalpi le lum kipat cheh sang ja ni toh ahi;
Eli’ada ban a pang chu Jeho’zabad ahin, galsat dia kigosadem sepai sang ja khat le sang som get toh ahiuve.
Mihem hijatpi hi lengpa kinbol din apanguvin, amaho hi Judah gam pumpia lengpan kulpi kikai khum khopi dunga atousah sepaite chutoh kisimtha loulai ahiuvin ahi.
Jehosh’aphat chun neile gou tampi aneiyin, chule mipin jong ajabol lheh jenguve; aman Ahab lengpa toh numei kilah toa kitho khomna khat asem doh tai.

Kum phabep nungin Samaria khopia Ahab lengpa henga achesuh-in ahi. Hichea hin Ahab lengpa’n jong ama leh ahung kilhonpi mipi neh dingin kelngoi leh bongchal neng jeng jungin athapeh-e; chuin Ramoth-gilead lama galkonpi din atemtan ahi.

Israel lengpa Ahab hin Judah lengpa Jehosh’aphat jah a aseitai, “Nangman Romoth-gilead lama gal neikonpi thei lou ding ham?” atileh; Jehosh’aphat’in jong Ahab chu adonbut paiyin, “Kei le nang tha khat ihin, kamite jong nang mite bang bang ahiye. Hijeh chun keihon gal nakonhu nau vinge,” ati.
Jehosh’aphat chun Israel lengpa jah a aseiyin, “Amasan Pakaiyin ipi aseiyam, dong masa ta din,” atileh;

Israel lengpan jong themgao jouse akhomsoh keiyin, abonin ja li alhinguve; hiche ho jah a chun Ahab’in aseiyin. “Ramoth-gilead langa galbol dinga kakon diu ha, ahilouleh kahai diu hitam?” a tin adonge. Themgaohon adonbut’uvin, “Kontou jengin, ajeh chu Pathenin gal mite-chu lengpa khut’a pedoh nante,” atiuve.
Ahivangin Jehosh’aphat chun asei kit nalaiyin, “Eihon idoh theiyu hikoma hi Pakai themgao khat beh um lou ham?” atileh;

Jehosh’aphat jah a Israel lengpa’n aseiyin, “Eihon Pakai thusei ding idoh theiyu themgao khat vang aum nai, ama chu Imlah chapa Micai’ah ahi; ahin keiman ama khu kahot ahi, ajeh chu keima chung chang thudola aman itih chan’in jong thilpha agao ngaipoi, thilse jeng jeng bou agao jin ahi.” atitai. Hichun Jehosh’aphat’in jong aseiyin, “Ahipoi, lengpa chutobangin lung hang hih beh-in,” ati.
Chuphat’in Israel lengpa’n jong vaibola pang mi khat akou loiyin. “Imlah chapa Micai’ah kitipa chu man gang tah-in gapui loiyin.” tin aseipeh tai.

Israel lengpa leh Judah lengpa Jehosh’aphat chu alaltouna chung cheh a atou lhonin aleng ponchol akisil cheh lhone; ama ni hi Samaria khopia lutna kelkot hongcha lhong chunga tou ahilhone; chutengleh ama ni angsunga hi themgao jousen gaothu asei sei jengu anahi.

Hichea hin Chena’anah chapa Zedeki’ah kitipa chun acham chamin thih alan saki limin akikhenin, chule aseitai, “Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, ‘Nangman hiche saki ho hi naman a Syria mite chu akisuh gamhel kahseuva nadeljam jam jeng ding ahi,’ tin aseiye,” ati.

Chule themgao dang ho jong chun abonchauvin hiti chun asei cheh uvin, “Ramoth-gilead langa gal kontou jengin lang gal gajou tan; Pakaiyin gal mite chu lengpa khut’a apeh doh tei tei ding ahinai,” atiuve.

Mi sottolle kisolpa chu Micai’ah kou din ahenga achen ajah a agaseitai, “Vetan, themgao dang jouse khu athuseiyu akitoh soh keiyin long del’in aumin lengpa lungdei lamtah ahi: hiche ho lah a khatpen pen thusei bang bang khun nangin jong lungdei thei thei din seijon,” ati masai.
Ahivanginla Micai’ah chun aseiyin, “Hing jing Pakai aume, ipi pi hijongleh ka-Pathenin asei sei chu keiman jong kaseijoh ding ahibouve,” atitai.

Micai’ah chu lengpa heng ahung lhun phat’in lengpa’n jong ajah a aseiyin. “Micai’ah Ramoth-gilead langa galbol dia kakon diu ha ahilouleh kahai diu hitam?” tia adoh leh; Micai’ah chun adonbut’in, “Kontou tauhiti, gal jou naveh tau chun; gal mite aboncha min nakhut’a pedoh na dingu chu.” tin aseiye.
Chutah chun lengpa’n ajah a aseiyin, “Ken ijavei thil dang imacha sei louva Pakai min a adih jeng sei ding kadoh nahi hitam?” tia a-eojah jenga ahileh;

hichun Micai’ah jong chun aseiyin. “Kelman molsang vum dunga aching bei kelngoite banga Israelte akithecheh soh keiyu kamui; chule Pakaiyin anaseiyin. ‘Hiche ho hin lamkai apu anei tapouve; ami takip hi lung mongin ama ama inlam cheh a kile kit tau hen.’ tin anaseiye,” ati.
Chuphat’in-Israel lengpa’n Jehosh’aphatjah a aseiyin, “Ama hin keima chung changa thilpha imacha gaodoh ponte, thilse se bou asei ding ahi, tia najah a kaseipeh masah nahilou ham?” ati.
Ahinla Micai’ah chun asei nalaiyin, “Hichejeh chun Pakai thusei hi ngaiyin: Keiman Pakai chu alaltouna atoupet kamun, chule van mi janel chu abonchauvin ajet le aveiya akigol’uvin ahi.

Hichea hin Pakaiyin aseiye, ‘Koipen tah hin Israel lengpa Ahab khu agatildoh a chutengleh ama Ramoth-gilead lama gal kontouva gathiden thei ding ham?’ atileh; khat’in thil khat aseiyun, achom khat man thil chom khatma aseiye.
Hichun lhagao khat hi Pakai angsunga ahung vah lut’in a-angsunga adingin hi tin aseiye, ‘Keiman gatildoh nange,’ ahung ti. Hichepa jah a chun Pakaiyin adongin, ‘I-nagalo ding ham?’ atia ahileh;

Lhagao chun aseitai, ‘Keima kondoh jeng ing ting Ahab themgaote kamsunga khu jousei lhagaova kagapan ding ahi,’ ati. Chuphat’in Pakaiyin jong aseiyin, ‘Nangin Ahab khu nagatildoh ding ahin, tiljong natil thei ding ahi: kondoh jengin lang hiti chun gabol tan,’ ati.
Hijeh chun tun vetan, Pakaiyin hiche nathemgaote kamsunga hi jousei lhagao apansah ahitai; nachung changa Pakaiyin jou asei ahibouve,” atitai.

Chutah chun Chena’anah chapa Zedeki’ah chun ahin nailut paiyin Micai’ah chu angeiphe abeh peh pai jengin chule aseitai, “Hoilam pen a Pakai Lhagaovin keima eidalhah a nang kamjoh a thu asei ding ham” atin ahi.
Ahivang in Micai’ah chun aseitai. “Kivet tan, hiche nikho chuleh nangma tah jong akisel mang dinga indan sungnung langpeh a najamlut ding ahi,” ati.
Hitah chun Israel lengpa’n aseiyin, “Micai’ah chu manloiyun, khopi sung vaipoa pang Amon le lengpa chapa Jo’ash henga kailut loiyuvin;

chutengleh hi tin aseiyun, ‘Lengpan hitin aseiye, “Hiche duh dah beipa hi songkula khum’uvin lang, keima lung monga kahung kile kit kahsen changlhah lhomcha neh sah-uvin lang, twi themcha donsah uvin,” tin aseiye,’ gatiuvin,” ati.

Hichea jong hin Micai’ah chun asei nalaiyin, “Nangma lung monga nahung kile kit pou pouva ahileh Pakaiyin keima kama thu aseilou hinte,” atipeh-e. Chujongleh Micai’ah asam jah jengin, “Mipin jong nabonchan ngaisoh keiyuvin!” ati,
Israel lengpa leh Judah lengpa Jehosh’aphat chu Ramoth-gilead lama akontou lhontai.

Hichun Israel lengpa’n Jehosh’aphat jah a aseiyin, “Keima lim chomin kisem ing ting galmuna galut tange, nangman naleng ponchol kisil jingin lang umden tan,” ati. Hiti chun Israel lengpa chu ama le ama’ alim chombeh-in akisemin galmuna agalut tai.
Hichepet hin Syria lengpa’n akangtalaiya pang sepai lamkaite chu thu apen, “Milen mineo koimacha toh kisat hih hel’uvin, Israel lengpa chubou hol’uvin lang kisat piuvin,” ati.

Hichea hin kangtalaiya panga galsat sepai lamkaiho chun Jehosh’aphat amudoh phat’uvin “Israel lengpa hiteiyinte,” atiuvin; hijeh chun akiheiyun ama chutoh kisat din ajontauve; ahinla Jehosh’aphat chu ahung pengjah jengin, hichea kon hin Pakaiyin ama akithopitai; sepai lamkai ho chu Pathenin Jehosh’aphat koma konin adeljam soh tai.
Ijeh-inem itileh kangtalaiya pang sepai lamkaiten ama chu Israel lengpa ahipoi, ti amudoh phat’uvin anung adelnauva konin akinung heiyun adalhatauve.

Ahivangin mi khat hin athalpi chu adonkap kap a ahileh, Israel lengpa chu akap khan, athih-len galvon le a-ompho kah a aleng luttai; hichejeh chun aman jong akangtalai tolpa jah a chun aseiyin, “Eimavotauve, kiheiyin lang galmuna kon hin neitoldoh tan,” ati.
Hiche nikho hin gal akihasat lheh jeng tan, Israel lengpa jong chu akangtalai chunga akikha khomdouvin Syria mite heng lam chu nilhah geiyin ave-lhi jing jenge; nisa alhum lhumin ama jong athitai.
Judah lengpa Jehosh’aphat chu damsel’in ahung kile kit’in Jerusalem khopia ain ahung lhung tai.

Hichun mitva neipa Hana’ni chapa Jehu chu ama toh kimuto din ahung potdohin ahi, hichea hin aman jong Jehosh’aphat lengpa jah a aseiyin, “Nangman migiloute napanpia Pakai hotbol’a nei mite chu na-ngailut mong ding ham? Hiche nabol jeh hin nangma dounan Pakaiya konin lungsatna ahung kondoh tai.
Hitajongleh nangma chunga hin thilpha them khat akimui, ajeh chu gamsunga konin nangman Asherah doi kisemthuho chu nasumangin, nalungthim jeng jong Pathen lama napen ama chu nahol jinge,” ati.

Jehosh’aphat chu Jerusalem a acheng tai; chuin ama jong akipat’in amite agakhol toh len, Beer-sheba khoa pat Ephraim thinglhang gamsung geiyin agakhol’in, mipi chu Pakai apu apateu Pathen lama ahinle pui kit’in ahi.
Jehosh’aphat chun gamsunga Judah gam kulpi kikaikhum khopi jousea chun akhopi til chan a thutan vaihom apansah soh keiyin,

chule thutan vaihom ho jah a aseitai, “Ipi nabol mong mongu ham phaten vetoh uvin; ajeh chu nang ho hi mihem dinga thutana pang nahipouvin, Pakai ding joh a thutana pang nahiuve! hijeh a chu aman jong nathutan nauva napanpi jing jengu ahi.

Hijeh chun tun jong nachunguva Pakai ginna umsoh kei hen; ipi natong nahiuvam, phaten kiging phan ching theiyun, achutilouleh Pakai i-Pathenu maiya thu adih loulam in tan khauvin natin, lang neiya chule nehguh kilah mi hikhauvin nate,” atipeh-e.

Hicheng tilou injong Jehosh’aphat in Jerusalem khopia pang ding, kinahna suchama Pakai dinga thutana pang din Levite phabep le thempu phabep chule Israel insung phung upa chengse chu alhengdoh kit nalaiye. Amaho hin Jerusalem khopia chun toumun panmun anei soh keiyuvin ahi.
Jehosh’aphat in amaho hi phatechan ahil’in, “Nang hon Pakai ginna a na natoh uva, kitahna neitah a nabol diu, nalungthim pumpiuva nakhohsah diu ahi.

Itobang kinahna thu hijongleh nasopiteuvin achen chen nau khopi dunga kona nahenguva thu ahinlhut’uva ahileh, thisan kiso thu hihen lang, danthu chung chang thu hihen lang, chondan le chonna dan thudol hijeng jong leh, nang hon amaho chu phatecha nahil them’uva, Pakai angsunga themmona aboldoh louna diuva nahil diu, hitia chu nasopiteu leh nangho chunga lungsatna ahung chuh khah louna ding na-ngaito diu ahi. Hitobanga nabol’uva, thepmona nasosah lou diu ahiye.

Chule vetan, Pakai thudola nalamkai diuvin thempu pipu Amari’ah kitipa hi aum nai; chujongleh lengpa kin chung chang thudola nalamkai diuvin Judah phung sunga gamvaipoa pang lsh’mael chapa Zebadi’ah hi aume: chule nangho dinga Levite hi vaibola pang diu ahi. Hang tah-in panguvin lang, milungdih te chu Pakaiyin panpi jing jeng hen!” ati.
Hiche nung hin Moab mite leh Ammon mite chu Meu-n mite phabep toh akithouvin Jehosh’aphat douna galbol dingin ahung kontauve.

Hichun mi phabep ahunguvin Jehosh’aphat ahung seipeh-un, “Edom gama kon leh twikhanglen gal langa konin mihon tamtah nangma dou din a hung kontai; vetan, amaho chu En-ge’di kiti lai, Haz’azonta’mar khoa apansauve,” atipeh-uvin ahi.
Chuphat’in Jehosh’aphat jong akichatan, Pakai heng lam hol din ama le ama akigo jenge, chujongle Judah gamsung pumpia anngol din aphongtai.
Hijeh chun Judahte chu Pakaiya kona kithopi ngehna dingin akikhom’uvin, Judah gamsung khopi jousea konin Pakai hol din ahung kikhomtauve.
Judahte Houbung lailung Jerusalem khopia chun Pakai houin sunga indan thah kisem maiya chun Jehosh’aphat jong adingin,

hichea chun ataotai, “Vo Pakai, kapu kapateu Pathen, nangma van Pathen nahilou ham? Nangin namtin vaipi lenggam jouse chunga vai nahom jing hilou ham ong? Nakhut’a thil boltheina leh thahat aum jingin, hijeh chun nangma ting jou ding koima aumpoi.
Vo ka-Pathenu nangman namite Israel masanga hiche gamsunga chengte nadel manga, aitih chan geiya achan diuva nagolpa Abraham son achilhahte napehsa hilou ham?’
Amaho agamsunga achenguvin, chule nangma din agamsunga namina kiminvo din muntheng khat jong asauvin hitin aseiyuve,

‘Ijemtia eiho chunga chemjam hemhatna auma, thutanna ahung umdoh a, gamna hise ahung lan a, kel ahung lhah a ahijongleh, hiche houin maiya hin dingu hitin, nangma min panin hiche houin sunga dingu hitin, chutengleh kagenthei nauva konin nangma henga hung tau jengu leng, nangman kataonau ngaiyin natin neihuhhing diu ahi,’ tia anaseiyu ahi.
