Chule tun vetan. Ammon mite leh Moab mite chule Se’ir molsang khu, hiche ho khu nangman Israelte Egypt gama kona ahung potdoh laiyuva gal abol diu najah da a, Israelten jong aotdoh le leuva suhmang louva anakoiyu ahi.
Ahin amaho hi vetan, nangman keiho chenpha dinga neipeh-u hiche nangma goulo kachen nauva kon hin nodoh a keiho thilpha bol chu hitobang tah a lethuh din eigouve.

O ka-Pathenu achunguva nangin thu natanpeh lou ding ham? Ajeh chu hitobanga keiho dou dinga hung kon mipi hijat masanga keiho pang joulouva thabei kahiu ahitai. Ipi kabol’uva i-kati diu hitam kahe tapouve, nangma jeng kamit teniuva kavet vet jengu nahitai,” ati.
Hitobanga Jehosh’aphat ataopet hin Judah mite chu abonchauvin achasen jouseu leh ajite achateu pumpin Pakai angsunga ading soh keiyuvin ahi.
Chupet tah chun Houbung lailung tah a Asaph chapate lah a Levi mi khat Mattani’ah chapa, Je-i’el chapa, Bena’iah chapa, Zechari’ah chapa, Jahazi’el kitipa chunga chun Pakai Lhagao ahung toutai.

Hichun Jahazi’el chun aseiyin, “Jerusalem khopia cheng Judah mite leh Jehosh’aphat lengpa’n ngai tem’uvin; Pakaiyin nangho jah a hitin aseiye. ‘Kicha hih-uvin hiche mihonpi jeh khun imacha lung thoina neidauvin; ijeh-inem itileh gal kisat ding hi nangho gal ahipoi. Pathen galjoh ahibouve.

Jing nikho leh konsuh jenguvin lang gakisat piuvin, veutauvin, amaho jong Ziz lhangpanga hung kitol tou diu ahi; chutengleh nang hon amaho chu Jeru’el gammang niso lama phaicham monga khu nakitopi diu ahiye.

Hiche gal kisatna a hi nang hon khoh tah a a nasat lou diu, nangma mun cheh a napansat uva, nadin det chet diu, chutengleh nangho thalhenga Pakai galjo chu namu diu ahiye, Judah mite leh Jerusalem mite,’ ati. Kicha hih uvin, lung thoina jong nei dauvin; jing tengleh hiche mite douna khun kondoh pou pouleu chun ahijenge; Pakaiyin nangho napanpi tei tei diu ahinai,” ati.
Chutah chun Jehosh’aphat jong chu alu akaikun amai tola asulut tai; hitah chun Judah mite jouse leh Jerusalema chengte abonchauvin Pakai angsunga abohkhup soh keiyuvin Pakai chu chibai aboh tauve.
Chuin Levite leh Kohath phunga Kohath mite chu adtingdoh uvin Pakai Israel Pathen vahchoi nan ogin sang tah-in avahchoitauve.

Miho chu jingkah jingpi tah-in akipatdoh uvin Teko’a gammang sunga lama alut tauve; hitia mipi akitoldoh phat’uvin Jehosh’aphat jong adingin aseitai, “Vo Judahte leh Jerusalema chengte, kathusei ngaitem’uvin! Pakai na-Pathenu tahsan soh keiyuvin, chutileh nachendet joh diu ahi; athemgaote thusei natahsan’uva ahileh gal najo tei diu ahi,” ati.

@@Hitobanga mipi chutoh kihoutohna anei jou phat’in Jehosh’aphat chun vonthenga kivona Pakai vahchoina la sading miho chu alhengdoh-in, amaho hi sepaite masanga akijot’uvin hitin aseiyuve, “Thangvah-uvin Pakai chu, Ajeh chu ami khoton tonsot getyin athoh jinge,” atiuvin ahi.

Hitia hi amahon la asah uva vahchoina abolpat phat’uvin Pakaiyin Ammon mite leh Moab mite chule Se’ir molsang mite dounan chang pang akoiyin, hiti hin Judah gam douva hung kon mite chu athecheh soh hel’e.

Ijeh-inem itileh Ammon mite leh Moab miten Se’ir molsanga chengte chu akimoh sat piuvin, abonchauvin asugam hel tauve; chujongleh Seir molsanga chengte asuhmang hel phat’uvin jong amaho le amaho akisat to kit nalaiyuvin ahi.

Judahte chu gammang lam vetna inchung sang kisa a chu ahunguva avet’uleh mihonpi chu amu’uvin, abonchan mithi long damsa jeng ahiuvin, tol’a akijam the thu jenguve! mihem khat’a khat jeng cha jong ajamdoh aumpoi.

Jehosh’aphat leh amite chu gal mitea kona thilkeo kichom dinga ahunguva ahileh, gancha atama tam, thilkeo tampi, ponsil ahin, thil mantam ahin akimu’uvin, hiche ho hi amahon akichom’uvin, apoh lel hel kahseuvin akichom’uve. Athilkeo thang chu atam behseh jengin, nithum sungin akichom gunset jenguvin ahi.
Ni li lhin nin amaho abonchauvin Bera’cah phaiya mijat akisimtoh uvin, hikoma chun Pakai avahchoi soh keiyuvin ahi; hichejeh chun hilai mun hi amin Bera’cah phai, tin tuni geiyin akisei nalaiye.

Chujouvin Judahte le Jerusalem mite chu abonchauvin amitakip ahung kile kit’uvin, Jehosh’aphat ahung lamkaiye. Jerusalem kho lama kipah thanomin ahung kile kit tauve; ajeh chu agalteu chunga Pakaiyin akipasah ahitai.
Amaho hi Jerusalem khopia ahunguvin, selangdah le semjang ahin saiyuvin, sumkon amut’un, Pakai houin lang ajontauve.
Pakaiyin Israel melmate dounan gal asat tai, ti thu thang hi akijah a akithandoh phat’in leiset lenggam jouse chunga Pathen ginna ahung lhungtan ahi.
Hijeh chun Jehosh’aphat leng gamsung jong gal athip tai, ajeh chu a-Pathenin akimvel mitea kona chamna kicholdona apeh ahi.

Hitobang hin Jehosh’aphat chun Judahte chunga lengvai-anapoi. Lengvaipoa ahung pan chun ama kum som thum le kum nga alhing tai; chujouvin Jerusalem khopia kum som ni le kum nga sungin lengvai anapon ahi. Anu min chu Azu’bah akitin, Shilhi chanu ahiye.
Jehosh’aphat hi apa Asa chon chonin achonin, lam hilouva achepoi; hiti hin Pakai mitmun thildih jeng anabol’in ahi.
Ahivanginla khomol dunga doiphung ho chu asumang deh hih laiye; mipin jong apu apateu Pathen lama alungthimu angai deh hih laiyuve.
Jehosh’aphat natoh athilbol apatna pat achaina geiyin Hana’ni chapa Jehu thusimbu sunga akijih lut soh keiyin, hichu Israel lengte lekhabua akijih kit tai.
Hiche nung hin Judah gam lengpa Jehosh’aphat hin Israel lengpa Ahazi’ah kitipa chutoh kihoutohna aneiyin. Ahazi’ah hin ama chu thilse bolna lama apuilut tai.
Aman amapa chu Tarshish lama che ding kong innei semna a akithopin, hiche kong innei ho hi E’zion-ge’ber kiti laiya chun asem lhonin ahi.

Chujouvin Mare’shah khoa mi Dodav’ahu chapa Elie’zer chun Jehosh’aphat dounan gaothu aseiyin hitin ati, “Nangman Ahazi’ah toh kithoa na natoh jeh chun nasemsa jouse Pakaiyin asuhmang ding ahi,” ati. Hijeh chun kong innei ho chu akitatjal soh hel’in, Tarshish langa achethei gamtapoi.
Jehosh’aphat jong apu apate toh akijam khomin, David khopia apu a pate toh avuitha tauve; chuin achapa Jeho’ram chun ama khel’in lengvai apotai.

Jeho’ram hin sopi pasal, Jehosh’aphat chapate phabep aneiye, amaho chu Azari’ah, Jehi’el, Zechari’ah, Azari’ah, Michael, chule Shephati’ah ahiuvin; aboncha hi Judah lengpa Jehosh’aphat chapate jeng ahiuve.

Amaho hi apauvin thilpeh manlu tah tah, dangka le sana geiyin anapen, Judah gamsunga kulpi kikaikhum khopi ho leh goulo ding thilman lu lu apei; ahin lenggam vang chu Jeho’ram bou anapen ahi, ajeh chu Jeho’ram hi achapa masapen ahiye.
Jeho’ram hi apa laltouna atoudoh phat’in, ama jong ahung pangdet tan, hijeh chun asopi pasal ho chu chemjam in asat lih gamin, chujongleh Israelte lah a milen milal phabep jong athat’e.
Leng ahung chan chun Jeho’ram hi akum kum som thum le kum ni alhinge; chujouvin Jerusalem khopia kum get sungin lengvai anapoi.
Ama hi Ahab insung mite chonna bangin achonin, Israel lengte chonna nung nung ajuitai; ijeh-inem itileh ajinu chu Ahab chanu anahi. Hijeh chun Jeho’ram hin Pakai mitmun thilse jeng anabol’in ahi.

Hijeng jongleh Pakaiyin David to kitepna khat ananei jeh chun David insung chu asumang deh poi; ajeh chu Pakaiyin David chu thaomei vah a vah ding apeh a chule achapate geiya apeh jing dia kitepna ananei ahi.
Jeho’ram lallaiyin Edom gam injong Judah gam vaihomna ahindouve, hiti hin acham chamin amahon leng khat akitundoh jeng tauvin ahi.

Chuphat’in Jeho’ram jong asepai lamkai jouse leh akangtalai jouse toh akitol’in agalkaitai; chuin jan khang laiyin athoudoh-in, ama umkimvela pang, akangtalai sepai lamkai ho toh abonchauva hin-um tha jeng Edom mite chu asat chap jenguvin ahi.

Hijeh hin tuni geiyin Edom miten Judah gam vaipohna hi adou jing jeng nalaiyui. Hichelai hin ama vaipohna hi Libnah jengin jong anadouvin ahi, ajeh chu aman Pakai apu apate Pathen asuhmil jeh ahipene.

Hicheng kalval jong hin Jeho’ram kitipa hin Judah gamsunga thing lhang gamsung jousea jong khomol dunga doiphung aphutdoh doh jengin, Jerusalem khopia chengte jeng jong chu mi kitahlou tah asogamin, Judah mite chu ava thaisah gamtai.

Hichun Eli’jah themgaopa a konin lekha thot khat ahung lhungin hitin aseiye, “Napu David Pathen, Pakaiyin hitin aseiye, ‘Nangin napa Jehosh’aphat chonna nung jui louva, Judah lengpa Asa chonna jong najop deh loujeh hin,

Israel lengte chonna nung joh najuitan, Judahte leh Jerusalem khopia chengte geiyin mi kitahlou tah nasogamin, Ahab insung miten Israelte kitahlouna lampia apuilut bangin naboltai; chujongleh nang hin nasopi pasal jouse jong nathat gamhel’in, na-insung mi nah nah, nang sang sanga jong mipha cheh pi chu nathat gamtai;
vetan, hijeh a hi Pakaiyin namite chunga gamna hise ahinlansah ding ahitai nachate jong, najite jong chule nanei nagou jouse jong atoh khah ding ahi;

chule nangma mong mongin jong natna gilou tah khat nanei ding, hiche anatna jeh a chu aniseh a khang khanga, nagil jang ho chu ahung lotdoh masangsea kinga louhel ding ahi, nahal hung lha ding ahi,’ tin aseiye,” ati.
Chujongleh Pakaiyin Jeho’ram dou dingin Ethopia mite toh kinaiya cheng, Philistine te leh Arab mite atildoh peh-in ahi;

hijeh chun amaho hi Judah gamsung toh kidou dingin ahung kontou tauve: hiti hin agamsung chu gal ahinbol’uvin, lengpa nei athilkeo amudoh jouseu abonin akipoh manguvin, lengpa chapate leh ajite geiyin atolmang uvin, hijeh chun lengpa dingin achapate khat cha beh jong akhenpeh tapouve, achapa lhumpen tah Jeho’ahaz kitipa seh seh chubou adalhah peh-uvin ahi.
Thilsoh hijatpi nung jong hin Pakaiyin Jeho’ram chu adengin, agiljang chu boldam thei louhel natna khat’in anatsah tai.

Hitia anat nat’a kum ni jen alhin phat’in, hiche anatna jeh hin agiljang ahung lotdoh-in, ahol alhan, genthei hesoh chungnung thoh-in ama jong athitai. Amiten jong apu apateu abolna banguvin jabolna meikong kitih ji chu Jeho’ram dingin atih kong tapouve.

Lengvai ahinpoh pat chun Jeho’ram hi akum kum som thum le kum ni analhing tai, chujouvin Jerusalem khopia chun kum get sungin lengvai anapoi; ama athia abei hin koimacha akhohsah a phamo sa a jong aumpoi. Mihon ama chu David khopia vang avui nauvin, lengte lhankhuh a avuitapouve.

Jerusalem khoa cheng akho miten Jeho’ram chapa lhumpen Ahazi’ah kitipa chu lengpa khel’in lengin atung tauve; ijeh-inem itileh Arab mite toh kilhona hung galkon sepaite chun ngahmun ahindel khum nauva lengpa chapa aupa chengse athagamu ahitai. Hitia hi Jeho’ram Judah lengpa chapa Ahazi’ah hin lengvai ahinpoh ahi.
Lengvaipoa ahung pan pat chun Ahazi’ah kitipa hi akum kum som li le kum ni alhingtan, chujouvin jong kum khat sungin Jerusalem khopia lengvai anapoi. Anu min chu Athali’ah akitin, Omri tunu anahi.
Ahazi’ah jong hi Ahab insung mite chon chonin achontai, ajeh chu hitobang thilse abolna chung changa athu mop’a pangji chu anu bou ahiye.
Ahab insung mite chonna bang bangin aman jong Pakai mitmun thilse jeng anabol’in ahi; ijeh-inem itileh apa thi nunga ama manthahna dinga thu mop’a pang chu Ahab insung mite jeng ahitauve.

Ahazi’ah hi amaho thu mop bang bangin achonin, Israel lengpa Ahab chapa Jeho’ram chutoh akilhonin, Ramoth-gilead langa Syria lengpa Haz’ael toh kisat din akon lhone. Hichea hin Syria miten Joram chu amavotauve.

Akisuh khah phat’in amaha laiho chu kibol dingin Jezreel khoa ahungin ahi, hiche amahaho hi Ramah khoa Syria lengpa Haz’ael toh akisatnaa min amavo ahi. Hitia hi Ahab chapa Joram hi mapua anat phat’in Judah lengpa Jeho’ram chapa Ahazi’ah kitipajong chu Jezreel khoa Joram ve din achesuh tai.

Pathen thilgon dungjuiya Joram vea achepet’a hi Ahazi’ah manthahna ding jong hung lhung ding ahitai. Ijeh-inem itileh Ahazi’ah chu Jezreel kho ahung lhun phat’in, Pakaiyin Ahab insung sumang dinga alhensa Nimshi chapa Jehu toh kimuto din Jeho’ram chutoh kilhonin apotdoh lhonin ahi.

Hikoma Jehun Ahab insung mite chunga phu alah a athagam pet tah hin Judah gama hung kon milen milalte, Ahazi’ah sopite chapate jong amudoh-in, amaho hi Ahazi’ah nung juiya hung ahiuve, amaho jong hi Jehu chun a that gamtai.

Jehun Ahazi’ah jong ahol’in aphetleh loiyin, Samaria khopia akiselnaa aman tai, amat phat’uvin Jehu koma ahinpuiyuva ahileh athat tan ahi. Mihon Ahazi’ah jong chu phaten avui nauve, ajeh chu “Ama hi alungthim pumpia Pakai lam hoi jingpa Jehosh’aphat tupa ahibouve,” atiuvin ahi. Hiche nung hin Ahazi’ah insung mite lah a lenggam sunga vaihom jou ding koima aumtapoi.
Ahazi’ah nu Athali’ah chun achapa thi ahetdoh phat’in akipatdoh-in Judah gamsunga leng insung mite jouse abanchan a that gamtai.

Hichun lengpa chanu Jeho-shab’e-ath kitinu chun Ahazi’ah chapa Jo’ash chu lengpa chapate tha ding koncha um ho lah a konin adom mangin, agudoh-in, ama chuleh ajenlea pangnu chu lupna indan sung khat a akoitai. Hitobang hin lengpa Jeho’ram chanu Jeho-shab’e-ath, Jehoi’ada thempupa jinun, Ahazi’ah sopinu ahijeh-in, Jo’ash chu Athali’ah masanga anasel doh theiyin, hijeh chun amanun jong anathat tapoi.
Jo’ash chu amani chutoh kum gup sungin acheng khomin Pathen houin sunga akisel’e, hiche lai hin gamsunga Athali’ah chu lengvaipon apangin ahi.

Kum sagi lhin kumin Jehoi’ada hi hang tah-in apangin, sepai aja ja lamkaiya pang Jero’ham chapa Azari’ah leh Jeho-ha’nan chapa Ish’mael toh, Obed chapa Azari’ah toh, Adai’ah chapa Ma-asei’ah toh, chule Zichri chapa Elisha’phat chutoh kihoutohna aneitai.

Chuin amaho hi Judah gamsung pumpia acheuvin, Judah gamsunga khopi jousea Levite abonchan akhomsoh keiyuvin, Israel sunga jong apu apauva insung phung upa chengse jong akhom’uvin, mihem hijat chu Jerusalem khopia ahung kikhomsoh keitauve.

Hichun Houbung pumpin Pathen houin sunga chun lengpa toh kitepna khat asemdoh tauve. Chuin Jehoi’ada hin miho jah a aseitai, “Ven, lengpa chapa hi! Pakaiyin David chapate thudola asei bang bangin amahin lengvai po jeng hen.
Nang hon nabol diu thil chu hiche hi ahi: Nangho thempuho leh Levi ho, cholngah nikhoa natong louva umho chu mi hop thuma hop khat kelkot phung dung ngah a napan diu ahi,

chule hop thuma hop khatman lengpa inpi na-ngauva, chutengleh hop thuma hop khatma chun kulpi bul kelkot phung na-nga diu ahi; chutengleh mipi abonchauva Pakai houin sunga indan jousea lhong dim dima kikhom diu ahiye.

Midang koima Pakai houin sunga lut thei louhel ding, thempuho leh kinbola pang Levite bou lut thei diu ahi; amaho hi lut thei nauvinte, ajeh chu amaho hi atheng ahiuvin, mipin vang aboncha Pakai thupeh anit cheh diu ahi.

Levite chun ama ama manchah cheh akichoiyuva lengpa aumkimsoh kei diu, koi koi hijeng jongleh houin sunga hung lut pen pen chu thadoh ding ahijenge. Lengpa chu ahung lut teng jongleh kilhonpiuvin lang apotdoh teng jongleh kilhon piuvin,” ati.

Levite leh Judah miten Jehoi’ada thempupa thupeh dungjui bangin abolsoh keiyuve. Amahon amichang cheh-in cholngah nikhoa kicholdoa natoh neilou ho amiteu chu ahinpuiyun, cholngah nikhoa natoh kinbol ding neiho chutoh akikhomsoh keiyuve; ijeh-inem itileh Jehoi’ada thempupan amaho chu asoldoh lou ahitai.
Chuin Jehoi’ada thempupan masang laiya David lengpa tengcha jouse leh lum jouse, Pathen houin sunga kikoi ho chu, lum neo hihen alen hijongleh aboncha sepai lamkaiho chu apedoh-in ahi;

hiti hin Jehoi’ada in mipi abonchauvin lengpa vetup din apansah soh keiye; miho chun ama ama manchah akhut’a akichoisoh keiyun, houin lhanglama pat’in houin sahlam geiyin akigol’uvin, maicham kimvel leh houin kimvel soh hel’in akigoltauve.

Chutah chun Jehoi’ada in lengpa chapa chu ahinpuidoh in, lallukhuh chu akhuhpeh tai; hichun achunga danthu asimdenin, chuleh ama chu leng ahitai, tin aphongdoh tai; hiti hin Jehoi’ada leh achapaten ama chu leng din thao anu’uvin, aseitauve, “Lengpa hingsot hen!” tin asam’uvin ahi.
Athali’ah chun mipi ogin longdel’a lengpa avahchoi nau ajah doh phat’in Pakai houin sunga mipi henga agache lut tai;

hichun Athali’ah hin aven ahileh, houin sunga hin lengpa chu kotphung koma khompi koma anadingin, sepai lamkaiho leh sumkon mut’a pang ho chu lengpa koma anading uvin ahi, hichea hin mipi abonchauvin gamsunga cheng jouse akipah soh keiyuvin, sumkon amut’uvin lasah a them lathem chengsen tumging thei manchah amanguvin lengchan kinbolna chu alamkaiyuve. Chutah chun Athali’ah hin aponsil jouse abottel jengin, apengjah-in, “Vo leng kidoupipa! leng kidoupipa!” atin ahi.

Hichun Jehoi’ada thempupan sepaite lamkaiya kipansah sepai lamkaiho chu ahinpuidoh-in ajahuva hitin aseiye, “Amanu hi houin leitol langa kaidoh uvin lang, koi koi hijongleh amanu nung jui tapou chu chemjama satlih ding ahi,” ati. Ajeh chu thempupan anaseiya, “Amanu vang hi Pakai houin sunga that hih’uvin“, anati ahi.
Hijeh chun sepai lamkaiten amanu chunga akhut alhauvin, amanu jong lengpa inpi sakol kelkot phunga ajamdoh-in ahileh, hikom ma ma a chun athat den tauve.
Jehoi’adan amaleh mipi chule lengpa kah a hin kitepna khat asemin, mipi abonchauva Pakai mite ahina diuvin abol’in ahi.

Chutah chun mipi abonchan akon’uvin Ba’al doi kihouna in chu ajon’uvin aphe-lha tauve; Ba’al maicham kisem jouse leh milim doi kisem jouse jong avogoiyuvin, maicham kisemho mai laitah a Ba’al thempupa Mattan jong athat tauve.

Jehoi’adan Pakai houin ngah din sepai in-ngah ding akoiyin, amaho hi Levite themput dol a thempua pang Levite hil bang banga chon ding ahiuve, chule hiche Levite hi David chun Pakai houin sunga natoh kinbola pang dinga ana-nganse ahiuvin, Mose danthua kisun banga Pakaiya pumgo thilto jouse tohdoh a panga, David thupehsa dungjuiya, kipah thanoma lasah toh atho diu ahiye.
Chujongleh mitheng lou koimacha houin sunga ahung valut louna dingin Jehoi’adan Pakai houin kelkot phung dung jousea kelkot-ngah mi apansah soh keiyin ahi.

Chujouvin Jehoi’ada hin sepai lamkaiho leh milen milalte, mipi dinga gamvaipoa pang ho, chule gamsunga mipi abon chauvin apuiyin, amaho hin Pakai houina konin lengpa chu ahinpui suh-uvin, lengpa inpi sahlam kelkot phung geiyin ahung kijotsuh uvin ahi. Hiti hin mihon lengpa laltouna chunga atousah tauve.
Hitobang hin gamsung mipi abonchan akipah soh keiyun, Athali’ah chu chemjama atha phat’uvin khopi sunga jong cham alengin athip del tai.
Lengvaipoa ahung pan chun Jo’ash akum kum sagi bou ahinalaiye; chujouvin Jerusalem khopia kum som li sungin lengvai anapoi, anu minjong Zib’iah akitin, Beer-sheba khoa mi ahi.
Jehoi’ada thempupa hinlaisen Jo’ash hin Pakai mitmun thildih jeng anabol nai.
Jehoi’adan Jo’ash dingin ji ni apuipeh in, hiti hin Jo’ash chun chapa jong chanu jong tampi anahingin ahi.
Thilsoh hijat hitia aso nung hin Jo’ash hin Pakai houin semphat dingin agotai.

Hijeh chun aman jong Thempuho jouse leh Levite jouse abonchauvin akhomin ajah uva aseitai, “Judah gamsunga khopi jousea gacheuvin lang, na-Pathenu houin semphatna dingin kumseh leh Israel pumpia konin sum gadong tauvin: chuleh anatoh ding kinloiya nabol doh diu ahi, ti kihet cheh uvin,’ ati. Ahinla Leviten athusei hi anoloi tapoi.

Hijeh chun lengpa’n jong lamkai pipu Jehoi’ada chu akouvin ajah a aseitai, “Ipi dinga nangman masang laiya Pakai lhachapa Mose’n hettohsahna houbuh manchah dinga Israel Houbung poh dia asemsa kai kidongji chu, tugeiya Levite nasol’a Judah gamsung leh Jerusalem khopia kona nadonsah lou ham?” tin adong tai.

Ijeh-inem itileh numei gilou nu Athali’ah chun Pathen houin a dia hitobang kibol ho jong chu asuh manga, Pakai houin a dinga kitohdohsa thil theng akikatdoh chengse jong chu Ba’al doi kisem ho houna aneisoh ahitai.
Lengpan thu apen, mihon sum-thihkong khat asem’uvin, hiche thih-kong chu Pakai houin polama kelkot phunga atunguvin ahi.
Hichun Judah gamsung pumpi leh Jerusalem khopia aphongdoh uvin, gamthip laiya Pathen lhachapa Mose’n Israelte anapohsah Pakai dinga sumdon chu ahinpoh lutna diuvin aseitauve.
Chutah chun milen milalte leh mipi abonchauvin kipah thanomin asumto dingdol’u ahinchoi choi jenguvin, apeh jousoh hel kahseuvin thih-kong sunga alhah lut lut jenguve.

Leviten thihkong chu lengpa vaibol’a pang ho henga ahindop lut phat phat’uleh, thih-kong sunga hi sum tampi um-ah ahitai, ti amudoh tih tih-u chuleh lengpa dinga lekhasuna pangpa leh thempu pipu dinga vaibol’a pangpa chu ahungji lhonin, thihkong chu alhei lha lhonin, akeo ahiphat leh akitunna lui ma maa anung tun kit jiuvin ahi. Hiti hin anisim seh leh abol jing jiuvin, sum thalhingset’in adongdoh tauve.

Chutengleh lengpa le Jehoi’adan asum hi Pakai houin semphatna chung changa natoh vaipoa pang ho apeji lhonin, amahon Pakai houin semphatna dinga thing vaibola pang ho leh thing thembol ho chu apeuvin, Pakai houin semphatna dinga thih-kheng ho leh sumeng kheng ho jong apejiuve.

Houin semphatna ding natoh vaipoa pang hon natoh apatdoh kal’uvin, amaho lamkaiya konin natoh chu aban achal jing jeng tai; hiti hin amahon Pathen houin masanga alim bang bangin asemphauvin, alhousah chom lheh jenguve.

Natong hon houin asemphat soh phat’uvin sum aval chengse chu lengpa le Jehoi’ada angsunga ahinpo lut soh keiyun, hiche sum chun Pakai houin sunga manchah thil le lo akisemin ahi, hiche manchah ho hi houin kinbolna manding leh pumgo thiltoa man ding jeng ahin, gimnamtui lhutnamna ding lheng ho jong, sana le dangkaa kisem bel le kong ho jong ahiuve. Mihon Jehoi’ada hinlaisen vang Pakai houin sunga chun tang louhel’in pumgo thilto abol jing jeng nauve.
Jehoi’ada chu atehse lheh jeng tan, ahinkho jong alhing tai, hijeh chun ama jong athitan ahi; athi chun ahinkho mong mong kum ja khat le kum som thum alhinge.
Jehoi’ada hin Israelte lah a thilpha abol’a chule Pathen lama jong thilpha abola chule Pathen houin dinga thilpha anaboljeh-in David khopia chun lengte toh avuitha tauve.
Jehoi’ada thi nungin Judah gama milen milalte ahung kitol’uvin lengpa chu jabolna ahung neiyuve; lengpan jong amaho thilbol chu pha anasai.
Ahinla amahon Pakai apu apateu Pathen houin chu asumil’uvin, milim doi kisemthu Ashe’rim pou ahoutauve. Hiche athepmonau jeh hin Judah gam le Jerusalem khopi chunga lunghanna ahung lhungtan ahi.
Hijongleh Pathenin amaho hi Pakai henga nung puilut kit din alah uva themgaote anasol kit nalaiye; hiche themgao ho hin amaho themmona jouse agaseipeh vanguvin, amahon iman agel deh pouve.

Hichun Pathen Lhagaovin Jehoi’ada thempupa chapa Zechari’ah kitipa chu chennan amangin, hijeh chun Zechari’ah jong mipi chungvuma ading sangin ajah uva hitin aseitai, “Pathenin hitin aseiyin. ‘Ipi dinga nang hon Pakai thupeh napalkeh-u hitam? Hitobanga hi nakhantou thei louhelna diu nabol diu hita ong? Nang hon Pakai nasuhmil jehuvin aman jong nangho nasumil tauve,’ tin aseiye,” ati.
Ahinla mihon amapa chu ahouseuvin, lengpa thusah a konin Pakai houin indan lhong laitah a Zechari’ah chu songin asep lih tauve.

Hitobang tah hin Jo’ash lengpan Zechari’ah pa Jehoi’adan ama ana khotona aphatna jouse chu geldoh louvin, achapa athapeh del tai. Zechari’ah chu athidi atan konin, “Pakaiyin hinve hen lang phu hinlatei tei hen!” tin aseitai.

Kum lhunin Syria sepaite chu Jo’ash douna galbol dingin ahung kontauve. Syria sepaite chu Judah gama ahung lut’uvin Jerusalem khopia ahungun, mipi lah a mipi dinga pang milen milal jouse asugam’uvin, athilkeo akichomdoh jouseu chu abonchan Damascus lengpa henga athot tauve.

Syria sepaite chu mi lhomcha ahung kon vangun, Pakaiyin amaho khut’a hin Israel sepai tampi apedoh tai; ipijeh-inem itileh amahon Pakai apu apateu Pathen chu asuhmil’u ahitai. Hiti hin Syria mite chu Jo’ash lengpa chunga Pathen din thutanin apanguvin ahi.

Syria miten Jo’ash jong melse tah-in amavouvin, adalhauvin achetauve; hichea jong chu asepaiten Jehoi’ada thempupa chapa atha athisan asojeh chun ahouseuvin, ajalkhuna alupna jenga jong athat den tauve. Hiti hin Jo’ash chu athin, mihon David khopia avuitauve; amavang lengte lhan dunga avuitapouvin ahi.
Jo’ash housea adouva pang ho chu Ammon mi Shim’e-ath chapa Zabad le Moab mi Shimrith chapa Jeho’zabad ahilhone.

Jo’ash chapate thusim, ama min ahousetna thu kiseidoh chengse jong, chule Pathen houin kisah phatna thusim jouse abonchan lengte lekhabu hilchet bua akijih lut soh keiyin ahi. Jo’ash khel’in achapa Amazi’ah chun lengvai apotai.

Amazhi’ah hi lengvaipoa ahung pan chun akum kum som ni le kum nga bou ahinalaiye; chujouvin Jerusalem khopia kum som ni le kum ko sungin lengvai anapoi. Anu min chu Jeho-ad’dan akitin, Jerusalem khoa mi ma ma ahiye.
Amazi’ah hin Pakai mit mun thilpha adih jeng abolnan, ahivangin alungthim chu nolnabeiyin aumdeh poi.
Aman leng thaneina lhingset’a achoi phat’in Amazi’ah chun apa that a pang asepaite chu abonchan athatgamin ahi.

Ahin Mose danthu lekhabua kisei bangin aman achateu vang athatpoi, hichea chu Pakaiyin thu anapeh a, “Chate jeh a pate chu kithat thei lou ding, pate jeh a jong chate kithat thei lou ding ahi, mihemin amichang cheh a ama ama chonset akipoh a athilo cheh ding ahi,” tia anaseisa ahitai.

Amazi’ah lengpan Judah mite abonchan akhomsoh keiyin, Judah mite pumpi leh Benjamin mite abonchauva din apu apauva ainsung lhah dungjui cheh-in agoltoh-in, sepai asang sang lamkaiho leh aja ja lamkaiho noiya akoisoh hel’e. Amazi’ah hin miho chu kum som nia lhah chung lamse asimtoh a ahileh, pasal lhentum, gal sat thei cheh, teng khothema lum heije hecheh, sepai sang ja thum asimdoh-in ahi.
Aman Israelte henga konin jong sepai mihat gal-hang cheh sang ja khat jen dangka talent ja khat peh din athalah-in ati.
Ahinla Pathen mi khat hi ahenga ahungin ahung seitai, “Vo lengpa, Israelte sepai ho khutoh gal konkhom hih-in, ajeh chu Pakaiyin Israelte, hiche Ephraim chate khu apanpi poi.

Hichea hi nangman hiti lamhin bolleng galsat’in hat nange, ti nagel’a ahileh, Pathenin nangma melmate masanga nase-lhah jeng ding ahi; ijeh-inem itileh Pathenin panpina tha jong aneiyin, suh lhahna tha jong aneiye,” ati.

Chuphat’in Amazi’ah jong chun aseipai jengin Pathen mipa jah a chun, “Achutileh keiman Israel sepaite thalahna ding kapehsa dangka talent ja khat i-kalo diba hitam?” atileh; Pathen mipan jong adonbut’in, “Pakaiyin hicheng sanga tamjo jo jong napeh thei ahinai,” atipeh-e.

Chuphat’in Amazi’ah jong chun Ephraim gama kona ama henga hung kitol lut sepaite chu alhadoh soh keiyin, inlama che din asoltai. Hichun amaho hi Judahte chunga halunghan in alung hanguvin, lung hangtah-in inlama ahung kile kit tauve.
Ahivangin Amazi’ah chu hangtah-in apangin, amite apuiyin chikhuh phai langa acheuvin, Se’ir mite sang som jen agathat gamtauvin ahi.
Hichea hin Judahten mihem sang som jong ahingin aman’uvin, abonchan songpi chung khat’a hin apuitouvun, songpi chunga konin ahinsep lhauvin ahileh, miho chu abonin songa akitat gep soh hel’uvin ahi.

Ahin Amazi’ah lengpa’n anungsol kit, amato galmuna akilhonpi nom lou Israel sepaite chun Judah gamsunga khopi jouse ahinbu lu’uvin, Samaria khopia pat Beth-hor’on geiyin gal ahinbol’uvin, khopi sung dunga mihem sang thum jen athat’uvin, thilkeo jong tampi akichomdoh tauve.

Amazi’ah chu Edom mite athagamna galmuna kona ahung kile kit phat’in, Se’ir gam miten pathen lim akisemthuu doi ho chu ahinpon, hicheho pi hi ama hou din doiyin amangin, chibai jong aboh-in, thilto jong atopeh jin ahi.

Hichejeh hin Amazi’ah chunga Pakai alunghang tan, ahenga themgao khat ahinsol tai, hiche themgaopa hin Amazi’ah jah a aseiyin, “Ipi dinga nangman hiche doi anahou amite jeng bon nangma khut’a kona huhdoh thei lou hiche pathen lim doi kisemthuho hi nadeiya nahou hitam?” tin adongtai.

Hitia hi themgaopan thu aseipet hin lengpa’n jong ajah a aseiyin, “Nang hi leng insung thumop’a kakoiyu nahimo? Ngan seidan! Ikhoh a nang nakithat ding ham?” tin aphoh tai. Chuphat’in themgaopan jong athusei angan, ahivanginla aseitai, “Nangin hitobang thilse hi nabola, keima thumop na-ngailou jeh hin Pathenin nangma nasuh mang tei tei ahitai, ti keiman kahetai,” ati.

Hichun Judah lengpa Amazi’ah hin mitoh kihoutohna aneiyin, Israel lengpa Jehu tupa, Jeho’ahaz chapa Jo’ash henga mi asol’in hi tin agaseisah-e, “Hung konin, kimaiton ahat adoi kivete,” agatisah-in ahi.

Chuin Israel lengpa Jo’ash chun Judah lengpa Amazi’ah henga thu agathot kit’in, “Lebanon lhanga keh lingphung khat hin Lebanon lhangma maa keh cedar thing phung henga thu agah thot’in, ‘Nachanu chu kachapa ji dingin neihin pen,’ tia agah noa ahileh; hiche kah chun Lebanon lhanga hin gamsa ngol khat ahung vah len, lingphung chu ahinjot pan achonbong del tai.

Nangin jong naseiyin, ‘Vetan, keiman Edom mite kasugam tai,’ natin; nalungthim chun namoh choisanga nakiletsah lo ahitai. Tun in-muna ki-um thim jengin, ipi dinga nangman kinahna naboldoh a, nakise-lhuh loa nangle Judahte agoma nalhuh lhamlo diu ham?” ati.
Ahivanginla Amazi’ah chun angai deh poi; ijeh-inem itileh Judah ten Edom mite doihou ahou phat’uva Pathenin amaho hi agalteu khut’a peh doh ding agot’a, hitobanga hi agonjoh ahibouve.
Hijeh chun Israel lengpa Jo’ash chu gal akontouvin, ama le Judah lengpa Amazi’ah chu Judah gamsunga Bethshemesh kiti laiya hin galmuna akisat lhonin, kimaiton ahat adoi akive lhone.
Hichun Israelten Judahte ajouvun, Judahte chu amitakip ama ama inlam cheh a ajamlut soh tauve.

Israel lengpa Jo’ash jong chun Judah lengpa Amazi’ah chu ahingin amanin ahi; Amazi’ah hi Jo’ash chapa ahin, Jo’ash chu Ahazi’ah chapa ahiye! Beth-shemesh galmuna amat ahin, Jerusalem khopi geiyin ahinkaiyin, chujongle Jerusalem kulpi pal chu Ephraim kelkot phunga pat kulpi ning kelkot phung geiyin tong ja li jen avochim tai.

Chutengleh Pakai houin sunga kikhol sana le dangka abonchan akilah-in, angah pa O’bed-e’dom geiyin amat thai; chujongleh lengpa inpi sunga thil kikhol chengse jong alan, insunga lhacha numei ho geiyin amanin, chujouvin Samaria khopi lama ahung kile kit tai.
Israel lengpa Jeho’ahaz chapa Jo’ash thi nungin Judah lengpa Jo’ash chapa Amazi’ah chu kum som le kum nga ahing nalaiye.
Amazi’ah natoh athilbol adang dang, apatna pat achaina geiya aboncha Judah le Israel lengte lekhabua kisun cheh hilou ham?

Amazi’ah hi Jerusalema Pakai koma kona akihei manga pat, mihon ama douna asem’uvin, hijeh chun ama jong Lachish kho langa ajam mangtai. Ahinla mihon Lachish kho geiyin jong anung del ding mi asol’uvin Lachish khoa agathat den tauve.
Chuin Amazi’ah long damsa chu sakolte ahinpoh sah-uvin, David khopia apu apate toh avuitha tauve.
Judah gam mite akihoutoh soh keiyuvin kum som le kum gup bep hinalai, Uzzi’ah kitipa chu aman’uvin apa Amazi’ah khel din lengvai apohsah uvin ahi.
Amahin lengpa athia apu apatetoh akijamkhom nungin Eloth khopi asaphan, Judahte dingin alalut kit tai.

Lengvaipoa ahung pan hin Uzzi’ah hi akum kum som le kum gup bou ahinalaiye. Chujouvin kum som nga le kum ni sungin Jerusalem khopia lengvai anapoi. Anu chu amin Jecoli’ah akitin, Jerusalem khosung mi ahi.
Ama jong hin apa Amazi’ah chonna bangin Pakai mitmun thilpha adih jeng anabol’in ahi.
Pathen ginje anahiljipa Zechari’ah hinlaisen vang amale ama aki-eng bol jin Pathen lam ahol jing jeng nai; hitia hi aman Pakai ahol khoh laisen Pathenin ama chu akhantousah sah jengin-ahi.

Uzzi’ah hi apotdoh-in Philistinete dounan gal agabol’in, Gath khopi pal aga vochim in, Jabneh khopi pal le Ashdod khopia pal kikaijouse jong aga vochim tai; chujongleh Ashdod gamkai sung dung leh mundang dang Philistinete lah a jong khopi asadoh doh jengin ahi.
Pathenin jong amahi Philistine te adouna a jong apanpin, Gurba’al gama cheng Arab mite adouna a jong panpin, chule Meun mite toh akisatna a jong apanpi.
Ammon mitenjong Uzzi’ah hi kai anapeuvin, Egypt gamgi chan geiyin amin akithang soh hel’e; ijeh-inem itileh Uzzi’ah hi ahung thahat lheh jengtan ahi.
Hicheng kalval jong hin Uzzi’ah chun Jerusalem khopia pal ningkoi kelkot phung le phaicham kelkot phung, in-ing kisuh tona lai, hichengsea hin insang asadohin, abonchan kulpi akaikhum e.

Gammang lah jenga jong insang asan, twi putna ding songko tampi jong avut’in ahi; ijeh-inem itileh aman phai dung leh Shephe’lah dunga chun gancha tampi avul’in akhole, chujongleh thing lhang gamsunga jong loubol ding mite ahin, akoiyin, leiset phatna lai laiya achen sahin lou abolsah-e; hijeh chun leipha lai adeiyin ahi.

Hicheng tailouvin jong Uzzi’ah hin sepai tampi, gal sat thei cheh, aloi loiyin akoiyin, amaho hi lengpa dinga sepai lamkaiho lah ami Hanani’ah kitipa lamkaina a konin, sepai jat chu vaibola pang Ma-asei’ah leh lekhasuna pang Je-i’el chun simtohsan akoi lhonin ahi.
Apu apateu insung lhah a phung upa cheh mihat gal-hang cheh chu abon chauvin mijat asima ahileh sang ni Je jagup alhinguve.
Lamkai hicheng noiya hin sepai sang jathum le sang sagi toh, ja nga aum’uve, amaho chu lengpa kitho’pia amelmate douva, itobanga thahat hijongleh gal’a kidintepi thei ahiuvin ahi.

Sepai hijatpi ding hin Uzzi’ah hin lum asemin, tengcha akhenpeh-in, thih lukhuh asempeh-in, thih-sangkhol abolpeh-in, thalpi asuipeh-in, setho din song chang geiyin alokhompeh-in, songbom asempeh soh keiyin ahi.

Jerusalem khopia hin thalpi kapna ding leh songtum len len kapdohna dingin, insang dunga koi ding, in-ningkoi dunga koi din khol thanei khat asemdoh-in, akhol mong mong hi mi khut themten asemdoh-u ahiye. Uzzi’ah hi ahung thahat doh mong mong kahsen Pathenin kidang tah-in akithopin ahileh, gamtina amin akithangsoh tai.

Ahinla ahung thahatdoh phat’in Uzzi’ah chu amanthahna dingin ahung kiletsah tai. Ijeh-inem itileh ama chu Pakai a-Pathen henga ajouvin achontan, Pakai houin danlen laiya alut’in, gimnamtui halna maicham phunga chu gimnamtui halnam din agoi.
Hichea hin Azari’ah thempupan mihat gal-hang cheh Pakai thempu jeng jeng mihem som get apuiyin Uzzi’ah nung ajuitauve;

amaho hin lengpa Uzzi’ah chu ana lamtin’uvin ajah a aseitauve, “Uzzi’ah, Pakai dia gimnamtui lhutnam ding chu nangma kin ahipoi, Aaron chapate thempuho bol ding akinu ahibouve; amaho hi gimnamtui hal nam ding mong monga kithensosa ahitauvin ahi. Hijeh chun munthenga konin potdoh jengin; ajeh chu nangman thildih lou nabol ahitai, hiche nabol hin Pakai Pathena kona jabolna namusah louhel ding ahi,” atipeh uvin ahi.

Chutah chun Uzzi’ah jong alung hang lheh jeng tai. Hichepet a hi Uzzi’ah chun akhut’a gimnamtui halnamna lheng khat akidop pet ahin, hitia thempuho chunga ahung lunghan phat’in Pakai houin sunga gimnamtui halnamna maicham phung koma adinna a chun thempuho angsung laitah a amaichang achalpang aphah paiyin tiphah-in atutai.

Hichun thempu pipu Azari’ah leh thempu dang jousen avet’uva ahileh, vetan, Uzzi’ah chu achalpang aphah soh hel’e! Chuphat’in amahon jong amapa chu asondoh loi jenguvin, ama jong kinloi tah-in apotdoh tan ahi, ajeh chu Pakaiyin aden ahitai.

Hitobang hin Uzzi’ah lengpa chu athi ni geiyin miphah-in aumtai, miphah ahitah jeh-in ahinlaiyin jong inchom khat’a achenge; ijeh-inem itileh ama hi Pakai houin a jong kilutsah louva kipaidoh ahi. Hichea hin achapa Jotham chun leng inpi sunga vai apon, chujongleh gamsung mite chunga jong vai anahom e.
Uzzi’ah natoh athilbol adang dang apatna pat achaina geiyin Amoz chapa Isaiah themgaovin anasun in ahi.

Chujouvin Uzzi’ah jong apu apate toh akijam khomin mihon ama jong hi lengte lhan-mol a apu a pate toh avuitha tauve; ijeh-inem itileh mihon aseiyuvin, “Ama vang hi miphah ahibouve,” atiuvin ahi. Chuin achapa Jotham chun ama khel’in lengvai apotai.
Lengvaipoa ahung pan chun Jotham chu akum kum som ni le kum nga alhing tai, chujouvin kum som le kum gup sungin Jerusalem khopia lengvai anapoi. Anu min chu Jeru’shah akitin, Zadok chanu ahiye.
Jotham jong hin apa Uzzi’ah chonna bang bangin Pakai mitmun thildih anabol’in ahi. Amavang hi Pakai houin munthenga alut tapoi. Mipi vang chun chon chatvaina jeng abol bol nalaiyuve.
Jothamin Pakai houin sahlam kelkot jong asemin, Ophel palvum jong in tampi asah ben ahi.
Hiche kalval jong hin Jotham chun Judah gam thinglhang dunga jong khopi tamtah asadoh-in, thing lah jeng lhang sang dunga jong kulpi akaiyin chule insang tampi asai.

Ammon mite lengpa jong akisat pin, Ammon mite ajouvin; hiche kum chun Ammon miten Jotham chu dangka talent ja khat suhlou chang ate-na Cor sang som dim, sakol chang sang som dim ma toh apeuvin ahi. Hijatma ma hi Ammon miten kum ni lhin kum le kum thum lhin kumin jong ape kit’uve.
Jotham hi akiheina alamlhah jouse Pakai a-Pathen angsung jenga a vale jeh-in ahung thahat doh tan ahi.
Jotham natoh athilbol adang dang, agalsat thusim ho hihen, alamlhah achon chan ho hijongleh, ven, abonchan Israel le Judah lengte lekhabua akiJih lutsoh keiyin ahi.
Lengvaipoa ahung pan chun Jotham akum kum som ni le kum nga alhing tai, chujou-in Jerusalem khopia kum som le kum gup sungin lengvaipon anapange.
Chuin Jotham jong apu apate toh akijam khomin, mihon along chu David khopia avuitauve; hichun achapa Ahaz kitipan ama khel’in lengvai apotai.

Lengvaipoa ahung pan hin Ahaz hi akum kum som ni alhing bep’in, chujouvin jong kum som le kum gup sungin bou Jerusalem khopia lengvai anapoi. Ahaz hin apu David bangin Pakai mitmun thildih anabol hih-e;
Israel lengte chonna bangin achonjoi. Amahin Ba’al doi ho chu alim akisemthun akilhahjol’in ahiye;

hiti hin Hinnom chapa phaichama jong gimnamtui alhut jin doi ahouve, hichea hin masang laiya Pakaiyin Israel chate masanga adelmangsa namtin vaipi ho chonna thet umtah adoihouvu bangin Ahaz jong hin achapate geiyin kithoinan anatoh doh jingin pumgo thilton agouvam jenge.
Hitobangma hin khomol dunga doiphung jouse leh lhang sang lai jouse, thingna dum noi jousea kilhaina abol’in gimnamtui alhut namle lei.

Hichejeh hin Pakai a-Pathenin amahi Syria lengpa khut’a apedoh jengin, hijeh chun Syria lengpa’n amahi akisat pin ahileh ajouvin, amite tamtah jong galhingin akai mangin Damascus khopia ahinkai lut tai. Ahaz hi Pathenin Israelte khut’a jong anapedoh kit’e, Israelten akisat piuvin, sepai tamtah athapeh-uvin ajoutauve.

Ijeh-inem itileh Remali’ah chapa Pekah kitipa chun nikhat sung seh seh-in Judah gamsunga mihem sang ja khat le sang som ni athat gamhel’in, athaho hi mihat gal-hat jeng ahiuve; amaho hin Pakai apu apateu Pathen asuhmil jeh-uva hitia hi athasah ahitai.
Ephraim mite lah a mihat khat Zichri kitipa chun lengpa chapa Ma-asei’ah le leng inpi ngah-a pang sepai lamkaipa Azri’kam toh, lengpa ban tah a athanei chungnung pen Elka’nah kitipa chu athat’in ahi.

Israel chaten asopiteu chu mihing sang ja ni jen. numei ho leh achateu pasal numei jeng gal-hangin akaiyun, Judah tea konin thilkeo tamtah akichomdoh uvin, hiche thilkeo chengse chu Samaria khopia ahinpo lut tauve.

Hiche lai hin Samaria Pakai themgao khat anachengin, amapa chu amin Oded akiti; hiche themgaopa hi Samaria khopi hinjon sepaite chutoh kimuto din apotdoh-in, chule sepaite jah a agaseiyin. “Vetan, Pakai napu napateu Pathenin lunghan man a Judah mite chu nangho khut’a apeh doh ahin, hichea hin nang hon amaho chu melse tah-in nabol uvin nathat gamtauve, chule hiche thudol hi van gam geiyin akithang lut tan ahi.

Chujongle tua hi nang hon Judahte leh Jerusalem mite hi suhnem’a pasal numei aboncha soh a vul din nagouve. Hichea hi nangho Pakai na-Pathenu dounaa nangho le nangho chonset kiboh khum nahiu hilou ham?
Hijeh chun tun kasei ngaiyuvin lang, nasopiteu gal-hinga nahinkai chengseu chu abonchan nung soltauvin, ajeh chu nachunguva Pakai lungsatna kitumsave vun aumtai,” agati.

Ephraim chate lah a lamkai pipu phabep jong, Joha’nan chapa Azari’ah ahin, Meshil’lemoth chapa Berechi’ah ahin, Shallum chapa Jehizki’ah ahin, Hadlai chapa Ama’sa ahin, galmuna kona hung kitol miho dou din ading changmel jenguvin,

ajah uva aseitauve, “Galhinga nahinkaiyu miho chu hikoma nahin kailut louhel diu ahi; ijeh-inem itileh nang hon tua keiho chonset chung sap’a Pakai douna thil bol a keiho chunga themmona koibe pehding nei got u ahibouve. Ajeh chu tujenga jong kachonset nau gihsa behseh jenga Israel douna Pakai lungsaa kitumsa vevua um-ah ahitai,” atiuve.
Hijeh chun gal manchah kipoh sepaiten milen milalte leh Houbung pumpi masanga gal-hing akai jouseu leh thilkeo achomdoh chengseu chu adalhauvin ahi.

Chuphat’in amina kiminphah chengse chu akipatdoh uvin galhinga hung kikaiho chu apuiyun, thilkeo kichomdoh chengse jong alauvin, alah uva nichen ponsil beiya asagoh keova umho chu asilpeh-uvin achenpeh tauve; galhinga kikaiho chu pon asilpeh-uvin, kengchot asepeh uvin, an neh ding apeuvin twi don ding apeuve, chutengleh alu ‘u thao anupeh soh keiyun ahi; chujongleh alah uva alhasam chengse chu sangante chunga atousah-uvin, tumthing ke-na Jericho khopia chun ainkoteu henga atol lut tauve. Amaho hi agathah lut phat’uvin amaho jong Samaria khopi lama ahung kile kit tauvin ahi.
Hiche lai hin Ahaz lengpa’n Assyria lengpa kithopina thum dingin mi asoltai.
Ijeh-inem itileh Edom mite chu ahung kon’uvin Judah gama gal ahung bol’uva mi tamtah gal-hinga akai manguva gal ajou ahitai.

Philistine ten jong phaitol dung achom chom jenguva, Judah gamsunga Negeb gam dungjong achom gamget gut jengu ahitan, chule Beth-shemesh khopi le Ai’jalon khopi, Gede’roth khopi, Soco khopi leh akhoneo dung jouse jong akilahsoh gamu ahitai. Timnah le akhoneo dung, Gimzo le akhoneo jouse, alah uva chenpha aneisoh-u ahi.
Ijeh-inem itileh Israel lengpa Ahaz jeh a Pakaiyin Judahte chu asuhnem mong mong ahitai, ajeh chu Ahaz hin Judah gamsunga ngol hoi hoi thu aseiyin na atongin, Pakaiya kitahna beihel’in anaume.
Hijeh chun Assyria lengpa Til’gath-pilne’ser kitipa chu Ahaz toh kisat din ahung konin, ama kithopia hatsah tah sangin abolgenthei lheh jengin ahi.

Hiche phat hin Ahaz hin Pakai houin sunga kikoi, lengpa inpi sunga kikoi, milen milalte insunga thil kikoi jouse mangmaiyin amaiyin, Assyria lengpa henga kaiyin apetai; ahivanginla hiche abol jong chu aphachom deh tapoi.
Hitobanga agim genthei phat hin Pakai henga akitahmo cheh kit tai, hiche Ahaz leng kitipa hi!

Ijeh-inem itileh Damascus khopia min ahouvu pathen lim kisemthu doiho chu ahouve, hiche doi kihouho jeh a hi aman gal analelsa ahitan, ahivangin aman anaseiyin, “Syria gama kihou pathen lim kisemthu doiho khun amaho apanpi jeh a Syria lengte hatji ahiuve, keijong eikithopina diuvin keiman jong hiche ho koma hin kilhaina bol inge,” ati ahi. Ahinla hiche abol ho hi ama le Israel pumpi dinga manthahna hung hikha ahitai.

Chuin Ahaz hin Pathen houin sunga bel le lheng le kong jouse alan, hiche Pathen houin sunga bel le lheng le kong jouse chu abansat goi soh keiyin, chujouvin Pakai houin kotpi jouse akam khumtai. Hichun Jerusalem khopi veng ningkoi lai jousea ama cham chamin maicham akisemdoh doh jenge.

Judah gamsunga khopi jousea jong Ahaz hin pathen lim semthu jat chom chom henga gimnamtui lhutnamna dingin khomol dung doiphung asemdoh soh keiye, hiti hin Pakai apu apateu Pathen aphin lung hang hang jengin ahi.
Ahaz natoh athilbol adang dang apatna pat achaina geiyin vetan, Judah le Israel lengte lekhabua akijih nan ahi.

Chuin Ahaz jong apu apate toh akijamkhomin, mihon ama jong hi Jerusalema khopi sunga avuitauve, ajeh chu Israel lengte lhankhuh sunga apolut tapouvin ahi. Hichun achapa Hezeki’ah kitipan ama khel’in lengvai apotai.
Kum som ni le kum nga alhinin Hezeki’ah kitipa hi lengvaipon ahung pang pantai; Jerusalem khopia kum som ni le kum ko sungin lengvai anapoi. Anu chu amin Abi’jah akitin, Zechari’ah chanu ahiye.
Apu David natoh thilbol bang bangin Hezeki’ah hin Pakai mitmun thildih jeng anabol’in ahi.
Alengvaipoh kipat kum, lha khat lhin nan Hezeki’ah hin Pakai houin kotpi jouse ahongdoh soh keiyin, abonchan asemphai.
Hezeki’ah hin thempuho leh Levite chu abonchauvin apuilut’in, niso lam kholai sunga akhomin,

chuin ajah uva aseitai, “Kathusei ngaiyuvin Levite! Tun nangho le nangho jong kisuthenguvin lang, Pakai napu napateu Pathen houin jeng jong suthenguvin, chule muntheng phunga konin thil atheng lou jouse gapodoh tauvin.

Ijeh inem itileh ipu ipateu chu kitah louvin anachonun, Pakai i-Pathenu mitmun thil dihlou jeng anabol tauve; amahon Pathen asumil’uvin, Pakai chenna muna konin amai asep khup’uvin ahei mang tauve, hiti hin anung angatsoh hel’uvin ahi.
Amahon houin hongcha kotpi jouse jong akhah-uvin, kelngoi jouse jong adeljam’uvin, muntheng phunga chun Israel Pathen henga din gimnamtui jong alhut nam pouvin, pumgo thilto jong atoh tapouve.

Hichejeh hin Judah gam le Jerusalem chunga Pakai ahung lung hangin, amite hi mihem kidah dah-in aumdoh sah tai, min adatmouvin, aphisat khumin, hitobang hin tunin nanghon jong namit tah-uvin namutauve.
Ajeh chu vetan, ipu ipateu chemjama alousoh keiyun, hitobanga achonjeh-u hin ichateu pasal numei geiyin, ijiteu jong min sohchang gal-hingin akaitauvin ahi.
Tun hiche Pakai lungsatna hi eihoa kona akitoldoh theina din keiman Pakai Israel Pathena kitepna khat sem ding kalungin kagel’in ahi.
Kachapate, nang hon ima nahsah mon bol loujen’uvin, ajeh chu Pakaiyin nangho ama angsunga ding jinga, akinbola panga, alhacha panga, ama henga gimnamtui lhutnam dinga nalhendohsau ahitai,” ati.

Chutah chun Levi miho chu akipatdoh soh keitauve; amaho chu Amasai chapa Mahath le Azari’ah chapa Jo’el toh, chule Ko’hath chapate lah a konin mi ahung panguvin, amaho chu Merar’i chapate lah-a mi Abdi chapa Kish le Jehal’lelel chapa Azari’ah toh, chutengleh Gershon chapate lah-a Zimmah chapa Jo’ash le Jo’ah chapa Eden toh ahiuve;
chule Eliza’phan chapate lah ami Jeu’el chapa Shimri ahin, Asaph chapate lah a konin jong Zechari’ah leh Mattani’ah ahilhone.
Heman chapate lah a konin Jehu’el le Shim’e-i ahilhonin, Jedu’thun chapate lah a konin Shemai’ah leh Uz’ziel ahilhone.
Amaho hin asopite chengseu akoukhomsoh keiyun, chuin amaho le amaho akisuthenguvin, Pakai thusah a kona Pakai houin suh thengna dingin lengpa’n thu apeh banguvin houin sunga alut tauve.

Thempuho se se chu Pakai houin theh gimsel din houin dan sung nunga alut’uvin, thempuhon Pakai houin sunga, Pakai houin lhong laiya thilboh atheng lou jouse amudoh chan’u ahinpo doh doh jenguvin ahi; hitobang thilboh ho hi Leviten alason kit’uvin, Kidron vadung pang langa apomang mang tauve.

Amaho intheh dia lha masapen, ni masa nia kipan ahiuvin, chuche lha, niget lhin nin Pakai houin hongcha ahinphauve; hiti hin niget sungin Pakai houin asuthengun, lha masapen, nisom le nigup lhin nin vang atheh gimsoh heltauve.

Hichun amaho jong lengpa Hezeki’ah henga alut’uvin agaseitauve. “Keihon Pakai houin chu apumpin katheh gimsoh hel’uvin, pumgo thiltona maicham phung le athilkeo manchah jouse jong kasugim’uvin, changlhah kitohdoh kigolna ji dokhang leh amanchah jouse jong katheh gimtauve.

Chujongleh Ahaz lengpa’n lengvai apoh laiya akitah louna lama houin manchah asuh chatvai jouse jong chu keihon mantheiyin kasemdoh soh keiyuvin, kasutheng soh keitauve: vetan hiche ho hi Pakai maicham maiya akikoisoh keiye.” atiuvin ahi.
Chuphat’in Hezeki’ah lengpa jong matah-in athouvin, khopi sunga vaipoa pangjouse akhomsoh keiyin, chuin Pakai houin lama achetoutai.

Miho hin lenggam chonset thensona ding leh muntheng thensona ding chule Judah gam chonset thensona dingin bongchal sagi leh kelngoichal sagi toh, kelchal sagi jen chonset thiltoa todoh din ahinkaiyuvin ahi. Hichun Hezeki’ah lengpa’n jong gancha hijatpi hi Aaron chapate thempuho chun Pakai maicham chunga chu atodoh diuvin aseipeh tai.

Aaron chapaten bongchal ho chu athat’uvin, chuin thempuhon athisan chu athal’un maicham maiya athekhum khum jenguvin ahi: hitobang hin kelngoichal ho jong chu athat’uvin, athisan u jong chu maicham maiya athekit tauve; chujongleh kelngoite jong a that’uvin athisanse se chu maicham maiya atheuvin ahi.
Chujouvin chonset thiltoa todoh ding kelchal ho chu lengpa le Houbung mite henga ahinkai lut pai paiyun, lengpa leh Houbung miten achunga akhut angamtauve.

hichun thempuhon kelchalse se chu athat’uvin, maicham phunga chonset thilto abol’un, Israel pumpi din thoidamna khat asempeh tauve. Ijeh-inem itileh pumgo thilto leh chonset thilto chu Israel pumpi dinga kibol ding ahi, tia lengpa’n thu apehsa ahitai.

Hezeki’ah hin David le lengpa mitva neipa Gad toh chule Nathan themgaopa thupeh dungjuiyin Levi miho chu Pakai houin sunga atousah soh keiyin, khutbeh le selangdah toh chule semjang saiging ding akichoisah soh keiyin ahi; ijeh-inem itileh hiche thupeh hi Pakaiya hung kon, athemgaotea kona hung kiphongdoh ahi.
Hijeh chun Levite chu David’in manchah tumging thei asemho pumin adingun, thempuse sen sumkon akichoisoh keiyuve.

Hichun Hezeki’ah chun thu apen, maicham chunga chu pumgo thilto todoh din aseipeh tai. Chuin pumgo thilto akibol pat phat chun, Pakai vahchoina la jong asapantauve; chujongle sumkon chengse amut’uvin Israel lengpa David semdoh tumging theijouse jong akitum gingtan ahi.
Chuin Houbung pumpin Pathen chibai abohuvin, lathem jousen la asauvin, sumkon mut them chengsen jong sumkon amut’uvin, hitobang tah hin pumgo thilto kin kibol chaisoh kahsen abol bol jenguvin ahi.
Thilto kin akichaisoh phat vangin, lengpa leh amatoh umkhom mipi jouse jong akun cheh-uvin chibai aboh soh keiyuve.

Chutah chun Hezeki’ah lengpa leh milen milal jousen jong Levite chu David le mitva neipa Asaph sei bangin Pakai henga vahchoi la asah diuvin atil tauve. Hijeh chun amahon jong kipah thanomin vahchoi la asauvin, chuin akun cheh-uvin chibai aboh tauve.

Hezeki’ah chun aseitai, “Tua hi nangho le nangho Pakaiya kisutheng nahiu ahitai; hijeh chun hung nailut’uvin lang Pakai houin sunga kilhaina thilto leh thangvahna thilto ding hinpo lut lut jenguvin,” atitai. Hijeh chun Houbung miten jong kilhaina thilto ding leh thangvahna thilto ding jeng ahinchoi choi jengtauve: koi koi hijongleh alungthima thanoma atonom jousen jong pumgo thilto ding ahinchoi choiyuvin ahi.

Hikoma Houbung miten pumgo thiltoa to dinga ahin kailut mong mongu chu bongchal som sagi alhingin, kelngoichal ja khat ahin, kelngoi ja ni alhinge; gancha hijatpi hi aboncha Pakai henga pumgo thiltoa to ding ahisoh keiye.
Chutengleh thensonasa thilto kitohdoh chengse chu bongchal jagup alhingin, kelngoi sang thum alhinge.

Hichea hin thempuho chu mi alhom behseh jenguvin, pumgo thiltoa kitoh gancha jouse chu abonchan avun alip soh jou tapouve, hijeh chun thempu dang dang ho jong amaho le amaho akisuh theng kah-uva din asopiteu Levi ho chun ana kithopiu vin, anatoh achai kahseuvin anahu ‘uve; ijehinem itileh hitobanga akisuh theng nauva hi thempuho sanga Levite chu alungthimu dihjo ahiuve.

Pumgo thilto hijat kalval jong hin chamna thilto sathao jouse jong aumna laiye; chujongle donthei lengpitwi thilto pumgo thiltoa manchah ding jong ahikit nalaiyin ahi. Hitobang hin Pakai houin sunga houin kinbol dan jouse chu akisemthah soh keitan ahi.
Hichea hin mipi dinga Pathen thilbolna chung changa Hezekiah lengpa jong mipi jong abonchan akipah soh keiyuve! ajeh chu hitobang thilsoh hi kinloi tah a kikheldoh thei jeng ahi.

Hezeki’ah chun Israel pumpi heng le Judahte henga mi asol’in chule Ephraim mite leh Manas’seh mite henga jong lekha athot’in, abonchauva Jerusalem khopia Pakai houin a ahunguva, Pakai Israel Pathen henga kalchuh kut ahung manna diuvin akousah tai.
Ijehinem itileh lengpa amilen amilalte toh, Jerusalema Houbung pumpin kihoutohna aneiyuva, lha ni lhin phat leh kalchuh kut bol dinga pha asah-u ahiye.
Ipijeh inem itileh thempuho jong thalhingset’a kisutheng loulai, mipi Jerusalem khopia hung kikhom kim loulai ahijeh-uva kalchuh kut hi aphat cha anabol thei louvu ahi.
Hitobanga athilgonu hi lengpa le Houbung mite mit vetdol’in adih jon akihei.

Hijeh chun amahon Israel gam pumpia aphongjal’uvin, Beer-sheba khoa pat Dan khopi geiyin aseipeh soh keiyun, mipi abonchauva Jerusalem khopia hung soh keiyuva, Pakai Israel Pathen henga kalchuh kut aman diuvin aseipeh tauve; ajeh chu hiche kut hi akisei jat banga ananit khah louvu ahitai.

Hiti chun lengpa insunga natonga pang miho chu Israel gam pumpi leh Judah gamsunga akithechan soh keiyun, lengpa le amilen amilaltea konin lekha thot tampi apouvin, hiche lekha thot’a hin hitin aseiyin thu apetai, “Vo Israel mite, Pakai Abraham Pathen, Issac Pathen, Israel Pathen henga hung kile kit tauvin, chutileh ama jong nangho Assyria lengpa khut vangkah a toldoh ho henga hung kile kit thei ding ahin, athimoh avaldoh chengse hi nahung vil kit diu ahi.

Napu napateu chon bangin chondauvin, nasopiteu chon bangin jong chon hih-uvin, amaho chu Pakai a-Pathenu henga kitahna beiyin anaum’uvin, hijeh chun aman jong tua namu banguva hi ahomkeova akoiyu ahitan ahi.

Tun jong napu napateu bangin louchal hih hel’uvin, nangho le nangho Pakai henga kipedoh jenguvin lang, amuntheng hi hinjon cheh-uvin, hiche hi aman atonsot geiya dinga athenso ahitai, chujongle Pakai na-Pathenu chu houvun jenleuvin, chutileh nachunguva alunghanna kichat umtah hi kitol mang thei ding ahi.

Ijeh-inem itileh hitia hi nangho Pakai henga nahung kile kit’uva ahileh, nasopiteu leh nachateu chunga amaho gal-hinga kaimangte avoujangu hung nan tin alainatpi diu, chutengleh amaho hiche gama hung kile kit thei diu ahi. Ijeh-inem itileh Pakai nangho Pathenpa hi milungset them leh mihepi themtah ahin, nangho ama henga nahung kile kit’uva ahileh, aman amai ahei mang louhel ding ahi,” ati.

Lengpa insunga natong ho chu akitol’uvin, khopi khat’a konin khopi khat agalkaiyun, Ephraim gamsung leh Manas’seh gamsung ajot soh keiyun, Zebulun gam chan geiyinjong achetauve: ahinla mihon amaho hi anuisat bep’uvin, ahouseuvin, tot nopnan aneitauve.
Asher phunga mi phabep le Manas’seh phunga mi phabep toh, chule Zebulun phunga mi phabep bou ahung ki-ngaitom’uvin Jerusalem khopia ahung bepseuvui.
Pakai thusah a kona lengpa le milen milalte thusei sei aboldoh jeng theina diuvin Judah gam mite lung khatseh hisahna dingin achunguva Pathen khut’in vai ahomtan ahi.
Lha ni lhin nan cholsolou changlhah kut mang din Jerusalem khopia mipi tamtah ahung kikhom’uvin. Houbung lhingset ahitauve.
Miho hin na atong pan’uvin, Jerusalem khopi sunga doi houna maicham jouse apaidoh-un, gimnamtui lhutnamna maicham jouse chu aladoh-uvin. Kidron phaiya asep lha lha jenguve.

Lha ni lhin na, nisom le ni li nin mihon kalchuh kut a tha ding kelngoi athat tauve. Hichea hin thempuho leh Levite chu ajah chauvin. hijeh chun amaho le amaho acham chamin akisutheng uvin, hichun Pakai houin sunga pumgo thilto ahinpo lut tauve.
Hichun amahon Pathen mipa Mose danthu lekhabua kisun dungjuiyin athepna cheh-u tohmun akijot cheh-uvin ahi; hiti hin thempu honjong Levite khut’a akisanson u gantha thisan chu atheuve.

Ajeh chu Houbung mite lah a jong chu amaho le amaho kisutheng loulai mihem tampi um nalai ahiuve; hichejeh a hi Levi ten mi aboh nalaiho chu amichang cheh a Pakai henga thensona dinga kalchuh kut kelngoi khat cheh athapeh diu ahiye.

Ijeh inem itileh mihem tamtah, Ephraim mite lah a mihem tampi jong, Manas’seh phunga jong, Is’sachar phunga jong, chule Zebulun phunga jong acham chama ama cheh kisutheng loulai um-ah ahiuvin, hiche ho hin adan kisei banga nit louvin kalchuh kut an chu anetauve. Ahin amaho dingin Hezeki’ah ataovin hitin aseiye, “Pakai nun nemin mitin ngaidam hen.

mihem koi hijongleh munthenga kimanchah dan mangthei hih hen lang hijongleh, alungthima Pathen ahol’a, Pakai apu apate Pathen aholpouva ahileh thendol kisei banga amanthei louvangin ngaidamin umhen.” ati.
Hichea Pakaiyin Hezeki’ah taona anoppeh tan, mipi chu adamsah tai.

Israel chate Jerusalem khopia hung kikhomdoh chengsen lung kipah thanomin ni sagi sungin cholsolou changlhah kut chu amanguvin ahi; niseh leh Levite ahin, thempuho ahiuvin Pakai avahchoi choi ‘jengun, athanei chasun sun’un Pakaiya la asauve.

Hichun Pakai kinbolna a athepna kiphondoh sah thei Levite henga chun Hezeki’ah lengpa’n tilkhouna neitah-in thu aseiye. Hiti hin mipin golvah an chu ni sagi sungin aneuvin, chamna thilto atoh toh jengun, Pakai apu apateu Pathen athangvah vah jenguvin ahi.
Houbung mipi chun ni sagi sungma a kut abolbe kit diuvin akihoutoh tauve; hijeh chun lungthim kipah thanom tah-in ni sagi sungman kut chu aboljom kit’uvin ahi.

Ijeh-inem itileh Judah lengpa Hezeki’ah jong chun Houbung miten Pathena ato diuvin bongchal sang khat le kelngoi sang sagi apen, milen milalten jong Houbung mite din bongchal sang khat le kelngoi sang som apeuve. Hichun thempuho jong mi tamtah akisuh thengbe kit’uvin ahi.

Chutah chun Judah gam Houbung pumpi leh thempuho, Leviho, chule Israel gama hung kon Houbung pumpi jong, Israel gama kona hung khopem jouse jong, Judah gamsunga cheng khopem gei geiyin akipah soh keiyuve.
Hitobang hin Jerusalem khopia chun kipana nasa tah analengin ahi: ijeh-inem itileh Israel lengpa David chapa Solomon khang laiya pat hitobang thilsoh hi Jerusalem khopia umkha louhel ahitai.
Chutah chun thempuho leh Leviho akipatdoh-uvin mipi phatthei aboh-uva ahileh, a-oginu kithongje jun akijan, ataonau jong chu van a Pathen chenna munthenga akaldoh peh tan ahi.

Thil hijat hi abolsoh phat’uvin akikhomdoh Israelte chu apotdoh uvin. Judah gamsung khopi jousea acheuvin, doikhom jouse avogoiyun, Ashe’rim doi ho jong akallhu’uvin, khomol dunga doiphung kisem jouse jong aphe lhasoh hel’uvin, Judah gamsung le Benjamin gamsung, Ephraim gamsung le Manas’seh gamsunga doi houna maicham kisem jouse asuhmang hel kahseuvin aphe lha lha jenguve. Chujouvin Israel chate chu abonchauvin ama ama khopi cheh leh ama goula mun agamsung cheh a akile kit tauve.

Hezeki’ah chun thempuho le Levite chu aloi loiyin alhengdoh kit’in, hitobang hin thempuho le Levite chengse anatoh diu akintoh dung juiyin aloi loiyin ahomkhen soh keiye, pumgo thilto toh ding le chamna thilto toh a pang ding, Pakai ngahmun kelkot phung dunga kinbola pang dingleh thangvahna bol ding, vahchoina bol’a pang din agol toh soh keiyin ahi.

Lengpan ama nei mong monga kon akipehna, pumgo thilto dinga apehdoh chu: jingkah le nilhah seh a pumgo thiltoa to ding ahin, cholngah nikho jousea pumgo thiltoa to ding ahin, lhathah nikhoa to ding ahin, aphat tepsa kut dunga thiltoa to ding ahin, hitobanga Pakai danthu lekhabua kisun banga chu to ding dol jouse chu atodoh jeng ahiye.

Chujongleh lengpa’n Jerusalem khopia cheng mipi jong chu thempuho leh Leviho apeh diuva lom thilto jouse apehna diuvin aseipeh-in thu apei; hitia abol’uva amaho le amaho Pakai danthua akipeh doh diu adei ahiye.

Hiche lengpa thupeh hi akithan doh phat’in Israel chaten chang lhung masa le lengpitwi, thaotwi, khoiju, chule lousoh jouse apesoh keiyun ahileh athilpeh-u chu aneng jeng junge; chutengleh thil ijakai amudoh jouseuva konin jong hopsom neng jengjung in ahinpeuve.

Judah gamsung khopi dunga cheng Israel chate leh Judah chaten jong bong le kelngoi hopsom jong ahinkaiyun, chule Pakai a-Pathenu henga athensosau thil ijakai jouse ahinpo lut’uvin, abonchan alhuh lhuh-in aseuvin ahi.
Lha thum nan thil ho chu alhuh lhuh-in asepan’uvin, lha sagi lhin nan asejou bep’uve.
Hezeki’ah leh milen milalte ahunguva thil alhuh lhuh a kisesang chu amudoh phat’uvin Pakai athangvah-uvin, amite Israel jong phatthei aboh tauve.
Hitobang thil hijat alhuh lhuh a kisesangthudol hi Hezeki’ah lengpa’n thempuho leh Leviho adongtai.

Hichun Zadok insung kon thempu pipu Azari’ah kitipan lengpa chu adonbut’in, “Mihon Pakai houin sunga manchah ding akithopinau thilto ahinpoh pat’uva pat’in keihon jong kakhop khop’a kaneh jingu ahin, ahivangin thalhingset’in aum nalaiye: ajeh chu Pakaiyin amite phatthei aboh a, hijeh a chu keihon thil hijatpi hi aval’a kakholdoh-u ahiye,” ati.
Hichun Hezeki’ah chun Pakai houin sunga chu indan asembe diuvin thu apetai; amahon jong indan phabep asembeuve.

Chujongleh mipin jong athilto diu kithopina chu gen-ngaitah-in ahinpo po jenguve, hopsom ato diu lom hihen lang thensosa thil kikatdohsa hijongleh ahinpouvin ahi. Amaho lah a vaibol pipua pang chu Levi mi Conani’ah kitipa chu ahin, ama ban a pang chu asopipa Shim’e-i ani channa ahi;

Jehi’el, Azazi’ah, Nahath, Asa’ahel, Jer’imoth, Jo’zabad, Eli’el, Ismachi’ah, Mahath, chule Benai’ah mi hijat hin natoh avetup’uva, Conani’ah leh asopipa Shim’e-i chu akithopi diuvin Hezeki’ah lengpa leh Pathen houin a vaibol pipua pang Azari’ah chun apansah lhontai.

Chutengleh niso lam kelkot ngah a pang, Levi mi Imnah chapa Ko’re chun Pathena deichom thilto jouse avetup’in, thil kitohdoh kidong khom chengse chu Pakai dinga koidoh dingleh thilto theng chungnung dia khendoh ding kinbol’in apange.

Ko’re noiya hin Eden le Mini’amin toh, Jeshua le Shemai’ah toh, Amari’ah leh Shecani’ah, mi hicheng hin gunchu tah-in Ko’re akithopiuvin, thempuho khopi dung jousea chun asopiteu chan dingdol jouse chu ateh akhang kibang cheh le tang gol’in ahom’uvin, aloi loiyin ahop peh’uve;

khanggui kisimna kijih lutsa, pasal kum thum lhingsaa pat chung lam mi, ani nia Pakai houina toh ding kinbol dungjuiya hung lut theise se, aloi loiya akihop khendol’in atoh diu kinbol bang bangin ahop peh-uvin ahi.
Thempuho min kisimna chu apu apau lhah a ainsung dungjuiyuva kisim ahiuve; Levite vang chu kum som nia lhah chunglam mi, anatohna dungjuiyu leh aloi loiya akihop khendol’uva kisim ahiuvin ahi.

Thempuho akisim teng leh achasen jouse le ajiteu, achateu pasal numei geiya kisima, mipi abonchauva kisim jeng ahiuve; ijehinem itileh amaho hi amaho le amaho gunchu tah a athenga umdoh jingjeng ahiuvin ahi.

Aaron chapate thempuho, khopi jousen kikop’a anei bom’u gamsung loujaova cheng ho vang chu, khopi jousea mihem tamtah akithe thang uvin, amaho hi amin cheh a kijih doh a, thempuho lah pasal jouse leh amin kisimsa Levite lah a miho chu amichang cheh a achan ding dol ahop peh diuva nganse ahisoh keiyuve.
Hezeki’ah chun Judah gamsung pumpia hitobang hin abolsoh keiye; hiti hin Hezeki’ah hin Pakai a-Pathen mitmun thilpha le adih, chule gunchuna jengin thil anabol’e.

Ipi tobang natoh hijeng jong leh aman Pathen houin natohna dinga athilbol anatoh ho ahin, danthua kisei banga abol ho leh thupeh ho banga anabol ho jong, a Pathen lam holna abol jouse chu aman alungthim pumpin anabol’in, hijeh chun akhangtou lheh jengin ahi.

Thilsoh hijat nung hin gunchu tah a natoh thilbol akichai tan, Sennacherib, Assyria lengpa chu ahung konin Judah gama gal ahung bol’in, kulpi kikaikhum khopi dounan ngahmun ahung semin, aboncha josoh keiya kilah din ahung goi.
Sennacherib hi ahung konin Jerusalem khopi jong douva kisatpi din agotai, ti Hezeki’ah hin amudoh tan,
hijeh chun amajong ama vaibola pang ho leh mihatte chutoh akihoutoh loiyin, khopi polama twinah jouse sin bing din agoi; mihon jong Hezeki’ah chu akithopiuvin ahi.

Mipi ahon jamah akikhom’uvin gamsunga putdoh twinah jouse asinguvin, vadung long jouse jong ating tan tauve, ajeh chu amahon hitin aseiyun ahi, “Iti Assyria lengte chu hung kon’uva twi neng jeng junga aneh a adonthei thei diu ham?” atiuvin ahi.

Hijeh chun Hezeki’ah hi atha hangsanin apangin natong din akigon, kulpi pal ajal lai jouse asaphan agenphai; palvum dunga insang asan, kulpi pal polama jong chun pal khat agenson kit nalaiye; chujongleh David khopi insang lai Millo kisung jong chu agendet kit’in ahi. Chuin Hezeki’ah hin gal manchah le lum jengjong thalhingset’in aseme.
Chujouvin gal mahonga pang ho lamkai ding alhengdoh-in, amaho chengse abonchauvin khopi kelkot phung leitola chun ahenga akoulut soh keiyin, amaho jah a hin tilkhouna tah-in thu aseiyin hitin ati,

“Thahat’uvin lang chule hanguvin, Assyria lengpa leh ahung kilhonpi mihem hijat masanga khun kichat jong bol dauvin, lung thoina jong nei hih hel’uvin; ijeh-inem itileh eiho hi Assyria lengpa sanga lenjo Pathentoh pangkhom ihiuve.

Assyria lengpa hi tahsa ban thahat songa pang ahin, eiho vang Pakai i-Pathen’uvin eipanpi jing nauve, aman eikithopi uva, igalteu hi aman asatjoh ding ahibouve,” ati. Hichun Judah lengpa Hezeki’ah thusei chengsea konin mipin lung ngamna aneidoh tauvin ahi.

Hiche nung hin asepai jouse kipuiya Lachish gadel khuma gasatpa Assyria lengpa Sennacherib chun Jerusalem khopia Judahte lengpa Hezeki’ah heng leh Jerusalema cheng Judahte henga asepaite ahinsol’in hitin ahung seisah tai,
“Assyria lengpa Sennacherib chun hitin aseiye, ‘Ipi kisonna naneiyuva, Jerusalem khopi ki-umchah ta a nangho isah louva um um nahiuvam“
Hezeki’ah kitipa hin nangho hi dangchah le kel a thisah dinga nangho jah a hitia hi asei ahi, “Pakai i-Pathen’uvin Assyria lengpa khut’ a kona eihuhdoh tei tei diu ahi.” tia nahil konleu hilou ham?

Hiche Hezeki’ah kitipa ma ma hin khomol dunga adoiphung jouse asuhmang peh a, amaicham jouse jong asuh beipeh a chule Judahte leh Jerusalem a chengte jah a jong thu apeh a, “Nang hon maicham khatseh maiya chibai naboh’uva, maicham khatseh chunga kilhaina gantha nago diu ahi,” tia anasei hilou ham?
Kei le kapaten gamtin gamtanga mitin vaipi hijat kabolnau hi nahet lou mongu ham? Hiche namtin vaipi hijat ho hi a-Pathen houvun agamsung uva kona amite keima khut’a kona ahuhdoh jou mong hinam?
Kapaten hiche namtin vaipi ho asuh gamhel’a chu ahouvu pathen lim kisemthuho chun keima khut’a amite ahuhdoh jou mong hiya, nangho Pathen jong chun nangho hi keima khut’a kona nahuhdoh jou diu hinam?

Hijeh chun tun jong Hezeki’ah hi kilhep lhah sah dauvin lang, hitobang hin kipui mang sah dauvin, chujongleh ama hi tahsan hih hel’uvin; ajeh chu koi nam mite hihen lang koi lenggam hijongleh keima khut le kapu kapate khut’a kona amite chu ahouvu pathen ahi, ati-ho-uvin ahuhdoh joulou ahibouve. Chuti ahileh nangho Pathen changseh chun keima khut’a nangho nahuhdoh jou deh diu ham?’ tin aseiye,” agatisah tai.
Sennacherib sepaite chun Pakai Pathen leh alhachapa Hezeki’ah dounan aseibe kit nalaiyuvin ahi.

Chujongleh Sennacherib chun Pakai Israel Pathen demna din lekha thot jong tampi asunin chule hitin aseiyin adouna abol’e, “Gamtin gamtanga namtin vaipite ahouvu pathen ahisah houvin keima khut’a kona amite ahuhdoh joulou banga, Hezeki’ah Pathenin jong keima khut’a kona amite ahuhdoh jou deh louhel ding ahi,” ati.
Chujongle Sennacherib sepaite chun Jerusalem khopi alah theina diuvin, Jerusalem mite, palvuma pang ho kichatsahna ding leh tijat sahna dingin Judah paovin othongje jun thu aseiyun asamtauve.
Hiti hin amahon Jerusalem mite Pathen jong chu mihem khut“a kisemthu leiset midangte pathen lim kisemho ahouna bang bangun ahoutauve.
Chutah chun Hezeki’ah lengpa leh Amoz chapa Isaiah themgaopa chu hitobang thu kiseiho jeh hin atao lhonin van lam sangin akap lhon tai.

Hijeh chun Pakaiyin jong Vantil khat ahinsol’in, Vantil hin Assyria lengpa ngahmuna mihat gal-hang jouse leh lamkai jouse chule vaibol phalai lai jouse athat gamin ahi. Hichun Sennacherib jong maijum thet-in agam langa akile kit tai. Chuin Sennacherib hi a-pathen hou lim semthu houin sunga ahungin ahileh, houin sunga chun achapate mi phabep’in chemjamin asat lumden tauve.

Hitobang tah hin Pakaiyin Hezeki’ah le Jerusalem kho mite chu Assyria lengpa Sennacherib khut’a kon leh amelmate chengse khut’a konin ahuhdoh tai; chujouvin Pakaiyin amaho hi ajet aveiyuva konin gal asuthip’in akicholdo sah tai.

Chuin mipi tamtah-in Jerusalem khopia hin Pakaiya thilto ding ahinchoi choi jengun, chule Judah lengpa Hezeki’ah din jong thil lutah tah ahin choipeh peh jenguve; hijeh chun hichea pat hin Hezeki’ah chu namtin vaipi mitmun jong akichoi sang lheh jeng tai.
Hichelai hin Hezeki’ah hi ahung veisen adammon athipai ding ahitai, hijeh chun ama jong Pakai henga ataove; hichun Pakaiyin ataona ahouvin, melchihna khat ahinpei.

Ahivangin Hezeki’ah hin chanphat amu bangin thilpha imacha bol din agopoi, ijeh-inem itileh alungthim akiletsah-in ahi. Hichejeh chun ama chung le Judahte chung, Jerusalem khopi chunga Pakai lungsatna ahung lhung tai.

Ahivangin Hezeki’ah chu ama chamtah-in akiletsahna lungthima konin ahung kineosah kit’in, ama jong Jerusalem kho mite jong aki neosah chehuvin ahileh, Hezeki’ah hinlaisen hiche Pakai lunghanna hi achunguva ahung lhung pai tapoi.

Hezeki’ah hi ahao lheh jengin min jong ajabol lheh jeng tauve; aman jong athil kholna ding thil kholna tampi akisemin, dangka, sana kholna ding, song mantam jouse kholna ding leh gimnamtui kholna ding, lum kholna ding, chule umle bel manchah manlu tah tah ho kholna din thil kholna akisemtai.
Lousoh ga kholna din jong chang kholna, lengpitwi kholna, thaotwi khol ding asan, gancha jatchom chom kholna din jong in tampi asan, kelngoi hong jeng jong tampi asai.
Hezeki’ah hin khopi tamtah jong akisemin, kelngoi hon le bonghon jong letjeng jungin avul’e; ijehinem itileh Pathenin neile gou tamtah apeh ahi.
Hiche Hezeki’ah kitipa ma ma hin Gihon vadunga twi londohna achungnungjo chu ating kih-in, David khopi nilhum lang ngan asuhlop sah-e. Hezeki’ah hi atohna lam lama akhangtou lheh jengin ahi.

Ahin Babylon gama kona milen milalte ama henga hung kisol ho, leng palai ho, Judah gamsunga melchihna kiboldoh ho chung chang thudola ama thudoh neiya kihoulimpi dinga hung ho chung chang thudol’a hin, alungthima um jouse alung gel hetdohna dingin, Pathenin apatepnan ama amoh ngansen avetai.
Hezeki’ah natoh athilbol adang dang, athilpha boldoh chengse jong, vetan, Amoz chapa Isaiah themgao mu neina thusim lah a akisut than, Judah le Israel lengte lekhabua jong akisune.

Chuin Hezeki’ah jong apu apate toh akijamkhomin, mihon along chu David chapate lhankhuh jot touna lama avuitauve; athi phat’in Judah gam pumpi leh Jerusalem kho miten ama jaholnan a’op soh keiyuve. Chujouvin achapa Manas’seh kitipa chun ama khel’in lengvai apotai.
Lengvaipoa ahung pan chun Manas’seh hi akum kum som le kum ni bou alhing bep’e; chujouvin Jerusalem khopia kum som nga le kum nga sungin lengvai anapoi.
Manas’seh hin masang laiya Pakaiyin Israel chate masanga adelmangsa namtin vaipi ho chonna thet umtah tah abol jouseu chu abol kit’in, Pakai mitmun thilse jeng anabol’e.

Ijeh inem itileh Manas’seh hin apa Hezeki’ah phet lhahsa khomol dunga doiphung jouse jong asemphan, Ba’al doi ho houna din maicham tampi asemdoh kit’ in, Ashe’rah doi ho jong atungdoh-in, van loupina jouse jong ahouvin chibai aboh jin, hiche ho kinbolna hin akimangtai.

Manas’seh hin Pakai houin sunga jong doi houna ding maicham asemdoh jengin ahi, hiche houin thudola hi Pakaiyin hitia anaseisa ahi, “Jerusalem khopia hi atonsot geiya keima min cheng jing jeng ding ahi,” anati ahiye.
Ahinla Manas’seh chun Paka1

Chujongleh Hinnom chapa phaichama hin achapa jengjong kithoinan aneiyin agouvamtai; chule themka pou adongin, ailhim jong abol’in, phun asanin, thi-lha gaochang mi jong akihoupin, mitpheldoi themho jong amange. Hitobang tah hin Pakai mitmun thilse tamtah anaboldoh tan, anaphin lung hang lheh jeng tai.

Ahivangin Manas’seh hin milim doi asemdoh jong chu Pathen houin sunga atungdoh tai; hiche houin chung chang thudol’a hi Pathenin David le achapa Solomon jah a anaseiya, “Hiche houin sung le, keiman Israel phung hijat lah a kalhendohsa Jerusalem khosunga hi tonsot geiya kamin kachensah jing jeng ding ahi;

chujongleh keiman napu napate diuva kalhendohsa hiche gamsunga kona hi Israelte kengto kachon dohsah kit louhel ding ahi, Israelte hin kathupeh chengse kitup’a anit’uva, danthu jouse leh chonna danjouse chule chondan jouse, Mose khut’a kona kipedoh chengse chu anit them pouvuva ahileh,” ati ahi.
Manas’seh hin Judahte leh Jerusalem kho mite chu adih lou lamin ajol lhan, hijeh chun amahon jong masanga Pakaiyin Israel chate masanga asuhmangsa namtin vaipiho sangin thilse ahabol jouve.
Pakaiyin Manas’seh leh amite jah a thu ahinseiyin, ahivangin amahon ngai nahsah-in aneipouve.
Hichejeh hin Pakaiyin achunguva Assyria mite sepai lamkaiho ahintol lutpeh tan, amaho hin Manas’seh chu thih-koiyin akaiyun, sumeng khaovin akan’uvin Babylon khopia ahinkai lut tauve.
Hitobang tah a agenthei phat hin Manas’seh chun achunga Pakai a-Pathen lung lhaina ding athumin, apu apate Pathen angsunga nasa tah-in ama le ama akineosah jenge.

Hichun Pathen henga ataova ahileh Pathenin ataona asangin, athum bangin anop peh tan, alenggam sunga ahin nung lhut’in, Jerusalem khopia ahinpui lut kit tai. Chutah chun Manas’seh jong chun Pakai kitipa hi Pathen mong mong ahinai, ti ahedoh tai.

Khonung nungin Manas’seh hin David khopi, Gihon vadung nilhum lam, phaicham laiya chun khopi pal aponung ding khat agetbe’n, nga-kelkot lang lutna ding jong asemin, Ophel pal kimvel’a ahin-get peh-in, chuin asan’a sangin agensange; chujongleh Judah gam khopi jousea sepai lamkaiho atousah soh keiyin ahi.

Chuin Pakai houin sunga konin gamdang mite pathen lim semthu jouse leh doi lim kisemthuho jong chu aladohin, Pakai houin mun molvuma maicham asem jouse leh Jerusalem khopi sunga maicham asema doi houna abol jouse jong asumangin, abonchan Jerusalem khopi polama apaidoh soh hel’e.

Manas’seh chun Pakai maicham jong asemphan, achunga chun chamna thilto kilhaina gantha abol’in, thangvah thilto kilhaina gantha jong abol’e; chujongleh Judahte chun Pakai Israel Pathen jeng bou ahou diuvin thu apetai.
Ahivangin mipi chun khomol dunga doiphung dung jenga jong kilhaina abol bol nalaiyui; ahin Pakai a-Pathenu henga bou abol’u ahitai.

Manas’seh natoh athilbol adang dang, a-Pathen henga ataona, chule Pakai Israel Pathen mina ama henga thuseiya pang mitva neiho thusei jouse jong, vetan, abonchan Israel lengte thusim lekhabua akijih lutsoh keiye.

Chule Manas’seh taona le itobanga Pathenin ataona asanpeh ham, ti thusim, ama chonsetna jouse leh akitah louna ho, khomol dunga doiphung asemdoh a Ashe’rim doi atundohna mun ho ahin, milim doi asemdoh jouse ahin, ama le ama aki-ngaitom masanga athilbol jouse chu vetan, abonchan mitva neite thusim lekhabua akijih soh keinai.
Hitobang hin ahingin chuin Manas’seh jong apu apate teh akijamkhomin, mihon along chu ama insunga avuitauve; chuin ama khel’in achapa Amon chun lengvai ahinpotai.
Lengvaipoa ahung pan chun Amon hi akum kum som ni le kum ni bou alhing nalaiye; chujouvin Jerusalem khopia kum ni sungin lengvai anapoi.
Ama hi apa Manas’seh bangin ama thilbol bol abol’in, Pakai mitmun thilse jeng anabol’e. Amon hin apa Manas’seh semdohsa milim doi jouse chu kithoinan aneiyin, hiche ho chu ahouve.
Chujongleh Pakai angsunga ama le ama jong akineosah pon, apa Manas’seh ki-ngaitom bangin aki-ngaitom poi; chujongleh hiche Amon kitipa hin themmona abolbe be jengin ahi.
Hijeh chun asepaiten adouvun, ainsunga athat den tauve.
Ahivangin gamsung miten Amon lengpa douva miho chu a that gamtauve; chujouvin agamsung miten Amon chapa Josi’ah chu apa khel’in leng achansah tauvin ahi.
Lengvaipoa ahung pan chun Josi’ah hi akum kum get bou ahinalaiye; chujouvin Jerusalem khopia kum som thum le kum khat sungin lengvai anapoi.
Amahin Pakai mitmun thildih apha jeng anabol’in, apu David chonna bang bangin achonin, lam ajot jang keiyin, jet le veiya akiheidoh poi.

Joshi’ah hi khangdong cha ahinah lai vangin alengvaipoh kal kum get lhin kumin apu David Pathen ahinhol pantai; alengvaipoh kal kum som le kum ni lhin kumin Judah gam le Jerusalem khopi ahin sutheng panin, khomol dunga doiphung kisem jouse asumangin, Ashe’rim doi akal lhun, milim doi kijempol le milim kilhajol jouse jong asumang tai.

Ama angsung laitah a mihon Ba’al doiho ahounau maicham jouse avochimsoh hel’uve; chujongle Josi’ah hin maicham dang jouse sanga asangpena kisemdoh gimnamtui lhutnamna maichamho gei geiyin jong akallhusoh hel’in ahi; Ashe’rim doi jouse jong avogoi goiyin, milim kijempol doi ho leh milim kilhajol ho jouse jong avogoisoh hel’in, abonchan avogoisoh hel’in leivui tobang ahiphat’in hiche ho houna kisa lei a kithoina neiho lhankhuh chunga athekhumin ahi.
Joshi’ah chun hiche doi houna thempua pang ho geiyin amaicham dunga hin aguu achangu agouvin, hitobang tah hin Judah gam le Jerusalem khopi asuthengin atheh ngimtai.
Josi’ah lengpa’n hitobang tah hin Manas’seh mite le Ephraim mite, Simeon mite, chule Naphtali mite khopi dung jousea jong abol’in, khopi hijat kimvel dunga gamkai jousea jong hiti hin abolsoh keiye.

Doi houna maicham jouse avochimin, Ashe’rim doi avojal’in, milim doi kisemthu jouse jong chu avobongin leivui asosah gamtai, chuin Israel gamsung pumpia gimnamtui lhutnamna maicham jouse jong akal lhusoh heltai. Chujouvin Jerusalem khopia ahung kile kit’in ahi.

Josi’ah hin alengvaipoh kal kum som le kum get lhin kum, gamsung le houin asuh theng jou phat’in, Azali’ah chapa Shaphan le khopi sunga vaipoa pang Ma-asei’ah toh, Jo’ahaz chapa Jo’ah kitipa thu chinga pangpa toh, Pakai a-Pathen houin sempha din asoltai.

Amaho hi Hilki’ah thempupa henga ahunguvin, houin hongcha ngah-a pang Leviten Manas’seh phung le Ephraim phung, Israelte ahingdoh amoh chengsea kon leh Judah gam pumpi leh Benjamin phunga kon chule Jerusalem kho mitea kona adondohsau Pathen houin sunga hung kipolutsa sum jouse chu thempu chungnungpa Hilki’ah khut’a apetauve.
Hichun mihon asum hi Pakai houin semphatna∑natoh vetup’a pang ho ape kit’uvin ahi; chuin natoh vetup’a pang Pakai houin a natong ho hin asum hi houin semphatna ding leh thahsem kitna dingin apetauve.

Chuin sum chu thing thembol ho leh insaa pang ho chu kaldohsa song chohna dingin apeson’uvin ahi, chujongleh in jopna ding thing jong achoh nauvin, Judah gam lengten don louva akoiyuva amoh mot lhahsah sau insun ho kheldohna dingin jong insun ding chohnan amanguve.

Natong miho chun atohnau chu gunchu tah-in atonguve. Natong ho vetup din Merar’i chapa teni, Levi mi Jahath le Obadi’ah chu anganseuvin, chujongleh avetup’a aphotoh le din Kohath chapate lah a Zechari’ah le Meshul’lam jong anganseuvin ahi. Lasahna tumging thei manchah mangthem Levite chu,

pohgih thilpoh lam pon apanguvin, itobang hijeng jongleh natoh jat jat tong jouse chu ahil’uvin akopeh cheh-uve; Levi miho phabep jong chu danthu lekha them ahiuvin, vaibola pangjong aum’uvin, kelkot ngaha pangjong aum’uvin ahi.
Mihon Pakai houin sunga kipolutsa sum ahinpoh doh pet tah-u chun, Hilki’ah thempupan Mose khut’a anakipesa Pakai danthu lekhabu chu ahin mudoh tai.
Chuphat’in Hilki’ah jong chun lekhasunpa Shaphan jah a aseiyin, “Keiman danthu lekhabujol chu Pakai houin sunga kamudoh tai,” atin; chuin Hilki’ah chun lekhabujol chu Shaphan khut’a apetai.
Shaphan in lekhabujol chu lengpa henga ahinchoi lut’ in, chuin lengpa henga aseibe kit’in, “Nasohte lhachaho chu aki ngansena jouseu abol boljing uvin ahi.
Amahon Pakai houin sunga kidongdoh sum jouse jong chu akhotheng soh keiyuvin, chuin asum chu natoh vetup’a pang tohvaipo ho leh natong ho khut’a apetauve,” ati.
Chujouvin lekhasunpa Shaphan hin lengpa jah a aseipeh paiyin, “Hilki’ah thempupan keima lekhabujol khat eipei,” atin, chuin alekhabujol chu Shaphan in lengpa angsunga asimdoh tai.
Lengpan danthua kisei thuseiho chu ajahdoh phat’in aponsil abottel soh jengin ahi.
Chutah chun lengpa’n thu apen, Hilki’ah leh Shaphan chapa Ahi’kam toh, Micah chapa Abdon le lekhasunpa Shaphan toh, chule lengpa sohpa Asai’ah jah a aseiyin hitin ati,

“Cheuvin lang kei ding leh Israel gamsung, Judah gamsunga mi amoh akidalha chengse ding hin hiche lekhabu kimudoh a kisei thu kiseiho thudola hin Pakai neigadoh peh tauvin; ijeh-inem itileh eiho chunga Pakai lunghanna hung lhung hi anasa behseh jeng tai; ipijeh-inem itileh ipu ipa teuvin Pakai thusei anit pouvin, hiche lekhabujol sunga kisei bang hin anabol pouve,” ati.

Hijeh chun Hilki’ah leh lengpan asol miho chu themgaonu Huldah henga acheuvin ahi; amanu hi masanga ponsil vetup’a kipansahji Hasrah kitipa chapa Tokhath chapa Shallum jinu ahin, hichepet’a hi Jerusalem khopia vengthah a cheng ahi; amaho chun themgaonu jah a lengpa thusei dol chu ahung seitauve.
Chuphat’in themgaonun jong ajah uva aseipeh-in, “Pakai Israel Pathen chun hi tin aseiye, ‘Nang ho keima henga hinsol mipa jah a chun seipeh-uvin,
Pakaiyin hi tin aseiye, vetan, Judah lengpa angsunga kisimdoh hiche lekhabujol sunga kijih lut thu kiseiya gaosapna jouse chu keiman hiche lai mun leh asunga chengte chunga kahin lhunsah ding ahi.

Ijeh-inem itileh amahon keima eisumil’uvin, pathen lim kisemthu achom chom henga gimnamtui pou alhut nam leuvin, akhut’uva asemthuu hitobang doi kibol ho jeh hin keima melse tah a phin lung han din eigouve; hichejeh a chu hiche khopi chunga hi kalungsatna hung lhunga twi suna kisung lha ding, meikong phel lei banga kiphelmit jou louhel ding ahi.

Amavang nangho hinsol’a Pakai henga thudoh nei dia nahinsol’u Judah lengpa jah a chun nang hon hitin seipeh tauvin, Pakai Israel Pathen chun hitin aseiye: Nangman najah hichea thu kiseiho chung chang thudola hin,

nangman nalungthima kisihna naneiya, nalung nakhel’a, hiche khopi douna leh asunga chengte douna thu kiseiho hi najah doh phat’a nang le nang Pathen angsunga naki-ngaitom jenga, hitobang tah a ka-angsunga ki-ngaitomna naneiya, naponsil jouse nabotel hel’a, keima angsung laitah a naka jah jeng jeh hin, ken jong nangma taona kasangtai, tin Pakaiyin aseiye.

Neihin vetan, keiman nang hi napu napate toh kalup khomsah ding, nangman lung monga nalhankhuh nakijot lut ding ahinai, chujongleh keiman hiche khopi leh asunga chengte chunga kalhunsah ding thilse hi namit tenia jong namuphah lou ding ahitai,’ tin aseiye,” ati. Chuphat’in mihon hiche thu kisei hi lengpa henga ahinlhut kit tauve.
