Chuphat chun lengpa’n jong mi asol’in Judah gam le Jerusalem khopia upa jouse agakhop sah tai.

Chuin lengpa chu Pakai houin lama achetouvin, Judah gam mite leh Jerusalem khopia chengte toh, thempuho le Levite toh akilhonin. mipi jong alen aneovin ajuisoh keiyuve; hichun lengpa’n Pakai houin sunga kimudoh kitepna lekhabujol sunga thu kisei jouse chu mipi jah din asimdoh tai.

Hichun lengpa jong adinmuna adingin Pakai angsunga kitepna khat asemin, Pakai nung nung juiya, athupeh jouse nitna ding, ahettohsah chengse jong man ding, achondan jouse nit’a, hiche lekhabujol sunga kisun thu kisei kitepna jouse hi molso teina dinga alungthim pumpi leh ahinkho pumpia panna din akitep tai.

Chujouvin lengpa’n Jerusalem khopia mi ahung pang ho leh Benjamin phung sunga mi ahung pang ho chu hiche kitepnaa hi adin cheh na diuvin aseipeh tan ahi. Hijeh chun Jerusalem a chengten Pathen, apu apateu Pathen kitepna bang bang chun abol tauve.

Josi’ah lengpa’n Israel gamsung muntina thet umtah tah thil kibol jouse chu Israel chate lah a konin apaidoh soh keiyin, Israel gamsunga mite abonchauvin Pakai a-Pathen jengu ahousah-in ama kin jeng abolsah tai. Chujongleh ama jeng jong ahinkho lhum keiyin Pakai apu apateu Pathen nung nunga achen, akiheidoh tapoi.
Josi’ah lengpa’n Jerusalem khopia Pakai din kalchuh kut abol’e; mihon lha masapen, nisom le ni li lhin nin kalchuh kut kelngoi athat’uvin ahi.
Josi’ah hin thempuho jong chu ama ama natoh ding mun cheh a apansah-in, Pakai houin sunga atoh diu akinbol nau chunga atilkhou khoujengin ahiye.

Israel mite hil lea pang, Pakai dinga athenga umdoh Levi mite jah a chun Josi’ah hin anaseiyin, “Israel lengpa David chapa Solomon sahsa houin sunga chun thingkong theng chu tunguvin; tukal nang hon nalengkouva naputle le louvu akhoh tapoi. Tua pat’in Pakai na-Pathenu leh amite Israel kinbol’in panguvin.
Israel lengpa David’in nahil bangu leh achapa Solomon in nahil nau bangin, nangho napu napauva insung lhah dungjui bang leh aloi loiya nakihop khen banguvin kigotoh sademin um’uvin.
Chujongleh nasopiteu milham ho dingin apa apuu lhah a insung dungjuiya bangin muntheng phunga chun kigolsoh keiyun. Levite chu apajang lhah a insung kailhah a chu chan khat cheh chang diu ahi.
Kalchuh kut kelngoi chu that’uvin lang, nang hole nangho kisuthengun, nasopiteu din gonpeh-uvin, Pakaiyin Mose jah a anasei dung juiyin bol jengun,” ati.

Josi’ah hin milham ahung kikhomdoh chengse din, mihem ahung lha tapou dingin kalchuh kut gantha thilto din kelngoite leh kelngoi hon lah a kona kimandoh kelngoinou chu agom gomin sang som thum lhingset atohdoh jengin, bongchal sang thum toh atoh doh-e; gancha hijatpi hi lengpa gantha jeng jeng ahi.

Lengpa dinga milen milalten jong thanom tah tah-in mipi ding jong, thempuho ding jong, Levite ding jong ahintoh doh doh jenguvin ahi. Pathen houin sunga vaibol pipua pang Hilki’ah leh Zechari’ah toh, chule Jehi’el chun thempuho dingin kalchuh kut thilto dingin kelngoi sang ni le jagup, kelngoinou pum pumin apeuvin, bongchal ja thum toh apeuve.

Levite lah a lamkai pipu cheng Conani’ah leh Shemai’ah toh, asopipa Nethan’el le Hashabi’ah toh chule Je-i’el leh Jo’zabad jong chun Levite chu kalchuh kut thilto dingin kelngoi le kelngoinou agomin sang nga toh, bongchal ja nga apeuvin ahi.
Kalchuh kut kinbol ding akigontoh soh phat’in, thempuho jong adinmun uva adinguvin, Leviho jong aloi loiya akigol ding banguvin akigol’un, lengpa thupeh bangin’ abol cheh tauve.
Chuin amahon kalchuh kut kelngoi athat uvin, thempuhon gancha kithat hoa konin athisan jouse chu alauvin athe the jenguvin, chule Leviten savun chu alip lip jenguve.

Chuin amahon pumgo thilto sa kithat ho chu Mose danthu lekhabua kisun banga mihon Pakaiya atodoh theina diuvin, mipi chu apu apau lhah a ainsung dol cheh a abung bunga akihop khen dungjui uva ahop peh theina diuvin akhendoh tauve. Bongchal ho jong chu chutiman abol’uvin ahi.

Kalchuh kut’a kithat kelngoiho chu akibol ding dol kiseisa bang bangin meiya ahulgot thouve; thilto thenga kitohdoh ho vang chu bel’in jong, bel-bilneiyin jong, chule khangbel’in jong ahon thouvin, mipi chu man gangtah in ahop peh soh keiyun ahi.

Chujou phat’in amaho neh ding leh thempuho neh ding akisem uvin ahi, ajeh chu Aaron chapate thempuho chu nilhah lam geiya pumgo thilto kinbolna leh sathao jouse todoh ding kinbolna kisalel lel jeng ahiuve; hichejeh a chu Levi ten amaho neh ding leh Aaron chapate thempuho neh ding akibol’u ahiye.

Asaph chapate lathem ho jong chu David thupeh dungjuiyin amaho panmun cheh a apanguvin, Asaph hihen, Heman hileh, lengpa dinga mitva neiya pang Jedu’thun hijongleh apotdoh thei aumpouve; kelkot ngah-a pang ho jouse jong kelkot phung tin a apang soh keiyuvin ahi; amaho hin anatoh ban’u adalhah uva apotdoh louvu akhoh poi, ajeh chu asopiteu Levi mihon amaho neh ding jong agonthau ahinai.
Hitobang hin hiche nikho hin Pakai dinga toh ding kin jouse akigong toh soh keiyin, Josi’ah lengpa thupeh dungjuiya kalchuh kut man a Pakai maicham phunga Pumgo thilto bol dingin akigotoh soh keitai.
Hichepet hin ahung kikhomdoh Israel chaten jong kalchuh kut chu amanguvin, ni sagi sungin cholsolou changlhah kut abol’uve.

Samuel themgaopa nikho laiya pat hitobang hin Israelte lah a kalchuh kut anakibol khah hih laiye; Josi’ah leh thempuho, Levi miho, chule ahung kikhomdoh Judah gam mite leh Israel mite ahiuvin, Jerusalem kho mite ahiuvin, amahon anabol tobang kalchuh kut hi Israel lengte koimachan jong anabol khapoi.
Josl’ah lengvaipoh jou kal kum som le kum get lhin kuma hiche kalchuh kut hi anabol’u ahiye.

Thilsoh hijat kichai nung hin, Josi’ah lengpa’n houin jong agontohsoh nung ahitan, Egypt lengpa Neco chu Euphrates luipi dunga Car’chemish khoa galsat dingin akontou tai; hichea hin Josi’ah jong ama hitoh kisat din akonin ahi.

Ahinla Egypt lengpa’n Josi’ah henga palai phabep ahinsol’in hi tin aseisah-e; “Judah lengpa, einin ipi kidouna ineiya ikisat lou khoh ham? Tunia hi keima nangma sat dinga hung galkon kahipoi, keito kidou jing insung mite toh kisat dinga hung konjoh kahibouve; chujeh a chu Pathenin kinloiya kache dinga eisol ahi. Keima eipanpi Pathen nadou hi hai jengin, achutilouva ahileh aman nasuh mang jeng ding ahi,” tin aseisah tai.

Ahinah vangin Josi-ah chun adalhapon, akihei mang deh poi; ama toh kisat tei teina dingin avon akhel’in akilep tai. Josi’ah hin Pathen kamsunga hung kon Neco thusei ho hi ngaisah-in aneitapon, Megid’do phaiya chun Neco chu gal’in akibolpin akisatpi tai.
Hichea hin thalpi kapthem hon Josi’ah lengpa chu akap khauvin, hijeh chun lengpa’n jong asepaite jah a aseiyin, “Keima thina khop hel’in eimavo tauve, neitol mangtauvin,” atitai.

Hijeh chun asepaiten Josi’ah lengpa chu kangtalaiya konin adom lhauvin, kangtalai chom khat’a apolut’uvin Jerusalem geiyin ahintol lut tauve. Hichun Josi’ah jong athipai paiyin apu a pate lhankhuh dunga avuitauvin ahi. Judah gam pumpi leh Jerusalem miten Josi’ah pul adouvun ahiye.

Jeremiah jong chun Josi’ah hi akachamin, chuleh numei pasal lasa them jousen tuni geiyin aka-nauva Josi’ah chu ka-lan a-oi oijiuvin ahi. Hiche aka-nau hi amahon Israelte din chonna ngai dan khat’ in akisemdoh-un vetan, abonchan ka-laa akijih lut soh keitan ahi.
Joshi’ah natoh athilbol adang dang, Pakai danthu lekhabua kisun dungjuiya anatoh phat jouse jong,
anatoh jouse apatna kipat achaina geiyin, vetan, abonchan Israel le Judah lengte lekhabua akisun soh keiyin ahi.
Gamsung miten Josi’ah chapa Jeho’ahaz kitipa chu aman’uvin, Jerusalem khopia chun apa khel’in lengin atung tauve.
Lengvaipoa ahung pan chun Jeho’ahaz kitipa hi akum kum som ni le kumthum alhing bep’e; chujouvin Jerusalem khopia chun lha thum sung seh seh-in lengvaipon anapang manin ahi.
Chujou chun Egypt lengpa’n Jeho’ahaz hi alengvai pohna Jerusalem khopia konin alengchan ahaisah-in, gamsung pumpi chunga kai adon diu dangka talent ja khat le sana talent khat apohsah tai.

Chujongleh Egypt lengpa’n asopipa Eli’akim joh chu Judah gam le Jerusalem khopia lengin atungin, amin jong akhelpeh kit’ in Jehoi’akim ahisah-e; asopipa Jeho’ahaz vang Neco, Egypt lengpan Egypt gamsunga akaimang tan ahi.

Lengvaipoa ahung pan chun Jehoi’akim hi akum kum som ni le kum nga alhingtai; chujouvin Jerusalem khopia kum som le kum khat sungin lengvai anapoi. Jehoi’akim jong hin Pakai aPathen mitmun thilse jeng anabol’e.
Hijeh chun ama dou din Babylon lengpa Nebuchadnez’zar ahung konin, Jehoi’akim chu thih-khaovin akanin, Babylon langa akaimang tai.
Nebuchadnez’zar hin Jerusalem a Pakai houin sunga bel le kong phabep jong apomangin, Babylon gama ama leng inpia akoiye.

Jehoi’akim natoh athilbol adang dang, athilbol thet umtah tah ho ahin, ama douna kibol ho akimudoh jouse jong, vetan, abonchan Israel le Judah lengte lekhabua akisun soh keiye. Chujouvin Jehoi’akim chapa Jehoi’achin chun ama khel’in lengvai apotai.

Lengvaipoa ahung pan chun Jehoi’achin hi akum kum get bou ahinalaiye; chujouvin Jerusalem khopia chun lha thum le nisom sungin bou lengvai anapoi. Jehoi’achin jong hin Pakai mitmun thilse jeng anabol’e.

Chavang ahung hiphat’in, hiche kum chun Nebuchadnez’zar lengpa’n mi ahinsol’in, ama jong hi Babylon lama akaimangin, Pakai houin sunga bel kong khon mantam tah tah chutoh atol than, asopipa Zedeki’ah chu Judah gamsung le Jerusalem khopia lengin atungtai.
Lengvaipoa ahung pan chun Zedeki’ah hi akum kum som nile kum khat bou ahinalaiye; chujouvin kum som le kum khat sungin Jerusalem khopia lengvai anapoi.
Ama jong hin Pakai a-Pathen mitmun thilse jeng anabol’e. Pakai kamsungsoh thuseiya pang Jeremiah themgaopa masanga jong akineosah hih hel jengin ahiye.
Ama Pathen mina kihahsel sah pa Nebuchadnez’zar lengpa dounan jong gal abol’in akiphin e; chujongleh Pakai Israel Pathen lama kiheina dinga jong alouchal’in angong avaiput len ahi.

Thempuho lah a lamkai lai lai jong, chule mipi jeng jong chu melse veng vungin achon’uvin kitah louhel’in aum’un, namtin vaipi chonna thet umtah tah thilbol jouse chu athouvin, Jerusalem khopia Pakaiyin asuhthengsa houin geiyin asuthang tauve.
Pakai apu apateu Pathenin amite chunga avoujang nat jeh leh akhomun angailut jeh-in, tat le tat louvin asottolle ho ahinsol sol jengin thu aseisah-in,

ahivanginla amahon Pathen sottolle ho chu atot chavai leuvin, Pathen thusei jouse chu nahsah mon abol’uvin, athemgao jouse jong ahutot jiuvin, amite chunga Pakai lungsatna ahung deujah jenga, aphel lhahna ding beihel’a aumdoh kahsen atang deh hih hel’uve.

Hichejeh hin Pathenin amaho douva sumang din Chaldea mite lengpa ahinpuiyin, amahin agollhang jouseu muntheng phung laitah a chemjamin asat lih soh-in, gollhang ho chunga hihen nu-ngah theng ho chung hijongleh voujang natna nei louhe1’in abol’in, upa le tehsesa jong akhoto deh poi; Pathenin abonchauva Chaldea lengpa khut’a apehdoh ahitai.

Chaldea lengpa hin Pathen houin sunga bel le kong khon jouse, alen aneo mang maiyin amaiyin achom ngim hel’in, Pakai houin sunga thil kholna dung jong achomin, lengpa le amilen amilalte insung dunga thil kholna jouse jong achomsoh keiyin, abonchan Babylon gamsunga apolut tai.
Chaldea miten Pathen houin ahalvam’uvin, Jerusalem kulpi pal avo-lhu’uvin, aleng inpi dung jouse jong meiyin ahalvam soh hel’uve; chujongle bel kong khon man tam jouse jong asumang soh keitauve.

Chaldea lengpa’n chemjama satlih moh ahoidoh chengse jong chu abonchan Babylon gamsunga sohchangin akaimang soh keiyin, amaho hi Persia lenggam hung kitundoh kahsen lengpa leh achapate soh-in apang pang jenguvin ahi.

Hichea hi Pakai thusei Jeremiah kama hung kiseidoh chu guilhunna dinga chuti ahin, agamsungin cholngah nikho hung lhung ding ho anit kit’uva akipa thanop kahseuva dinga chutia ahitai. Agamsung chu alheng alhol’a akijama aum laisea chu cholngah nikho nit banga anit ahitan. kum som sagi lhin kahsea chuti um um jeng ahi.

Jeremiah kama kiseidohsa Pakai thusei chu akimolso theina dingin, Persia lengpa Cyrus leng chan kal kum masapen kumin Pakaiyin Persia lengpa Cyrus lungthim ahintildoh tan, hijeh chun Cyrus jong chun ama lenggam pumpia phondoh ding thupeh khat abol’in, hichu lekha sut-thon jong abol’in:

“Persia lengpa Cyrus chun hi tin aseiye, ‘Pakai van Pathen chun keima leiset lenggam jouse hi eipeh ahitai, chujongleh Judah gamsunga Jerusalem khopia chu ama dinga houin khat kasahdohna dingin jong thu eipei. Koi koi hijeng jong leu chun amite lah a cheng nangho hi nabonchauvin Pakai Pathenin panpiuvin. Hitobang mi chu kipat hen lang chetou jeng hen,’ tin aseiye,” ati.
